items.title_en: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
items.title_zh: LinkedIn招聘广告中的后门
items.summary_en: A backdoor was discovered embedded in a LinkedIn job offer, illustrating how the recruiting process can be weaponized to compromise targets. The post explains how attackers used the job posting to deliver malware or harvest credentials, highlighting the risk of social engineering on professional networks. It underscores the need for stricter validation of job postings and better phishing defenses by platforms and users.
items.summary_zh: 在 LinkedIn 的一个招聘信息中发现了后门，暴露了招聘流程如何被用来对目标进行入侵。攻击者可能通过该职位发布来投放恶意软件或窃取凭据，凸显了职业社交网络中的钓鱼风险。强调平台和用户都需加强对招聘信息的验证与安全防护。

items.title_en: Running local models is good now
items.title_zh: 本地运行模型现在已经可行
items.summary_en: Recent advances in open-source models, tooling, and consumer hardware have made running local models practical again. Local inference offers privacy, lower latency, and offline reliability, though trade-offs in performance and updatability remain.
items.summary_zh: 近来开源模型、工具链和硬件水平的提升让本地运行模型重新成为现实，带来隐私、更低延迟和离线可用性等优势，同时在性能与可更新性方面仍存在权衡。

items.title_en: Iroh 1.0
items.title_zh: Iroh 1.0
items.summary_en: Iroh 1.0 marks an early version of a new AI assistant platform, signaling growth in developer-friendly AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Iroh 1.0 标志着一个新型 AI 助手平台的早期版本，预示着面向开发者的 AI 工具生态在成长。

items.title_en: Midjourney Medical
items.title_zh: Midjourney 医疗应用
items.summary_en: Midjourney extends its generative AI into medical contexts, exploring potential uses for imaging, diagnostics, and patient communication. The discussion highlights the tradeoffs between creative flexibility and the stringent safety, privacy, and accuracy requirements in healthcare.
items.summary_zh: Midjourney 将其生成式 AI 引入医疗场景，探索在影像、诊断与病人沟通中的潜在应用。讨论强调在医疗领域对安全、隐私与准确性等高要求与创意灵活性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Has anyone replaced Claude/GPT with a local model for daily coding?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：有没有人用本地模型替代 Claude/GPT 进行日常编码？
items.summary_en: Users discuss replacing cloud-based copilots with locally hosted models for everyday coding tasks. Local models can improve privacy and reduce latency, but may require beefier hardware and careful tuning to approach Claude/GPT capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 社区在讨论是否可用本地部署的模型来替代云端的助理进行日常编码。虽然本地模型提升隐私与降低延迟的潜力很大，但往往需要更强大的硬件与精心调优以接近 Claude/GPT 的能力。

items.title_en: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
items.title_zh: Lore：为可扩展性设计的开源版本控制系统
items.summary_en: Lore is an open-source version control system built to scale with large codebases and teams. It emphasizes performance and architecture designed to handle millions of files, making collaboration smoother for enterprises and big projects. The takeaway: it positions itself as a scalable alternative to traditional VCS in environments where Git can struggle.
items.summary_zh: Lore 是一个为大型代码库和团队协作而设计的开源版本控制系统。它强调高性能和可扩展的架构，能够处理海量文件，从而为企业级大项目提供更顺畅的协作。核心在于它试图在 Git 可能吃力的环境中提供一个可扩展的替代方案。

items.title_en: SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B
items.title_zh: SpaceX将以600亿美元收购Cursor
items.summary_en: SpaceX plans to acquire Cursor in a deal reportedly worth $60 billion, signaling a strategic push to broaden its AI-enabled compute capabilities. The acquisition could consolidate software assets and accelerate cross-domain tech integration across aerospace and software.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX拟以约600亿美元收购Cursor，显示其在AI计算能力和高级软件资产方面扩张的策略性动向。

items.title_en: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
items.title_zh: 60% 的美国消费者认为品牌信息中的 AI 会让人反感
items.summary_en: Many US consumers are turned off by AI buzzwords in brand messaging. Brands should emphasize authentic value and real capabilities rather than hype. This trend underscores the need for responsible, outcome-focused AI marketing.
items.summary_zh: 六成美国消费者对品牌信息中的 AI 概念感到反感，认为这是噱头。品牌应聚焦真实价值与实际能力，而非空洞的技术炒作。此趋势凸显在 AI 营销中避免过度承诺、追求可验证结果的重要性。

items.title_en: TinyWind: A pixel pirate sailing game with real wind physics (380k+ kms sailed)
items.title_zh: TinyWind：一款具备真实风力物理的像素海盗航海游戏（航行里程超过38万公里）
items.summary_en: TinyWind delivers a pixel-art sailing experience driven by plausible wind physics, giving a tactile sense of sailing. With over 380,000 kilometers sailed by players, it demonstrates strong engagement with physics-based gameplay and sparks ideas for indie developers to model wind without heavy graphics.
items.summary_zh: 这款像素风帆船游戏以贴近真实的风力物理为核心，带来更具手感的航海体验。玩家累计航行里程已超38万公里，体现了对基于物理的玩法的强烈投入，并为独立开发者在无需繁重美术资源的前提下实现可信风场提供了思路。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 已移植至 Android 17，官方发布即将到来
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS has reached a port to Android 17, bringing its hardened, privacy-first Android fork to the latest base. Expect updated security hardening, better device compatibility, and official builds rolling out soon. This signals ongoing momentum for privacy-focused Android variants as core Android updates proceed.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 已实现对 Android 17 的移植，延续其以隐私和安全为核心的 Android 派生系统。官方版本预计不久就会发布，带来更新的安全增强和更广的设备兼容性，标志着隐私取向的 Android 生态持续增长。

items.title_en: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.title_zh: 我发现一万多个 GitHub 仓库在分发木马恶意软件
items.summary_en: A collection of about 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware highlights the scale of malware hosted on code platforms. It underscores the importance of supply-chain security and rigorous review of dependencies when building software.
items.summary_zh: 大约一万多个 GitHub 仓库被发现用于传播木马恶意软件，揭示代码托管平台上恶意分发的规模。这凸显了在构建软件时加强供应链安全和依赖审查的重要性。

items.title_en: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
items.title_zh: 现代集团全面控股 Boston Dynamics
items.summary_en: Hyundai has completed securing full control of Boston Dynamics, with SoftBank exiting the stake for about $325 million. This move bets big on Hyundai’s robotics ambitions, signaling a push to integrate robot hardware, AI, and mobility platforms across its business units. Boston Dynamics gains a more stable automotive-aligned parent with resources to scale.
items.summary_zh: 现代集团完成对 Boston Dynamics 的全面控股，软银退出，交易额约3.25亿美元。这笔交易巩固了现代在机器人领域的长期野心，便于在其业务线里整合机器人硬件、人工智能与智能出行生态。

items.title_en: I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer
items.title_zh: 我钦佩Fabrice Bellard，他几乎可以算是更出色的全能程序员
items.summary_en: Fabrice Bellard is praised as perhaps the most well-rounded programmer, illustrating how broad expertise across systems software yields outsized impact. His work—behind core projects like QEMU and FFmpeg—embodies the deep, practical engineering that powers modern computing.
items.summary_zh: Fabrice Bellard在系统软件领域的广泛成就让他被视为最全面的程序员之一，其作品影响广泛。诸如QEMU和FFmpeg等核心项目体现了极致优化与落地工程的力量。

items.title_en: Your ePub Is fine
items.title_zh: 你的 ePub 没问题
items.summary_en: Kobo pushes back against blaming Adobe for ePub issues, arguing the format remains solid and that rendering problems are often caused by apps or readers rather than the standard. The post reframes the controversy as a shared interoperability challenge across devices, tools, and publishers, not a single vendor fault. This has practical implications for developers and distributors aiming for broad ePub compatibility.
items.summary_zh: 在围绕 ePub 兼容性的争议中，Kobo 反对把问题归咎于 Adobe，认为该格式本身仍然稳健，渲染问题往往来自具体应用与设备实现。该观点将难题定位为读写器、工具和出版商共同面临的互操作挑战，而非某个厂商的错。此事对开发者和出版方在跨设备兼容性上的决策具有现实意义。

items.title_en: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
items.title_zh: 苹果的抗晕点真的治愈我的车晕
items.summary_en: User tests indicate Apple's anti-nausea motion cues dramatically reduced car sickness, with a perception of smoother rides. The piece explains the underlying motion cueing concept and discusses whether it foreshadows broader comfort improvements in mobile or AR displays.
items.summary_zh: 实测显示苹果的抗晕点显著缓解车载晕动，带来更平稳的乘车体验。文中解释了相关的运动提示原理，并讨论它对移动端或 AR 显示的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Firewood Splitting Simulator
items.title_zh: 劈柴分裂模拟器
items.summary_en: A lighthearted, physics-based simulator that lets you chop virtual firewood, delivering satisfying feedback loops and simple rules. It’s a tiny reminder that well-tuned mechanics can be more engaging than complexity.
items.summary_zh: 这是一款以物理为基础的趣味模拟器，玩家通过虚拟劈柴获得直观的反馈与上手简单的玩法。简洁的游戏机制往往比复杂性更具吸引力。

items.title_en: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
items.title_zh: GLM-5.2 成为 Artificial Analysis 上的开源权重新领先者
items.summary_en: GLM-5.2 has emerged as the leading open-weight model on the Artificial Analysis index, outperforming its predecessors in benchmark tests. It demonstrates strong generalization with competitive inference speed, illustrating how open-weight ecosystems continue to close the gap with closed models. This trend lowers barriers for researchers to experiment with powerful LLMs at scale.
items.summary_zh: GLM-5.2 已成为开源权重模型的领先者，领先于前代模型并在基准测试中表现突出。它在推理速度和泛化能力方面表现有竞争力，标志着开源权重生态的成熟。此趋势降低了研究人员在大模型实验中的门槛。

items.title_en: U.S. science is in chaos
items.title_zh: 美国科学界陷入混乱
items.summary_en: An analysis arguing the U.S. science-politics compact is broken, threatening long-term funding, independent oversight, and scientific consensus.
items.summary_zh: 一篇分析指出，美国科学与政治之间的默契已破裂，长期资助、独立监督和科学共识受到威胁。文章强调政治极化和短期政策周期削弱了研究生态系统，也影响着科技创新的发展。

items.title_en: Every Frame Perfect
items.title_zh: 每一帧都要完美
items.summary_en: A discourse on achieving pixel-perfect rendering across frames, weighing visual fidelity against performance in modern graphics pipelines. The piece offers practical perspectives on how engineers balance quality, predictability, and resource use to reach consistently polished results.
items.summary_zh: 关于在每一帧中实现像素级完美渲染的讨论，权衡在现代图形管线中视觉保真度与性能的关系。文中提出工程师在质量、可预测性和资源使用之间的平衡策略，以实现持续一致的高质量输出。

items.title_en: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
items.title_zh: 挪威对小学生使用AI几近全面禁令
items.summary_en: Norway is moving toward a near-ban on AI use in elementary schools, tightening rules on what students and teachers can access on school devices. The policy underscores safety concerns and data privacy while grappling with how to responsibly integrate AI into early education.
items.summary_zh: 挪威正推动对小学生在校使用AI的几近全面禁令，严格限制师生在校设备上的AI工具使用。此举凸显对安全与数据隐私的关注，以及在早教阶段如何负责任地引入AI的权衡。

items.title_en: Swiss parliament lifts ban on new nuclear power plants
items.title_zh: 瑞士议会解除对新核电厂的禁令
items.summary_en: Switzerland's parliament voted to lift the ban on new nuclear power plants, signaling a pivot in the country's energy strategy. The move could affect climate goals, energy security, and the pace of nuclear innovation in Europe.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士议会投票解除对新核电厂的禁令，标志着能源战略的转折。此举可能影响碳目标、能源安全以及欧洲在核能创新上的推进速度。

items.title_en: Volkswagen started blocking GrapheneOS users
items.title_zh: 大众汽车开始屏蔽 GrapheneOS 用户
items.summary_en: Volkswagen has started blocking GrapheneOS users from its apps. The move highlights ongoing frictions between privacy-focused mobile OS choices and corporate app ecosystems, raising questions about platform-level access and user rights. It underscores how vendor policies can limit privacy-aware users and the ecosystems around open-source mobile OSes.
items.summary_zh: 大众汽车开始屏蔽 GrapheneOS 用户使用其应用的行为凸显了隐私导向的移动系统与厂商应用生态之间的矛盾。此举引发对平台访问和用户权益的讨论，也提醒隐私友好型操作系统的使用者可能面临被排除的风险。厂商政策对开源移动生态的影响再次成为焦点。

items.title_en: Curl will not accept vulnerability reports during July 2026
items.title_zh: Curl 将在 2026 年 7 月暂停接受漏洞报告
items.summary_en: The curl project announces a July 2026 hiatus from vulnerability submissions to coordinate disclosures and focus on fixes, with researchers advised to submit reports before or after the window. The move highlights the realities of coordinating security work in a large, open-source project and sets expectations for researchers.
items.summary_zh: Curl 项目宣布在 2026 年 7 月暂停接受漏洞报告，以便协调披露时间并集中处理修复工作，建议研究人员在此窗口前后提交报告。此举凸显了在大型开源项目中协同安全工作的现实挑战，并为研究人员设定预期。

items.title_en: GLM 5.2 Is Out
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2 已发布
items.summary_en: GLM 5.2 releases bring updates to the graphics math library, with API refinements and performance tweaks for modern rendering pipelines. Useful for developers targeting OpenGL and Vulkan workflows.
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2 发布，带来 API 精炼和性能优化，帮助开发者在现代渲染管线（OpenGL/Vulkan 等）中更高效地使用图形数学工具。

items.title_en: What happened to nerds?
items.title_zh: 书呆子到底怎么了？
items.summary_en: The piece questions what happened to the traditional nerd archetype as tech culture shifts and becomes mainstream.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章在质疑随着科技文化的转变，传统书呆子形象到底去了哪里。

items.title_en: Mechanical Watch (2022)
items.summary_en: Mechanical Watch (2022) breaks down the fundamentals: a mainspring stores energy, a gear train transmits it, and the escapement and balance wheel regulate time. It also discusses sources of error—friction, temperature, and wear—and why accuracy remains a balancing act between durability and precision.
items.summary_zh: 《机械手表（2022）》分解原理：发条储存能量，通过齿轮传动，靠擒纵机构和摆轮来调控走时。文中还讨论了摩擦、温度和磨损等误差来源，以及在耐用性与精准度之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Microsoft new Outlook takes 10 seconds to do what Outlook Classic does instantly
items.title_zh: 微软新版 Outlook 比经典版慢十秒
items.summary_en: The new Outlook design takes about ten seconds to complete tasks that the classic app did instantly, highlighting a productivity hit from modernization. This reflects a broader tension between feature-rich updates and user experience in enterprise software, fueling calls for an option to revert to a familiar workflow.
items.summary_zh: 新版 Outlook 在完成一些经典版能瞬间完成的任务时需约十秒，暴露出现代化改造带来的生产力损失。这反映了企业软件在功能增强与用户体验之间的博弈，也推动了对保留熟悉工作流的需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: Kage – Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing
items.title_zh: Show HN：Kage — 将任意网站打包为离线可用的单一二进制文件
items.summary_en: Kage bundles a website into a single standalone binary, enabling offline viewing without a browser or network. It makes distribution and archiving of a site trivial for demos, edge devices, or offline access.
items.summary_zh: Kage 将任意网站打包成一个独立的可执行文件，离线也能浏览。提高了便携性，适合离线演示、备份与边缘部署。

items.title_en: How to earn a billion dollars
items.title_zh: 如何赚取十亿美元
items.summary_en: Paul Graham outlines practical steps toward building a billion-dollar company, emphasizing market size, execution, and durable competitive advantages.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·格雷厄姆总结打造高价值创业的要点：选大市场、持续交付、构建持久优势。

items.title_en: Is Meta destroying its engineering organization?
items.title_zh: 为何 Meta 正在削弱其工程组织？
items.summary_en: A critical take argues Meta's engineering organization has weakened due to misaligned incentives, staffing changes, and leadership shifts, slowing delivery and harming morale. It offers organizational design lessons for large-scale tech firms.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为 Meta 的工程组织因激励错配、人事变动和领导层调整而受挫，导致交付变慢、士气下降。文中给出大型科技公司在组织设计方面的教训与建议。

items.title_en: Want your images back? That'll be $5
items.title_zh: 要回你的图片？要收取5美元
items.summary_en: A service charging a flat fee to retrieve your images highlights the economics of data recovery and ownership in an AI-enabled world. It spotlights the friction and costs users face when reclaiming their own media.
items.summary_zh: 关于用固定费用（5 美元）来让用户找回自己的图片，折射出数据所有权、隐私与数据恢复成本在 AI 时代的经济性与伦理议题。

items.title_en: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
items.title_zh: Valhalla 项目解读：十年研发在 JDK 28 落地
items.summary_en: Project Valhalla brings value types and specialized generics to the JVM, enabling compact, allocation-free data representations and faster APIs. This explainer frames the decade-long effort, the tradeoffs involved, and what JDK 28 users can expect in terms of performance, memory efficiency, and backward compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Valhalla 将为 JVM 引入值类型与专用泛型，带来更紧凑、无分配的数据表示和更快的 API。本文梳理了十余年的实现过程、设计取舍，以及 JDK 28 用户在性能、内存效率和向后兼容性方面将看到的变化。

items.title_en: CrankGPT
items.title_zh: CrankGPT
items.summary_en: CrankGPT has emerged as a new AI product, signaling continued diversification of AI chat agents.
items.summary_zh: CrankGPT 已作为一款新型人工智能产品出现，标志着 AI 聊天代理领域的持续多样化。

items.title_en: Hacker News but for independent blogs
items.title_zh: 独立博客版 Hacker News
items.summary_en: A platform proposing Hacker News-like aggregation for independent blogs, offering niche tech writing a dedicated space away from mainstream outlets. By curating quality posts from independent voices, it could diversify discourse and boost visibility for smaller publishers.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向独立博客的聚合平台，提供类似 Hacker News 的社区化信息流，让非主流媒体的技术写作获得专门的曝光空间。通过精选独立声音的高质量帖子，它有望让讨论更具多样性，并提升小型出版者的能见度。

items.title_en: Feds freaked over Fable 5 after 'fix this code', not jailbreak, say researchers
items.title_zh: 研究人员称，对Fable 5的担忧并非因越狱，而是源于修这段代码的提示
items.summary_en: Researchers say the Fable 5 incident wasn’t about jailbreaks but a simple fix-this-code prompt that triggered automated defenses. The episode highlights how prompt patterns can provoke legal or policy alarms even when the underlying tech isn't compromised.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员指出，对Fable 5的担忧并非源自越狱风险，而是一个简单的修这段代码提示触发的自动防护。此事揭示了提示模式如何诱发策略阻断与调查的风险。

items.title_en: Banned book library in a wi-fi smart light bulb
items.title_zh: Wi‑Fi 智能灯泡中的被禁书库
items.summary_en: A Wi‑Fi smart light bulb secretly hosts a library of banned or hard-to-find texts, turning a household device into a portable knowledge archive. The project provokes thoughts about censorship, distributed aesthetics, and the potential of IoT as a stealth repository.
items.summary_zh: 一颗具备 Wi‑Fi 的智能灯泡成了一个迷你禁书库，将文本打包进常见的物联网设备。该项目展示了硬件与本地网络如何成为信息存储与传播的新载体，也引发对数字审查与数据持久性的思考。

items.title_en: Windows 11 users are tired of MS account requirements creeping into everything
items.title_zh: Windows 11 用户厌倦 Microsoft 账户要求渗透到方方面面
items.summary_en: Users push back against Microsoft account requirements infiltrating many parts of Windows 11, with workarounds and policy tensions around onboarding and offline usage.
items.summary_zh: 用户反感 Microsoft 账户要求渗透到 Windows 11 的方方面面，并寻找变通方案、讨论上线流程与离线使用的策略冲突。文章凸显产品设计与用户自主性之间的持续摩擦。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5 hallucinates 3x more than MIT-licensed GLM-5.2
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 的幻觉比 MIT 许可的 GLM-5.2 高出 3 倍
items.summary_en: A practical comparison shows GPT-5.5 hallucinates far more than GLM-5.2, raising reliability concerns for next-gen models.
items.summary_zh: 评测显示，在相同条件下，GPT-5.5 的幻觉率比 MIT 许可的 GLM-5.2 高出约三倍，这让人担忧大模型的可靠性。文中讨论可能的原因，以及这对依赖对话型助手的开发者意味着什么。

items.title_en: .gitignore Isn't the only way to ignore files in Git
items.title_zh: .gitignore 不是忽略文件的唯一方式
items.summary_en: There are tactics to ignore files in Git beyond .gitignore, including skip-worktree and assume-unchanged, plus index-level tricks.
items.summary_zh: .gitignore 之外还有忽略文件的办法，如 skip-worktree、assume-unchanged 等。文中介绍了何时使用以及可能的风险。

items.title_en: Calvin and Hobbes and the price of integrity
items.title_zh: 卡尔文与霍布斯：正直的代价
items.summary_en: A thoughtful essay uses Calvin and Hobbes to reflect on integrity in a world of incentives, exploring what staying true to one's principles costs creators and communities. It illustrates how honesty can shape practice and culture.
items.summary_zh: 以《卡尔文与霍布斯》为镜，思考在激励驱动的世界中坚持正直的代价，探讨创作者与社区对原则的坚持会带来何种影响。说明诚实如何影响实践与文化。

items.title_en: Google workspace threatening to block Firefox access
items.title_zh: Google Workspace 可能阻止 Firefox 访问
items.summary_en: If true, Google Workspace blocking Firefox would raise questions about browser compatibility and vendor lock-in in enterprise tools. It would push users toward Chromium-based ecosystems and complicate privacy-focused setups. The broader signal is about how much control platforms exert over client access.
items.summary_zh: 若属实，Google Workspace 可能阻断 Firefox 访问，将引发对企业工具中的浏览器兼容性与厂商锁定的讨论。这会推动用户转向以 Chromium 为核心的生态，并影响偏好隐私的工作环境。

items.title_en: TIL: You can make HTTP requests without curl using Bash /dev/TCP
items.title_zh: 今天学到：可以用 Bash 的 /dev/TCP 发起 HTTP 请求，无需 curl
items.summary_en: Bash can issue HTTP requests by opening a TCP connection with /dev/tcp and writing raw HTTP, avoiding curl. This technique is handy in minimal environments or quick checks, but it's brittle, lacks features like redirects and timeouts, and requires manual response parsing.
items.summary_zh: 通过打开 /dev/tcp 的 TCP 连接并发送原始 HTTP 请求即可在 Bash 中完成网络请求，无需 curl。适合极简环境和快速诊断，但缺乏如重定向、超时等特性，需要手动解析响应。

items.title_en: There are no instances in ATProto
items.title_zh: ATProto 中不存在实例概念
items.summary_en: ATProto’s architecture is often misunderstood as having 'instances'. The author argues there are no such isolated 'instances' in ATProto because federation uses accounts and servers differently, emphasizing interoperability and same-identity across servers. This reframes how developers should think about hosting and moderation in ATProto.
items.summary_zh: ATProto 的架构常被误解为‘实例’概念。作者指出在 ATProto 的联邦模型里并不存在真正的‘实例’，强调跨服务器的互操作性和统一身份的重要性，这对开发者在托管与 moderation 上的思路有显著影响。

items.title_en: Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless
items.title_zh: 苹果即将让 Hide My Email 失效
items.summary_en: A forthcoming change could undermine Hide My Email, reducing its ability to shield users’ real addresses when signing up for services. Privacy-focused users may need to adapt or seek alternatives as Apple alters how aliases are exposed.
items.summary_zh: 传闻称苹果即将改变 Hide My Email 的工作方式，降低该功能对用户隐私的保护，可能使真实邮箱更易暴露。隐私导向的用户需要适应新的使用方式，或寻找替代方案。

items.title_en: Hetzner Price Adjustment
items.title_zh: Hetzner 价格调整
items.summary_en: Hetzner updates its pricing for cloud servers and related services, affecting cost calculations for small squads and hobby projects. Users should review the new rates and adjust budgets or workflows accordingly.
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 调整云服务器及相关服务价格，可能影响小型团队和业余项目的成本计算。用户需要审阅新价格并相应调整预算与工作流。

items.title_en: CSSQuake
items.title_zh: CSSQuake
items.summary_en: CSSQuake is a browser-based project that demonstrates CSS-driven visuals in a quake-inspired demo. It showcases how far CSS alone can push interactive, game-like experiences without heavy JavaScript.
items.summary_zh: CSSQuake 是一个在浏览器中展示 CSS 驱动视觉效果的 quake 风格演示。它展示了仅用 CSS 就能实现接近游戏体验的交互能力。

items.title_en: Court Records Should Be Free
items.title_zh: 法院记录应免费开放
items.summary_en: EFF argues that court records should be freely accessible and machine-readable to improve transparency, research, and accountability. The movement pushes for open court data standards and reduces friction for journalists, researchers, and the public.
items.summary_zh: EFF 呼吁法院记录应免费向公众开放并可机器可读，以提升透明度、研究和问责。倡导建立公开的法院数据标准，降低记者、研究者和公众的使用成本。

items.title_en: Loupe – A iOS app that raises awareness about what native apps can see
items.title_zh: Loupe：一款揭示原生应用可访问数据的 iOS 应用
items.summary_en: Loupe is an iOS app that visually demonstrates what native apps can access on-device, helping users understand app permissions and data exposure. The project underscores the importance of privacy transparency in mobile ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Loupe 是一款用来直观展示原生应用能访问哪些数据的 iOS 应用，帮助用户理解应用权限与数据暴露。该项目凸显了移动生态系统中隐私透明度的重要性。

items.title_en: US holds off blacklisting DeepSeek, more than 100 firms deemed security risks
items.title_zh: 美国推迟将 DeepSeek 列入黑名单，超百家企业被视为安全风险
items.summary_en: The US deferred a blacklist decision on DeepSeek while revealing a broader security-risk sweep that flagged more than 100 firms. The move underscores tightening export controls and heightened vendor risk scrutiny across tech supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 美国推迟将 DeepSeek 列入黑名单，但披露对超百家企业进行安全风险评估的结果，反映出对技术供应链与出口管制的持续收紧。

items.title_en: The time the x86 emulator team found code so bad they fixed it during emulation
items.title_zh: X86 模拟器团队在仿真中直接修复糟糕代码的故事
items.summary_en: While running legacy x86 code, the emulator team uncovered a section so badly written that it risked correctness. They patched the behavior directly in the emulator during the debugging session, effectively fixing the issue without modifying the source. The story highlights how emulation can surface design flaws and enable quick, in-situ fixes for stubborn code.
items.summary_zh: 在仿真环境中运行遗留的 x86 代码时，团队发现了一段异常糟糕的实现，严重影响正确性。他们在仿真过程中直接对行为进行了修正，几乎是在现场完成了修复，而无需改动源代码。这个故事展示了仿真工具在暴露设计缺陷并实现快速就地修复方面的强大力量。

items.title_en: Identity verification on Claude
items.title_zh: Claude 的身份验证
items.summary_en: Claude includes an identity verification flow to control access for sensitive features and enterprise usage. The guide covers when verification is required, what methods are supported, and how it affects access privileges.
items.summary_zh: Claude 提供身份验证流程以控制对敏感功能和企业用途的访问。指南说明何时需要验证、支持哪些方法，以及对权限访问的影响。

items.title_en: How many of the 170k English words do you know?
items.title_zh: 你认识多少个约17万的英语单词？
items.summary_en: A playful tool invites you to estimate how many English words you know from a list of about 170k, highlighting vocabulary size and variation among readers. It illustrates why fluency relies on context and frequency as much as memorization.
items.summary_zh: 一款有趣的工具让你在约17万单词的清单中估算自己的词汇量，揭示不同读者之间的差异。它说明了流利程度更多依赖上下文与词频，而非记住所有单词。

items.title_en: Stop Using JWTs
items.title_zh: 停止使用 JWTs
items.summary_en: A concise critique of JSON Web Tokens, highlighting common misuses like improper storage, algorithm pitfalls, and relying on long-lived tokens. The piece advocates safer authentication patterns and modern alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 简要批评 JSON Web Token 的常见误用，如存储不当、算法陷阱和对长期令牌的依赖。文中提倡采用更安全的认证模式和新兴替代方案。

items.title_en: DeepSeek Introduces Vision
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 推出 Vision
items.summary_en: DeepSeek releases Vision, a new computer-vision platform meant to simplify building AI-powered visual apps. It emphasizes developer-friendly APIs and real-time performance across edge and cloud deployments. The launch could influence how teams prototype and deploy CV workloads.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 发布 Vision，这是一款旨在简化构建AI驱动视觉应用的新型计算机视觉平台。它强调面向开发者友好的 API 和在边缘及云端的实时性能。此次发布可能影响团队在原型设计与CV工作负载部署上的方式。

items.title_en: Apple Foundation Models
items.title_zh: 苹果基础模型
items.summary_en: Apple releases a suite of foundation models and accompanying SDKs to enable on-device AI workflows, signaling deeper AI integration in the Apple ecosystem. The post outlines available models and APIs, and explains how developers can leverage them for tasks like vision, language, and understanding while prioritizing privacy.
items.summary_zh: 苹果推出一系列基础模型及配套的 SDK，旨在在设备端实现 AI 工作流，标志着苹果生态对 AI 的更深度整合。文章列出可用的模型与 API，并解释开发者如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用它们完成视觉、语言和理解等任务。

items.title_en: Not everyone is using AI for everything
items.title_zh: 并非人人都把 AI 用到极致
items.summary_en: The piece challenges AI fever by arguing most people are not using AI for everything; adoption remains selective and task-specific. It emphasizes realistic expectations and practical limits of AI in everyday life.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章对 AI 热潮提出质疑，表示大多数人并未把 AI 用来做所有事情，应用仍然是有选择性的。强调对 AI 的实际价值与局限要有清晰判断。

items.title_en: Local Qwen isn't a worse Opus, it's a different tool
items.title_zh: 本地 Qwen 不是比 Opus 差，而是另一种工具
items.summary_en: Local Qwen and Opus serve different needs in offline AI deployment; the post argues it's not about one being worse, but about fitting the use case, latency, and autonomy requirements. It contrasts the tradeoffs between size, accuracy, and privacy in local models.
items.summary_zh: 本地版 Qwen 与 Opus 面向离线部署的需求不同，文章认为两者并非孰优孰劣，而是各自适配的使用场景、延迟和自主性需求。对比了在本地模型中尺寸、准确性与隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: I told them forced consent was unlawful. 5 years later it cost Elkjop €1.8M
items.title_zh: 我曾告诉他们强制同意违法，5年后 Elkjøp 被罚 180 万欧元
items.summary_en: Forcing user consent is unlawful and can trigger hefty penalties; this case shows a retailer paying €1.8M five years later. The outcome underscores the necessity of informed, freely given, and revocable consent, plus robust privacy-by-design practices.
items.summary_zh: 强制获取用户同意违反法律，最终导致高额罚款；该案五年后 Elkjøp 被处以 €180 万罚金，凸显知情、自由且可撤销同意的重要性，以及以隐私为设计核心的合规实践。

items.title_en: Bobby Prince, composer for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died
items.title_zh: 悼念 Doom、Wolfenstein 3D 与 Duke Nukem 3D 作曲家 Bobby Prince
items.summary_en: Bobby Prince, the composer behind iconic soundtracks for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died. His work helped define the sound of early FPS games and remains influential in game music history.
items.summary_zh: 为《毁灭战士》、Duke Nukem 3D 等经典游戏创作配乐的作曲家Bobby Prince去世。他的音乐塑造了早期FPS游戏的声音风格，并持续影响着游戏音乐史。

items.title_en: Where to Find the Colors Your Screen Can't Show You
items.title_zh: 屏幕显示不到的颜色在哪里可以找到
items.summary_en: Every display is limited by its color gamut, so some hues simply can't be shown. The article surveys ways to explore or approximate those beyond-screen colors—from spectral imaging and printing to perceptual color spaces like CIELAB—and explains why designers should think beyond sRGB. It also offers practical tips for communicating color intent when screens fall short.
items.summary_zh: 屏幕的颜色范围有限，某些色调无法在显示器上呈现。文章探讨如何接近或再现这些超出屏幕能力的颜色，涵盖分光成像、印刷，以及感知为基础的颜色空间（如CIELAB），并提供在屏幕受限时传达颜色意图的实用方法。

items.title_en: U.S. pulling ocean sensors a 'shock' for Canadian research as El Niño nears
items.title_zh: 美国撤走海洋传感器让加拿大研究感到震惊，厄尔尼诺临近
items.summary_en: With El Niño approaching, the US pulling ocean sensors reduces critical data for climate forecasting and marine research. The move could hamper Canadian research and cross-border collaboration that relies on shared sensor networks. Researchers may need alternative data sources or longer data lags to model upcoming climate patterns.
items.summary_zh: 在厄尔尼诺来临之际，美国撤走海洋传感器，削弱了用于气候预测和海洋研究的关键数据来源。此举可能影响加拿大及区域科研与跨境合作，研究人员或需寻找替代数据源。面对即将到来的气候变化，他们或将承担数据滞后与不确定性的风险。

items.title_en: Emacs 31 is around the corner: The changes I'm daily driving
items.title_zh: Emacs 31 即将到来：我日常使用中的变更点
items.summary_en: As Emacs 31 approaches, the author details daily-driving changes that improve editing, navigation, and package management. These practical tweaks promise meaningful productivity gains for power users who customize their workflow. It’s a glimpse into how small iterates accumulate into a better editing experience.
items.summary_zh: 随着 Emacs 31 的到来，作者分享日常使用中的改动点，涵盖编辑、导航和包管理等方面的提升。这些实际改动对定制工作流的高级用户可能带来显著的生产力提升，展示了小改动如何累积成更高效的编辑体验。

items.title_en: DuckDB Internals Part 1
items.title_zh: DuckDB 内部实现：第一部分
items.summary_en: An introductory look into DuckDB's internals, covering architecture, storage layout, and query execution approach. The post sets the stage for deeper dives into its columnar engine and optimization tricks.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 内部实现的入门分析，涵盖架构、存储布局与查询执行方式，为后续对其列式引擎与优化技巧的深入探讨奠定基础。

items.title_en: Show HN: Are You in the Weights?
items.title_zh: Show HN：Are You in the Weights?
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a project centered on model weights, inviting the community to explore, audit, or contribute to a weights-focused tool or dataset.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个聚焦模型权重的项目，邀请社区参与探索、审阅或为一个权重相关的工具或数据集贡献。

items.title_en: AI Engineer Claims to Have Cracked Linear A
items.title_zh: AI 工程师声称破解线性 A
items.summary_en: An AI engineer claims to have deciphered Linear A using machine learning. The claim is controversial and lacks independent verification, but if substantiated it would upend assumptions about ancient scripts and AI’s reach in decipherment.
items.summary_zh: 一名 AI 工程师声称使用机器学习破解线性 A，但缺乏独立验证。若属实，这将颠覆对古代文字的认知和 AI 在解密领域的应用边界。

items.title_en: AMD silently removes memory encryption from consumer Ryzen CPUs
items.title_zh: AMD悄然移除消费级 Ryzen CPU 的内存加密
items.summary_en: AMD quietly removed memory encryption from some consumer Ryzen CPUs via a firmware update, reducing protection against memory-snooping attacks. The change was not publicly announced, leaving users to discover it through firmware notes. The move has security implications for memory-resident data and enclaves, and affected users should consider staying on older AGESA firmware or applying compensating protections where available.
items.summary_zh: AMD 通过固件更新悄然移除了部分消费级 Ryzen CPU 的内存加密，削弱了对内存窃取等攻击的保护。这一变更未公开宣布，用户需要通过固件说明才发现。此举对内存驻留数据和安全区域有影响，受影响的用户应考虑保留较旧的 AGESA 固件版本或在可用时应用替代保护措施。

items.title_en: A website that lists websites to submit your website to
items.title_zh: 一个汇总可提交你的网站的目录网站
items.summary_en: An index that aggregates websites you can submit your own site to, illustrating how directory submissions organized the early web. It highlights a form of link-building that has faded from mainstream SEO, while still offering discovery channels for small sites.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个集合了可提交自己网站的入口目录，展示了早期网页如何通过目录提交来提升曝光。虽然如今被视为过时的 SEO 策略，但对小型站点仍有发现新读者的作用。

items.title_en: The AirPods Effect
items.title_zh: AirPods 效应
items.summary_en: The AirPods effect reshaped consumer expectations around wireless audio, battery life, and device interoperability. It spurred rapid adoption of true wireless design, influenced accessory ecosystems, and shifted how tech brands think about on-device interactions.
items.summary_zh: AirPods 效应改变了消费者对无线音频、续航与设备互操作性的预期，推动了真无线设计的快速普及并影响周边生态。它也促使厂商重新思考设备交互的设计与生态策略。

items.title_en: CS 6120: Advanced Compilers: The Self-Guided Online Course (2020)
items.title_zh: 高级编译器：自学在线课程
items.summary_en: Cornell's Advanced Compilers self-guided online course offers deep dives into optimization, intermediate representations, and code generation, with hands-on exercises you can tackle at your own pace. It's a solid resource for researchers and senior developers aiming to master modern compiler tech.
items.summary_zh: 康奈尔大学的高级编译器自学课程提供对优化、中间表示和代码生成的深入讲解，并配有可自学的动手练习。对于研究人员和资深开发者而言，是掌握现代编译技术的扎实资源。

items.title_en: The founder of Craigslist has given away half a billion dollars
items.title_zh: Craigslist 创始人捐出 5 亿美元
items.summary_en: Craig Newmark, Craigslist's founder, has given away about $500 million, underscoring a notable philanthropic commitment from a tech founder. The donations likely support journalism and civil society causes, reflecting a trend of tech leaders funding public goods.
items.summary_zh: Craigslist 创始人 Craig Newmark 已捐出约 5 亿美元，展示了科技创始人对公益的长期承诺。这笔捐款大多用于支持新闻业、公民社会等领域，体现科技领袖在公共事务上的影响力与责任感。

items.title_en: Ubiquiti: Enterprise NAS, Built on ZFS
items.title_zh: Ubiquiti：企业级 NAS，基于 ZFS
items.summary_en: Ubiquiti announces an enterprise NAS built on ZFS, emphasizing data integrity, snapshots, and scalable storage for SMBs. The product signals growing interest in software-defined storage among cost-conscious businesses.
items.summary_zh: Ubiquiti 推出基于 ZFS 的企业级 NAS，强调数据完整性、快照功能与可扩展存储，面向中小企业。此举显示成本敏感型企业对软件定义存储兴趣上升。

items.title_en: Beyond All Reason (Free Total Annihilation Inspired RTS)
items.title_zh: 超越一切理性：免费 Total Annihilation 风格的 RTS
items.summary_en: Beyond All Reason is a free, community-driven RTS inspired by Total Annihilation, offering large-scale battles and classic resource economics. Built with modern, mod-friendly architecture, it emphasizes open development and cross-platform play, sustaining retro RTS enthusiasm.
items.summary_zh: Beyond All Reason 是一款免费、由社区驱动的实时策略游戏，受《Total Annihilation》启发，提供大规模战斗与经典资源系统。它采用现代化、便于修改的架构，强调开源开发与跨平台对战，延续对经典 RTS 的热爱。

items.title_en: Has AI already killed self-help nonfiction books?
items.title_zh: AI 已经让自助类非小说类书籍没落了吗？
items.summary_en: AI-generated content is challenging mass-market self-help nonfiction by commodifying generic insights. Authors can survive by offering verifiable frameworks, interactive courses, and proprietary systems that AI can’t easily imitate. The piece questions whether AI accelerates the genre’s evolution or undermines it entirely.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能生成的内容正在以同质化洞见压缩自助类非小说书籍的市场空间。作者若以可验证的框架、互动课程和专有体系提供难以被 AI 模仿的独特价值，仍有生存机会。文章在探讨 AI 是推动这一类型进化，还是让它变得不再有竞争力。

items.title_en: AI demands more engineering discipline. Not less
items.title_zh: AI 需要更强的工程化规范，而非放松
items.summary_en: As AI systems scale, engineering discipline becomes essential for reliability and safety. The piece argues for stronger practices in testing, governance, and data provenance, not looser constraints. Hooding hype with rigorous engineering is presented as a competitive advantage in the long run.
items.summary_zh: AI 系统规模化后，需更强的工程化规范来确保可靠性和安全性。文中强调应加强测试、治理与数据溯源等环节，而不是降低标准。过度炒作容易掩盖风险，严格的工程实践才是长期竞争力的关键。

items.title_en: Prefer duplication over the wrong abstraction (2016)
items.title_zh: 宁可重复，也别用错的抽象
items.summary_en: Duplicating code can keep intent clear when an abstraction would misfit. Premature, poorly fitting abstractions hurt maintainability; the post argues that clarity beats clever architecture and that refactoring can come later when the need is real.
items.summary_zh: 在抽象不合适时，重复实现能保持意图清晰。过早的、与场景不符的抽象会降低可维护性；文章主张清晰胜过花哨的架构，真正需要时再进行重构。

items.title_en: Only 16 Percent of Americans Think AI Will Have a Positive Impact on Society
items.title_zh: 只有16% 的美国人认为 AI 会对社会产生积极影响
items.summary_en: A new study finds only 16% of Americans believe AI will benefit society. Public skepticism stems from concerns about jobs, bias, and privacy, challenging optimistic narratives. The data suggests policymakers and companies must address real fears to foster broader AI adoption.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究显示只有 16% 的美国人认为 AI 会对社会带来积极影响。公众担忧集中在就业、偏见和隐私等方面，这一结果挑战乐观叙事。此数据提示政策制定者与企业需要直面公众担忧，推动更广泛的 AI 应用。

items.title_en: RFC 10008: The new HTTP Query Method
items.title_zh: RFC 10008：新的 HTTP 查询方法
items.summary_en: RFC 10008 proposes a new HTTP Query Method to formalize complex data queries separate from resource retrieval. If standardized, it could influence API design, request semantics, and caching behavior, shaping how developers express data requests over HTTP.
items.summary_zh: RFC 10008 提出一种新的 HTTP 查询方法，以将复杂查询与资源检索分离的方式标准化。如果成为标准，可能影响 API 设计、请求语义和缓存行为，改变开发者在 HTTP 上表达数据请求的方式。

items.title_en: Tesco moving 40k server workloads off VMware amid Broadcom's abusive conduct
items.title_zh: Tesco 将 4 万台服务器工作负载从 VMware 转移，因 Broadcom 的不当行为
items.summary_en: Tesco is migrating 40,000 server workloads away from VMware, citing Broadcom’s licensing and conduct as a push factor. The move signals enterprise preference for less punitive licensing and more flexible virtualization or cloud options. It reflects ongoing vendor tensions and cost containment in large retailers.
items.summary_zh: Tesco 将 4 万台服务器工作负载从 VMware 转移，原因指向 Broadcom 的许可策略和行为问题。这一举动透露大型企业对更灵活的虚拟化或云方案的偏好，以及对厂商定价与策略的担忧，折射出行业的成本管控压力。

items.title_en: Rio de Janeiro's "homegrown" LLM appears to be a merge of an existing model
items.title_zh: 里约热内卢的‘本土化’大模型似乎是现有模型的合并
items.summary_en: Early analysis suggests the Rio de Janeiro project reuses components from an existing LLM rather than training an original one from scratch. This provenance has implications for licensing, attribution, and how the model behaves in practice.
items.summary_zh: 初步分析表明，该项目在现有大模型基础上混合组件，而非完全从头训练。这对许可、署名和实际表现等方面都可能产生影响。

items.title_en: The Wholesale Plagiarism of Obscure Sorrows
items.title_zh: 《Obscure Sorrows》的大规模抄袭
items.summary_en: A critique of pervasive copying of Obscure Sorrows content, examining how fan fiction and derivative works undermine originality and the consequences for creators. The piece calls for attribution and respect for source material.
items.summary_zh: 对 Obscure Sorrows 内容被广泛抄袭的现象进行批评，探讨衍生作品对原创性的冲击及对创作者的影响，呼吁署名与尊重原作。

items.title_en: Slow breathing modulates brain function and risk behavior
items.title_zh: 缓慢呼吸调控大脑功能与风险行为
items.summary_en: Slow breathing techniques modulate brain activity and influence risk-taking behavior, likely via autonomic and vagal pathways. The finding suggests simple breathwork could help regulate mood and decision-making in high-stakes settings.
items.summary_zh: 缓慢呼吸技巧能调控大脑活动并影响风险偏好，可能通过自主神经与迷走神经通路实现。这一发现让人们相信简单的呼吸练习可在高压场景中调节情绪与决策。

items.title_en: I indexed 669 GB of my GoPro videos using my M1 Max computer and local ML models
items.title_zh: 我用 M1 Max 和本地 ML 模型对 669 GB 的 GoPro 视频进行索引
items.summary_en: A personal project indexing 669 GB of GoPro footage locally on an M1 Max using on-device ML, illustrating the viability of private, offline media indexing.
items.summary_zh: 作者在 M1 Max 上使用本地机器学习对 669 GB 的 GoPro 视频进行离线索引，展示私有化、离线处理的可行性。

items.title_en: Google Hits 50% IPv6
items.title_zh: 谷歌 IPv6 使用率达到了 50%
items.summary_en: Google now serves about half of its traffic over IPv6, marking a milestone in the long drive toward IPv6 ubiquity. This shift reduces reliance on IPv4 and suggests major networks and clients are ready for native IPv6, with implications for routing, edge services, and future protocol deployments.
items.summary_zh: Google 现在约有一半流量通过 IPv6 传输，标志着向 IPv6 普及的里程碑。这一转变表明主要网络与客户端已为原生 IPv6 做好准备，可能影响路由、边缘服务配置以及未来的协议部署。

items.title_en: The brain was not designed for this much bad news
items.title_zh: 大脑并非为如此大量的坏消息而设计
items.summary_en: Research shows constant exposure to alarming news can overwhelm attention and degrade mental health.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示持续暴露于让人不安的新闻会耗尽注意力并损害心理健康。文中讨论媒体摄取的影响，以及限制暴露、保护认知资源的实际策略。

items.title_en: My Homelab AI Dev Platform
items.title_zh: 我的自家实验室 AI 开发平台
items.summary_en: A home-lab enthusiast builds an AI development platform at home, sharing architecture, tooling, and workflows to run experiments privately. The project highlights how hobbyists can DIY scalable AI stacks with consumer hardware while maintaining control over data.
items.summary_zh: 作者在自家实验室搭建了一个 AI 开发平台，分享架构、工具链和私密实验工作流程，展示了普通硬件也能组装可扩展的 AI 栈并保持对数据的掌控。这个案例鼓励爱好者自行构建可重复、可控的 AI 环境。

items.title_en: Leaked financial docs show OpenAI is losing billions of dollars a year
items.title_zh: 泄露的财务文件显示 OpenAI 每年亏损数十亿美元
items.summary_en: Leaked financial documents reveal OpenAI is losing billions annually, underscoring the expense of scaling cutting-edge AI. The numbers highlight the tension between ambitious capabilities and profitability, likely forcing pricing, partnerships, or efficiency improvements. The situation emphasizes the need for a sustainable financial strategy in high-cost AI initiatives.
items.summary_zh: 泄露的财务文件显示 OpenAI 每年亏损数十亿美元，凸显扩展前沿 AI 成本之高。数字反映了愿景与盈利之间的张力，可能推动定价、合作与效率方面的调整。此事强调在高成本 AI 项目中建立可持续财政策略的必要性。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games fails to secure EU law despite 1.3M signatures
items.title_zh: Stop Killing Games 未能在欧盟通过立法，尽管获得130万签名
items.summary_en: Despite 1.3 million signatures backing a campaign, the effort to secure EU-wide legislation stalled, illustrating the gap between public petition volume and actual policy outcomes. The development sheds light on the EU's legislative process and the challenges of turning advocacy into law.
items.summary_zh: 尽管有130万签名支持，该倡议在欧盟层面推动立法的努力未能通过，显示公众请愿量并不直接等同于政策结果。此事揭示了欧盟立法过程的复杂性以及将公众倡议转化为法律的挑战。

items.title_en: Humiliating IIS servers for fun and jail time
items.title_zh: 为乐趣羞辱 IIS 服务器可能招致监禁
items.summary_en: A security researcher’s prank involving IIS servers leads to serious legal trouble, illustrating how seemingly harmless testing can cross legal boundaries. The case underscores the importance of responsible disclosure and obtaining explicit permission before probing systems.
items.summary_zh: 这起围绕 IIS 服务器的恶作剧案例揭示了看似无害的安全测试若未获授权就可能触及法律红线。强调了负责任披露与获得明确许可的重要性，以及合规测试的边界。

items.title_en: Even more batteries included with Emacs
items.title_zh: Emacs 内置功能再升级
items.summary_en: Emacs continues to expand its 'batteries-included' philosophy, adding more built-in capabilities and sensible defaults that reduce the amount of external configuration needed. The piece surveys recent enhancements, from packages to core improvements, and argues the editor remains a capable, self-contained platform for developers and writers.
items.summary_zh: Emacs 进一步扩展了“内置功能即服务”的理念，增加了更多内置能力和更合理的默认设置，减少外部配置的需求。文章梳理了最近的改进与核心提升，强调该编辑器仍是面向开发者与作者的强大、可自给自足的平台。

items.title_en: Copper transport drug restores memory and clears toxic Alzheimer's proteins
items.title_zh: 铜运输药物能恢复记忆并清除有毒的阿尔茨海默蛋白
items.summary_en: A copper-transport drug showing memory restoration and clearance of toxic Alzheimer's proteins in preclinical work points to a novel therapeutic angle. While early, the result underscores metal-homeostasis biology as a potential avenue for neurodegenerative treatment.
items.summary_zh: 早期研究显示一种铜运输药物在前瞻性实验中能恢复记忆并清除与阿尔茨海默相关的有毒蛋白，提示金属稳态在神经退行性疾病治疗中的潜在方向，尽管仍处于初步阶段。

items.title_en: Fox to buy Roku
items.title_zh: 福克斯拟收购罗克
items.summary_en: Fox's potential acquisition of Roku could reshape streaming distribution, advertising, and platform strategy. The deal would combine Fox's content with Roku's hardware and ad-tech reach, potentially accelerating consolidation in the streaming ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 若交易达成，福克斯收购罗克的举措可能重塑流媒体分发、广告与平台策略，将内容方与硬件、广告技术资源整合，或促成流媒体生态的进一步整合。

items.title_en: Developers don't understand CORS (2019)
items.title_zh: 开发者对 CORS 的误解（2019）
items.summary_en: CORS remains a frequent source of confusion for developers; the post clarifies how browsers enforce cross-origin requests and how servers should configure headers to enable safe access. Misconfigurations cause failed fetches and security risks; understanding CORS helps build robust APIs.
items.summary_zh: 开发者对 CORS 的误解常见；本文澄清浏览器如何强制跨域请求以及服务器应如何配置响应头以实现安全访问。常见的误配置导致请求失败和潜在的安全风险，理解 CORS 对构建健壮的 API 很有帮助。

items.title_en: Noam Shazeer Joins OpenAI
items.title_zh: Noam Shazeer 加入 OpenAI
items.summary_en: Noam Shazeer, a prominent figure in AI, has joined OpenAI, marking another high-profile talent move among leading research labs. The hire signals OpenAI's ongoing effort to attract top researchers to advance its language and AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 著名 AI 研究者 Noam Shazeer 加入 OpenAI，再次凸显顶尖实验室之间的人才竞逐。此举可能影响团队的研究方向与协作模式，也体现出对更强大语言模型的持续追求。

items.title_en: To study how chips work, MIT researchers built their own operating system
items.title_zh: 为研究芯片工作原理，MIT 研究者自建操作系统
items.summary_en: MIT researchers built a custom OS to observe how chips behave under controlled microarchitectural experiments, removing some vendor constraints. The project serves as a hands-on tool for hardware researchers to test hypotheses about instruction scheduling, caches, and I/O paths.
items.summary_zh: MIT 研究者为在受控条件下研究芯片微架构行为，自己从零搭建了一个操作系统，降低对厂商的依赖。该项目提供了一个直接的硬件研究工具，用于检验指令调度、缓存与 I/O 路径等假设。

items.title_en: Modos Color Monitor Pushes E-Paper Displays Further
items.title_zh: Modos 彩色显示器推动电子纸显示屏进一步发展
items.summary_en: Modos Color Monitor introduces a color e-paper display, pushing low-power, high-contrast visuals toward more practical use cases like dashboards and signage. The development widens the scope of e-paper beyond static text.
items.summary_zh: Modos 彩色显示器带来彩色电子纸，实现低功耗、对比度高的显示，拓展了在仪表板和标牌等场景的应用。电子纸的用途因此更加丰富。

items.title_en: Renting a sewing machine from the library
items.title_zh: 从图书馆租借缝纫机
items.summary_en: Finland libraries are experimenting with lending tools beyond books, including sewing machines, reflecting a shift toward practical, community-serving services. The program highlights how libraries can extend access to everyday equipment and reduce barriers to making.
items.summary_zh: 芬兰图书馆正在扩展借用物品的范围，包括缝纫机，体现图书馆向实用、社区服务型转变。此举显示图书馆如何提供日常用品的访问权，降低动手制造的门槛。

items.title_en: Hospitals and universities repurposing drugs at lower cost
items.title_zh: 医院与高校以约90%成本进行药物再利用
items.summary_en: Hospitals and universities are repurposing existing drugs to cut treatment costs by up to about 90%, enabling broader access and faster deployment of therapies. The approach raises regulatory and safety considerations, but could reshape drug affordability.
items.summary_zh: 医院与高校通过对现有药物进行再利用，治疗成本大幅下降，降幅可达约 90%，从而提升治疗可及性。该做法涉及监管与安全考量，但可能改变药物的可负担性。

items.title_en: Typst 0.15.0
items.title_zh: Typst 0.15.0 版本发布
items.summary_en: Typst 0.15.0 brings new features and fixes to this lightweight document typesetting system, enhancing typography controls and rendering performance. The update tightens alignment, fonts, and automation capabilities for writers.
items.summary_zh: Typst 0.15.0 带来新特性和修复，提升排版控制与渲染性能，改进对齐、字体和自动化能力，方便作者更高效地排版。

items.title_en: Salesforce to Acquire Fin (formerly Intercom) for $3.6B
items.title_zh: Salesforce 将以 36 亿美元收购 Fin（前 Intercom）
items.summary_en: Salesforce is acquiring Fin, a customer messaging platform formerly known as Intercom, for $3.6B, a move to deepen its customer engagement stack. The deal signals continued consolidation in CRM and AI-assisted support tools, potentially reshaping competition with Zendesk and other tools.
items.summary_zh: Salesforce 将以36亿美元收购 Fin（前 Intercom），以加强其客户参与工具组合。这笔交易标志着 CRM 与 AI 辅助支持工具领域的持续整合，未来可能对 Zendesk 等竞争对手构成压力。

items.title_en: Linux 7.1
items.title_zh: Linux 7.1
items.summary_en: Linux 7.1 release brings security fixes, stability improvements, and new hardware support.
items.summary_zh: Linux 7.1 发布，包含安全修复、稳定性改进以及对新硬件的支持。

items.title_en: Ten years of ClickHouse in open source
items.title_zh: ClickHouse 开源十年回顾
items.summary_en: A decade of open-source development has shaped ClickHouse into a high-performance, columnar analytics engine with a thriving community.
items.summary_zh: 十年的开源开发让 ClickHouse 成为高性能的列式分析引擎，并拥有活跃的社区。文章回顾了关键里程碑、治理演变，以及早期架构选择如何推动在各行业的广泛采用。

items.title_en: How we run Firecracker VMs inside EC2 and start browsers in less than 1s
items.title_zh: 在 EC2 内运行 Firecracker 虚拟机并让浏览器在 1 秒内启动
items.summary_en: AWS Firecracker microVMs run inside EC2 to boot browsers in sub-second time, enabling rapid automated testing and headless workflows. The approach highlights how lightweight virtualization can drastically cut cold-start latency for browser-based tasks.
items.summary_zh: 在 EC2 内使用 Firecracker 微型虚拟机实现子秒级的浏览器启动，显著提升自动化与无头测试的吞吐。此方案展示了轻量化虚拟化在降低冷启动延迟方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Why thinking out loud with someone beats thinking alone
items.title_zh: 为何与人边说边想比独自思考更有效
items.summary_en: Why thinking out loud with someone beats thinking alone. A piece on the value of collaborative dialogue, showing how it surfaces hidden assumptions and accelerates problem solving.
items.summary_zh: 为何与他人边说边想比独自思考更有效。文章指出对话能暴露隐私、拓展视角，并加速问题解决。

items.title_en: I Stored a Website in a Favicon
items.title_zh: 我把一个网站存进了 favicon
items.summary_en: An experimental piece shows you can encode a website's data into a favicon and retrieve it later. It probes the limits of favicon-based storage, browser caching, and decoding, turning a tiny image into a surprisingly capable data channel. Practical uses are limited, but the exercise yields lessons about data density, security, and edge-case behavior.
items.summary_zh: 作者通过把网站数据编码到 favicon 中并解码还原，展示了在极小的图标中也能承载大量信息的可能性。文章分析浏览器缓存、数据 URI 与解码的限制，以及这种非常规数据通道在实用性和安全性上的含义。

items.title_en: I Love the Computer
items.title_zh: 我爱电脑
items.summary_en: A personal meditation celebrating the beauty and power of computers, weaving hardware, software, and tinkering into a narrative about craft and curiosity. The piece resonates with engineers and hackers who still find joy in solving problems at the metal and code level, not just apps. It serves as a reminder that computing remains a hands-on pursuit with tangible feedback.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇个人随笔，赞美电脑的美与力量，讲述硬件、软件和动手改造如何汇聚成工艺与好奇心的故事。对于仍然沉浸于硬件与代码之解题乐趣的工程师与黑客，这篇文字有共鸣。它提醒人们，计算仍是一门需要动手实践、能获得直接反馈的领域。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What are you working on? (June 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在忙什么？（2026 年 6 月）
items.summary_en: A crowd-sourced prompt inviting readers to share what they’re building this month. The thread commonly reveals AI tooling, infrastructure tinkering, side projects, and notable open-source efforts.
items.summary_zh: 这是一次社区征集，邀请读者分享本月正在做的项目。讨论往往暴露出 AI 工具、基础设施尝试、个人项目以及值得关注的开源工作。

items.title_en: Correlated randomness in Slay the Spire 2
items.title_zh: Slay the Spire 2中的相关随机性设计
items.summary_en: Slay the Spire 2 adopts correlated randomness to balance player agency and fairness, ensuring strategic decisions matter while avoiding extreme luck twists. The design concept helps maintain challenge and variety as the game evolves.
items.summary_zh: 在Slay the Spire 2中实现相关随机性设计，以在玩法多样性和公平性之间取得平衡，确保玩家策略决策真正影响结果，同时避免运气极端波动。

items.title_en: VPN ban update for UK households as government looks at 'age-gate'
items.title_zh: 英国家庭VPN禁令更新：政府拟引入年龄门槛
items.summary_en: UK households could see new VPN restrictions as the government weighs an age-gate policy for online content. The plan would push providers and networks toward age-verification requirements, potentially limiting access for minors and tightening enforcement. It reflects ongoing debates about child safety, privacy, and circumvention tools in the UK.
items.summary_zh: 政府正在考虑一项年龄门槛政策，可能让英国家庭在部分在线内容上受限 VPN 的使用。该方案或促使服务商和网络运营商在年龄验证上加强要求，甚至在网路层面实施访问限制。这反映出英国在隐私、访问自由与未成年人保护之间的博弈。

items.title_en: A new bill takes aim at government pressure to silence lawful online speech
items.title_zh: 新法案瞄准政府压制合法在线言论
items.summary_en: The proposed bill would curb government pressure on platforms to remove lawful online speech, establishing clearer standards, transparency, and redress. It signals a legislative push to protect free expression online while still addressing harm online through targeted tools and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 新法案拟限制政府对平台施压，要求对合法在线言论的删除设定清晰标准并提高透明度和救济途径。此举旨在保护网络表达自由，同时为治理网络有害内容提供更有针对性的工具与问责机制。

items.title_en: Windows 11 New Media Player Uses 3.5x More RAM, Charges for Popular Video Codecs
items.title_zh: Windows 11 新媒体播放器占用更多 RAM，并对常用视频编解码器收费
items.summary_en: The Windows 11 Media Player reportedly uses 3.5x more RAM than its predecessor and imposes fees for widely used video codecs. The shift raises concerns about licensing costs and resource bloat in the OS’s built-in media stack, especially for low-end machines and media workflows.
items.summary_zh: Windows 11 新媒体播放器据称比前代占用多出约3.5倍的内存，并对常用视频编解码器收费。这引发关于编解码器授权成本及内置媒介堆栈资源占用的担忧，尤其对低配设备的性能与工作流影响更显著。

items.title_en: But yak shaving is fun (2019)
items.title_zh: 但修修补补也能很有趣
items.summary_en: Yak shaving—a sequence of small tasks before a larger goal—often gets a bad rap, but the piece argues it can be enjoyable and productive. It celebrates curiosity-driven incremental progress and how nailing small dependencies clears the path to bigger outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 修修补补这些看似琐碎的小任务，尽管被视为拖累，却也能带来乐趣和成就感。文章倡导好奇心驱动的渐进式进步，以及解决小依赖带来更大目标的路径。

items.title_en: SpaceX Is Buying Cursor
items.title_zh: SpaceX正在收购Cursor
items.summary_en: SpaceX confirms it is buying Cursor, a move that underscores growing convergence between space tech and AI software. The deal may unlock synergies in data handling, simulation, and autonomous systems across the company's lineup.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX确认正在收购Cursor，凸显太空技术与AI软件日益趋同。交易或将为数据处理、仿真与自动化系统带来协同效应。

items.title_en: Formal methods and the future of programming
items.title_zh: 形式化方法与编程的未来
items.summary_en: Discusses how formal methods influence programming practice, verification, and the future of software engineering, weighing rigor against practicality at scale.
items.summary_zh: 探讨形式化方法在编程实践、验证和软件工程未来中的作用，权衡严格性与实际可行性。

items.title_en: Google Chrome update will close the door on ad blockers
items.title_zh: 谷歌 Chrome 更新将关闭对广告拦截插件的支持
items.summary_en: Chrome's upcoming update tightens extension APIs, effectively phasing out most ad blockers by restricting how they can intercept or modify page content. The move could degrade ad-blocking effectiveness for users while developers adapt to new constraints.
items.summary_zh: Chrome的最新更新将收紧扩展API，通过限制插件拦截或修改网页内容的能力来削弱大多数广告拦截工具的效果，用户体验可能受影响，开发者需适应新约束。

items.title_en: Peopleless economy? Not technically impossible
items.title_zh: 无人经济？并非技术上不可能
items.summary_en: An essay argues that a 'peopleless' economy powered by automation and AI isn't technically impossible, though it would require radical shifts in productivity measurement, wealth distribution, and governance. It surveys practical challenges—from consumer demand to ownership models—and suggests policy levers to enable high-automation prosperity without sidelining society.
items.summary_zh: 一篇文章称由自动化和人工智能驱动的“无人经济”并非不可能，但需要在生产率衡量、财富分配和治理方面进行根本性转变。文中分析了从需求端到所有权模式等实际挑战，并提出在高自动化时代实现繁荣的政策杠杆。

items.title_en: SMPTE Makes Its Standards Freely Accessible
items.title_zh: SMPTE 将标准免费开放访问，面向全球媒体技术社区
items.summary_en: SMPTE has opened its standards library to the public, removing paywalls for its technical specs. The move should accelerate interoperability and innovation across media tech, from streaming pipelines to device certification. It lowers barriers for startups and researchers to build compliant products.
items.summary_zh: SMPTE 将其技术标准库向全球开放获取，技术规范不再设有付费门槛。此举将促进媒体技术领域的互操作性与创新，覆盖从流媒体管线到设备认证的各个环节。降低初创公司和研究人员打造合规产品的门槛。

items.title_en: I Could've Rickrolled the FIFA World Cup. All I Needed Was My ID
items.title_zh: 我几乎可以把 FIFA 世界杯变成 Rickroll 的。只需要我的 ID
items.summary_en: An ID-based vulnerability around a major sporting site allowed simple manipulation of content to surface a Rickroll, illustrating how predictable identifiers can enable unexpected redirects or access. The post underscores the risks of URL-level identifiers and highlights the need for robust authentication and access controls in large public-facing apps.
items.summary_zh: 仅凭一个 ID 就能在 FIFA 世界杯相关页面触发跳转到 Rickroll，暴露了基于 ID 的访问控制薄弱和可预测行为的风险。这说明在面向公众的应用中，需加强认证与访问控制，避免通过简单标识符被滥用。

items.title_en: Can you see three trees?
items.title_zh: 你能看到三棵树吗？
items.summary_en: This piece examines a visual puzzle that asks viewers to spot three trees, using it to explore perceptual biases and the limits of detection. It sheds light on how humans differ from AI vision systems in parsing ambiguous scenes, with implications for computer vision datasets and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个让人想看看是否能在图像中识别出三棵树的视觉谜题，揭示感知偏差与察觉极限。讨论人类视觉与人工智能在解析模糊场景方面的差异，以及这对计算机视觉数据集和评估的启示。

items.title_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP
items.title_zh: MCP 的零触控 OAuth
items.summary_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP introduces an enterprise-friendly OAuth flow that provisions tokens and apps with minimal human intervention. It emphasizes automated onboarding, device registration, and policy-driven access controls to reduce friction while preserving security. This approach helps large organizations deploy cloud-native apps faster without compromising governance.
items.summary_zh: 零触控 OAuth 为 MCP 提供面向企业的简化认证流程，尽量减少人工配置即可完成令牌和应用的注册。强调自动化的上线流程、设备注册与基于策略的访问控制，在降低运维成本的同时保持安全性。对于需要快速部署云原生应用的大型组织尤为重要。

items.title_en: Zen and the Art of Machine Learning Research
items.title_zh: 机器学习研究的禅意与艺术
items.summary_en: ML research benefits from simplicity, reproducibility, and deliberate iteration rather than hype. This piece argues for a mindful approach to experimentation, open data, and robust evaluation to advance reliable models.
items.summary_zh: 机器学习研究应追求简洁、可重复性与有目的的迭代，而非追逐热度。文章主张用心对待实验设计、开放数据与稳健评估，以推动更可靠的模型。

items.title_en: DOS Game "F-15 Strike Eagle II" reversing project needs DOS test pilots
items.title_zh: DOS 游戏 F-15 Strike Eagle II 的逆向工程项目正在招募 DOS 测试玩家
items.summary_en: A reversing project for the DOS game F-15 Strike Eagle II is seeking 'DOS test pilots' to run tests in DOS environments. The effort aims to preserve the game's behavior and game logic for preservation and historical study.
items.summary_zh: 这款 DOS 游戏 F-15 Strike Eagle II 的逆向工程项目正在招募‘DOS 测试员’，在 DOS 环境中进行测试以还原游戏行为与逻辑，用于保护与研究之用。

items.title_en: Linux eliminates the strncpy API after six years of work, 360 patches
items.title_zh: Linux 在六年工作、完成了 360 次补丁后淘汰 strncpy API
items.summary_en: Linux drops the deprecated strncpy API after years of work and hundreds of patches to reduce insecurity and improve safety, guiding developers toward safer alternatives and avoiding common bugs.
items.summary_zh: Linux 终结已废弃的 strncpy API，历时多年并合计数百次补丁以降低安全风险，推动开发者使用更安全的替代方案。

items.title_en: Hetzner increased dedicated server prices 3-4x
items.title_zh: Hetzner 将专用服务器价格上涨 3-4 倍
items.summary_en: Hetzner raised prices for dedicated servers by 3-4x, a move that could ripple through small businesses and hosting providers relying on its hardware. The jump underscores rising costs in data-center hardware and energy, potentially pushing users toward competitors or cloud options.
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 将专用服务器价格上涨 3-4 倍，这一举措可能波及依赖其硬件的小型企业和托管服务商。价格大幅跃升凸显数据中心硬件与能源成本上升，可能促使用户转向竞争对手或云服务。

items.title_en: Bitsy
items.title_zh: Bitsy
items.summary_en: Bitsy is a browser-based platform for making tiny, retro-style games.
items.summary_zh: Bitsy 是一个基于浏览器的平台，用于制作简易、复古风格的游戏。

items.title_en: A robot is sprinting towards you. Do you want it running on Claude or Grok?
items.title_zh: 一个机器人正向你冲来。要让它用 Claude 还是 Grok 驱动？
items.summary_en: It highlights how backend model choice shapes how a robot behaves in dynamic scenarios and under pressure. The takeaway is that model selection materially affects practical robotics performance.
items.summary_zh: 文章评估在实时机器人控制中使用 Claude 与 Grok 的差异，权衡延迟、安全性与决策质量。它强调后端模型的选择会直接影响机器人在动态场景中的表现与鲁棒性。核心结论是，模型选择会实质性地影响实际的机器人性能。

items.title_en: W Social, public institutions and the theater of European digital sovereignty
items.title_zh: W Social、公共机构与欧洲数字主权的舞台
items.summary_en: The piece argues that public institutions and platforms like W Social shape Europe’s digital sovereignty narrative, highlighting governance, data governance, and the performative politics around sovereignty. It critiques how rhetoric often masks underlying regulatory tensions.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨像 W Social 这样的平台与公共机构在欧洲数字主权话语中的角色，聚焦治理、数据主权以及主权话语背后的张力。作者指出表述往往掩盖了现实中的监管冲突与政治博弈。

items.title_en: What job interviews taught me about Kubernetes
items.title_zh: 工作面试教会我的 Kubernetes 实践
items.summary_en: The interviews reveal the real-world complexity of Kubernetes beyond buzzwords—things like RBAC, cluster ops, deployment pipelines, and observability. The author distills actionable lessons on what operators expect and how to present architectural thinking under pressure.
items.summary_zh: 工作面试暴露了 Kubernetes 的现实复杂性，如 RBAC、集群运维、部署流水线和可观测性等，远超宣传。文中提炼出合格运维需要的思维模型和在面试中呈现能力的要点。

items.title_en: Americans express unease over SpaceX's influence on retirement savings
items.title_zh: 美国民众对 SpaceX 对退休储蓄影响感到不安
items.summary_en: Public concern grows that SpaceX and its founder’s influence could shape retirement portfolios and market dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 公众越来越担心 SpaceX 及其创始人在退休储蓄投资中的影响力可能改变投资走向。文章指出集中投资的风险与在员工养老金和市场治理方面可能出现的权力不平衡。

items.title_en: GPT‑NL: a sovereign language model for the Netherlands
items.title_zh: GPT-NL：荷兰的自主语言模型
items.summary_en: Netherlands launches a sovereign language model project to reduce reliance on foreign AIs, safeguarding data sovereignty and tailoring capabilities to Dutch language and policy needs. The initiative involves government and industry collaboration to foster localization.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰推出自主语言模型项目，以降低对外部 AI 的依赖、保障数据主权，并针对荷兰语言与政策需求定制能力。该计划强调政府、研究机构和产业界的协作，以推动本地化。

items.title_en: Show HN: An 8-bit live gamecast for baseball
items.title_zh: Show HN：8 位风格的棒球直播
items.summary_en: An 8-bit style live gamecast for baseball is being shown. The project blends retro visuals with real-time play-by-play vibes, demonstrating how lightweight, browser-based gamecasts can deliver quick, accessible sports visuals without heavy infrastructure. It highlights indie experimentation at the intersection of sports and retro UI.
items.summary_zh: 一个 8 位风格的棒球现场直播被展示。该项目将复古视觉风格与实时解说风格结合，展示了轻量级的浏览器端游戏直播如何提供快速、可访问的体育视觉体验，适合小规模的独立实验。

items.title_en: Epoll vs. io_uring in Linux
items.title_zh: Linux 中的 Epoll 与 io_uring 对比
items.summary_en: A comparative look at epoll and io_uring on Linux, examining how traditional event-driven I/O (epoll) stacks up against the newer, coroutine-friendly io_uring interface.
items.summary_zh: 对 Linux 中的 Epoll 与 io_uring 进行对比，评估传统事件驱动 I/O（epoll）与新型、协程友好的 io_uring 的性能与复杂度。文章指出两者各自的适用场景和优势。

items.title_en: Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023)
items.title_zh: 让所有互联网流量强制 Real ID 的构想（2023）
items.summary_en: The piece critiques proposals to require Real ID for all internet traffic, arguing it would enable pervasive surveillance and infringe civil liberties while complicating technical implementation. It emphasizes the risk of chilling effects and overreach.
items.summary_zh: 批评将 Real ID 强制用于所有互联网流量的构想，认为这会带来广泛监控、侵害隐私并增加实施难度，同时可能产生寒蝉效应与过度集成。

items.title_en: MicroUI – A tiny, portable, immediate-mode UI library written in ANSI C
items.title_zh: MicroUI：用 ANSI C 编写的微型、便携即时模式 UI 库
items.summary_en: MicroUI is a tiny, portable immediate-mode UI library written in ANSI C. Its small footprint makes it attractive for embedded and cross-platform projects, and immediate-mode style can simplify rendering loops and minimize state management. It's a handy option for lightweight UI when dependencies matter.
items.summary_zh: MicroUI 是一个用 ANSI C 编写的微型、便携的即时模式 UI 库，体积极小、便于嵌入式和跨平台使用。即时模式的实现简化了渲染循环，降低了状态管理复杂性，适合对依赖要求很高的轻量 UI 场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: TownSquare, a tiny presence layer for websites
items.title_zh: Show HN：TownSquare——一个极简存在感层用于网站
items.summary_en: TownSquare is a tiny, lightweight presence layer for websites, designed to let visitors feel a site's community and activity without heavy components. It aims to be frictionless to deploy, enabling quick social presence cues for creators.
items.summary_zh: TownSquare 是一个极简、轻量级的网站存在感层，帮助访客感知站点的社区与活动，而不需要繁重的前端组件。目标是便于部署，为创作者提供快速的社交存在感信息。

items.title_en: Write for One Person
items.title_zh: 为一个人写作
items.summary_en: A zine-style comic argues writing for one reader can sharpen voice, clarity, and empathy by tailoring language, tone, and structure to a single audience. It offers practical examples and prompts to practice concise, intimate prose.
items.summary_zh: 一本漫画风格的专刊主张为单一读者而写能磨炼语气、表达清晰度与共情能力，强调用一个目标读者来定调语言、语气与结构。提供可操作的练习与示例，帮助练习简洁而贴近的写作。

items.title_en: Is AI ruining our skills? Early results are in – and they're not good
items.title_zh: AI 会毁掉我们的技能吗？早期结果显示不乐观
items.summary_en: Early studies summarized by Nature suggest AI assistance can erode core skills when used as a crutch, from arithmetic to writing and coding. The findings underline a trade-off between productivity and skill retention, urging new approaches to education and assessment in an AI-heavy era.
items.summary_zh: 早期研究表明，若过度依赖 AI 提供帮助，部分核心技能（如算术、写作、编程）可能退化。研究强调生产力与技能维持之间的权衡，促使教育与评估在 AI 化时代进行重新设计。

items.title_en: Lisp's Influence on Ruby
items.title_zh: Lisp 对 Ruby 的影响
items.summary_en: Explores how Lisp-inspired ideas shaped Ruby's flexibility, metaprogramming culture, and a penchant for DSLs, showing that Lisp’s legacy lives on in modern dynamic languages.
items.summary_zh: 本文解析 Lisp 传统中的理念如何影响 Ruby 的灵活性、元编程文化以及对领域特定语言的偏好，展示 Lisp 的遗产在现代动态语言中的延续。

items.title_en: The room the economy can't see
items.title_zh: 经济看不见的角落
items.summary_en: Explores parts of the economy that traditional metrics fail to capture, such as informal work and shadow activity, arguing for richer data to reveal the true economic landscape. It invites reconsideration of how we measure growth and well-being.
items.summary_zh: 讨论传统经济统计无法覆盖的领域，如非正式就业和影子经济，呼吁使用更丰富的数据来描绘真实的经济格局。文章促使人们重新思考经济增长与福利的衡量方式。

items.title_en: The founder's playbook: Building an AI-native startup
items.title_zh: 创始人手册：打造 AI 原生初创公司
items.summary_en: Outlines a founder's playbook for building an AI-native startup, focusing on data strategy, architecture, and rapid experimentation to leverage AI capabilities. It emphasizes platform thinking, strong ML workflows, and incentives aligned with AI-driven product velocity.
items.summary_zh: 概述打造 AI 原生初创公司的创始人手册，聚焦数据策略、架构设计以及以 AI 能力驱动的快速迭代。强调平台思维、高效的 ML 工作流，以及与 AI 驱动产品节奏相匹配的激励机制。

items.title_en: Game Engine White Papers: Commander Keen
items.title_zh: 游戏引擎白皮书：Commander Keen
items.summary_en: A set of white papers revisiting the Commander Keen engine, offering historical insight into early platformers' tech choices and how those decisions shaped modern game engines. The notes reveal timeless lessons on rendering, memory management, and toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 一组白皮书回顾 Commander Keen 引擎，揭示早期平台游戏在渲染、内存管理和工具链等方面的技术选择，以及这些决定如何影响现代游戏引擎的演进。

items.title_en: Show HN: Inkwash, a watercolor sketching app and explanation
items.title_zh: Show HN：Inkwash——一款水彩风格画图应用及其设计解读
items.summary_en: Inkwash is a watercolor sketching app with an explanatory write-up about its design. It moves toward a tactile, approachable drawing experience in digital form and shows how a focused app can balance simplicity with creative capability.
items.summary_zh: Inkwash 是一款水彩风格的绘画应用，并附有设计解读。它追求在数字环境中提供直观、质感丰富的绘画体验，展示了以简洁界面实现高创造力工具的可能性。

items.title_en: What was nice about the UI of Windows 2000
items.title_zh: Windows 2000 界面有哪些值得称道
items.summary_en: Windows 2000's UI is praised for its pragmatic clarity and consistency, which helped enterprise users work efficiently. The piece contrasts that era's restrained design with modern UI experiments, arguing that usability sometimes trumps novelty.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾 Windows 2000 的界面，称赞其清晰、稳定、风格统一，提升了企业用户的工作效率。与如今的设计趋势相比，这一代 UI 的可用性和一致性往往超过花哨的创新。

items.title_en: Temporary Cloudflare accounts for AI agents
items.title_zh: 为 AI 代理提供的临时 Cloudflare 账户
items.summary_en: Cloudflare introduces temporary accounts designed for AI agents, with time-limited lifespans and scoped permissions. The feature lowers setup friction for automated agents while preserving governance and security controls.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出临时账户，供 AI 代理使用，账户按时限和权限范围进行管理。此举降低了自动化接入门槛，同时保持治理与安全边界。

items.title_en: 15-minute at-home Lyme disease tick test
items.title_zh: 在家用 15 分钟的莱姆病蜱虫检测
items.summary_en: A 15-minute at-home test promises to help identify Lyme disease ticks, enabling rapid risk assessment without clinic visits. The development points to accessible, consumer-friendly approaches to vector-borne disease monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 一款 15 分钟的家用检测工具可帮助识别携带莱姆病蜱虫的风险，减少就诊负担。此类检测反映了向大众提供易用的向量传播疾病监测工具的趋势。

items.title_en: US battery manufacturing output continues to break records
items.title_zh: 美国电池制造产出持续刷新纪录
items.summary_en: US battery manufacturing output is hitting new records, driven by accelerating EV production and stationary storage demand. The surge signals a ramp-up of domestic gigafactories and supply-chain scale, with implications for jobs, prices, and national energy security. Continued capacity expansion will depend on critical materials, policy support, and industrial strategy.
items.summary_zh: 美国电池制造产出达到新高，受到电动车和储能需求快速增长的推动。产出激增反映了国内巨型工厂投资和供应链扩张的影响，涉及就业、成本和国家能源安全。未来产能的持续扩张将取决于关键材料、政策支持等因素。

items.title_en: The Birth and Death of JavaScript (2014)
items.title_zh: JavaScript 的诞生与消亡（2014）
items.summary_en: A retrospective talk tracing JavaScript's origins, design compromises, and how it evolved into a ubiquitous web language despite early flaws. It highlights the discipline of navigating language design trade-offs and the surprising longevity of a language born from constraints.
items.summary_zh: 这场回顾演讲梳理了 JavaScript 的起源、设计取舍，以及它如何在早期缺陷的背景下发展成无处不在的网页语言，凸显在语言设计取舍中的执着与长期生命力。

items.title_en: Storied Colors – A catalogue of named colors
items.title_zh: Storied Colors – 命名颜色大全
items.summary_en: Storied Colors curates an extensive catalogue of named colors with hex values and historical notes. For designers and UI developers, it’s a handy reference for palettes and accessible naming. It helps standardize color naming across teams and projects.
items.summary_zh: Storied Colors 汇集了大量带十六进制值与历史注释的命名颜色。对设计师和前端开发者而言，它是调色板和可访问命名的实用参考。它有助于在团队与项目之间统一颜色命名。

items.title_en: 'Ghost jobs' could soon be illegal in New York
items.title_zh: 纽约或将禁止幽灵岗位招聘
items.summary_en: New York is poised to ban ghost jobs—posting fake or misleading openings to harvest resumes or data. The policy could push recruiters toward authentic postings and improve labor-market transparency. It may force job boards to tighten listing integrity and protect jobseekers.
items.summary_zh: 纽约有望立法禁止虚假招聘信息，以打击欺骗性招聘并保护求职者。若落地，或促使招聘方发布真实岗位、提高信息质量，同时给招聘平台带来更严格的列表监管挑战。这也可能改变求职者的决策过程和对职业机会的信任。

items.title_en: UHF X11: X11 Built for VisionOS and Apple Vision Pro
items.title_zh: UHF X11：为 VisionOS 与 Apple Vision Pro 构建的 X11 实现
items.summary_en: UHF X11 is an X11 implementation built for VisionOS and Apple Vision Pro. It enables running X11 apps in a spatial AR/VR context, lowering the barrier to port legacy Linux/Unix software to immersive devices. This could broaden toolchains for developers targeting Vision Pro.
items.summary_zh: UHF X11 是为 VisionOS 与 Apple Vision Pro 构建的 X11 实现。它使在空间化的 AR/VR 场景中运行 X11 应用成为可能，降低了将遗留的 Linux/Unix 软件迁移到沉浸式设备的门槛，为开发者构建 Vision Pro 的工具链带来可能性。

items.title_en: Why I email complete strangers
items.title_zh: 为何给陌生人发邮件
items.summary_en: Outreach to strangers can unlock unexpected opportunities, insights, and collaborations that aren’t visible through typical networks. The piece argues for purposeful, respectful emailing and offers practical tips for proposing value, setting boundaries, and building genuine connections.
items.summary_zh: 主动给陌生人发邮件可以开启意想不到的机会、洞见与合作，这些往往在常规网络中难以发现。文章主张有目的、尊重的邮件沟通，并提供提出价值、设定边界与建立真诚人际关系的实用要点。

items.title_en: Leaked OpenAI financials show $38.5B loss and compute burn
items.title_zh: 泄露的 OpenAI 财务数据披露 385 亿美元亏损与算力消耗
items.summary_en: Leaked OpenAI financials reportedly show a massive loss and a heavy compute burn, illustrating the scale of investment required to train and operate leading AI models. The numbers fuel debates about profitability, funding, and the sustainability of aggressive compute growth. The leak sounds a warning about the economics of AI leadership.
items.summary_zh: 泄露的财务数据披露了 OpenAI 的巨额亏损与持续的算力烧钱，凸显维持领先地位所需的高昂投入。此类数字引发关于盈利能力、融资与大规模算力增长可持续性的讨论。

items.title_en: Wolfram Language and Mathematica version 15
items.title_zh: Wolfram Language 与 Mathematica 15：AI 助手、符号音乐等
items.summary_en: Wolfram Language and Mathematica 15 introduce a built-in AI assistant, expanded symbolic capabilities, and new features like symbolic music. The update aims to streamline computational workflows and broaden accessibility for researchers and students alike.
items.summary_zh: Wolfram Language 与 Mathematica 15 增添了内置 AI 助手、扩展的符号计算能力以及符号音乐等新功能，目标是简化计算工作流并提升研究者与学生的可及性。

items.title_en: SteamOS Linux 3.8 released as stable
items.title_zh: SteamOS 3.8 已稳定发布
items.summary_en: Stable release marks Steam Deck's software parity with Linux ecosystem; includes improvements to gaming compatibility, driver support, and performance. The update could impact indie devs and users relying on SteamOS for headless boxes.
items.summary_zh: SteamOS 3.8 正式稳定发布，为 Steam Deck 与兼容设备带来 Linux 调优、驱动与游戏兼容性的更新，标志着该平台在硬件支持方面的成熟。

items.title_en: How Madrid built its metro cheaply (2024)
items.title_zh: 马德里地铁如何以低成本建成（2024）
items.summary_en: A case study of Madrid's 2024 metro project explains how the city achieved lower costs through procurement choices, engineering simplifications, and efficient project management.
items.summary_zh: 马德里2024年地铁项目的案例研究，阐释了通过采购策略、工程简化和高效项目管理实现低成本的做法。文中给出面向大型城市基础设施的实用经验。

items.title_en: Stanford grads walk out on Google CEO Sundar Pichai speech
items.title_zh: 斯坦福毕业生在 Google CEO 皮查伊演讲中退场
items.summary_en: Stanford graduates walked out during Sundar Pichai's speech at Google. The protest highlights growing student activism around AI ethics, worker rights, and leadership direction in Silicon Valley.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福毕业生在谷歌 CEO Sundar Pichai 的演讲中集体离场。抗议凸显了硅谷日益活跃的学生行动，聚焦于 AI 伦理、员工权利和领导方向。

items.title_en: Hey, n00b, we didn't hire you to complete tasks
items.title_zh: 嘿，新手，我们不是让你把任务全做完的
items.summary_en: A pragmatic note arguing against overloading junior developers with every task, stresses mentorship, sustainable pace, and healthy delegation. It advocates balancing hands-on work with learning and collaboration to maintain quality.
items.summary_zh: 这篇简讯反对把每一项任务都推给新手，主张通过指导、合理分工和可持续的工作节奏来提高团队效率。强调团队应在动手编码与共同协作之间取得平衡，以维持代码质量与学习成长。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle - Daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle - 每日拼图游戏，你重新绘制选区
items.summary_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle is a daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts, combining map geometry with strategic play. It’s a playful exploration of political geography and algorithmic design.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle 是一款每日拼图游戏，让你重新绘制选区，结合地图几何与策略玩法。它以有趣的方式展现了政治地理与算法设计。

items.title_en: Dutch Railways offers unlimited off-peak train travel nationwide for €49/month
items.title_zh: 荷兰铁路推出49欧/月的全国非高峰期无限乘车
items.summary_en: Nederland's NS unveils a nationwide off-peak unlimited travel pass for 49 euros per month. The plan aims to shift commuting and travel patterns toward off-peak times, potentially easing congestion and boosting productivity, while impacting fare structures.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰国家铁路宣布推出全国范围的非高峰期无限乘车月票，价格为49欧元。此举旨在引导公众将出行转向非高峰时段，可能缓解高峰拥堵、提升工作效率，同时对铁路票价结构产生影响。

items.title_en: Loreline – Tools for writing interactive fiction
items.title_zh: Loreline – 用于创作互动小说的工具
items.summary_en: Loreline provides tools to author interactive fiction, including branching narratives, worldbuilding, and AI-assisted drafting. It lowers the barrier to crafting non-linear stories and could accelerate indie storytelling or game development. The takeaway: better tooling for interactive narratives can unlock more creative storytelling.
items.summary_zh: Loreline 提供创作互动小说的工具，涵盖分支叙事、世界观构建以及 AI 辅助写作。它降低了非线性故事创作的门槛，或加速独立作者和游戏开发的流程。核心点在于更强的互动叙事工具能释放更多创意。

items.title_en: Show HN: StartupWiki – A Free Alternative to Crunchbase
items.title_zh: StartupWiki：Crunchbase 的免费替代品
items.summary_en: StartupWiki offers a free, community-maintained alternative to Crunchbase for startup data. By lowering access costs and potentially opening data, it could democratize startup intelligence, though data quality and coverage may vary.
items.summary_zh: StartupWiki 提供一个免费、由社区维护的创业公司数据替代 Crunchbase 的方案。降低获取成本、可能开放数据，有望让创业情报更具普及性，但数据质量与覆盖范围可能参差。

items.title_en: Openrouter Fusion API
items.title_zh: Openrouter 融合 API
items.summary_en: Openrouter releases a Fusion API to orchestrate multiple models and tools in a single, cohesive interface, simplifying multi-model prompts and data routing. This lowers integration friction for developers building AI-powered apps that need to combine strengths of different systems.
items.summary_zh: Openrouter 发布了融合 API，用于在一个统一接口内编排多种模型和工具，简化多模型提示和数据路由。此举降低了将多种系统组合在一起构建 AI 应用的集成难度。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Safety Superpower
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的安全护城河
items.summary_en: Anthropic bets big on safety as a product differentiator, building guardrails, red-teaming, and policy frameworks into its AI stack. The argument is that safety-focused design may become a sustainable moat as models scale and policy risk increases; enterprises will pay a premium for reliability and governance.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 将安全性作为产品核心差异化，嵌入模型体系的守护机制、对抗性测试和治理框架。随着模型规模扩大和政策风险上升，安全设计可能成为企业愿意为之付费的护城河，优先考虑可靠性与治理。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Happy Fathers Day
items.title_zh: 致 HN：父亲节快乐
items.summary_en: A lighthearted Father's Day greeting on Hacker News, sharing warmth from the tech community. A reminder that the community values both technical rigor and human connection.
items.summary_zh: 在 Hacker News 上送出父亲节的轻松祝福，传递科技社区的温情。提醒人们，这个社区在技术专注之外也重视人际连接。

items.title_en: Improvement in advanced Alzheimer’s disease following high-dose psilocybin
items.title_zh: 高剂量 psilocybin 改善晚期阿尔茨海默病
items.summary_en: A neuroscience study reports improved symptoms in advanced Alzheimer's after high-dose psilocybin, contributing to the emerging research on psychedelics for neurodegenerative diseases.
items.summary_zh: 一项神经科学研究报告称，在高剂量的 psilocybin 治疗后，晚期阿尔茨海默病患者的症状有所改善，为迷幻药在神经退行性疾病治疗领域的研究提供新证据。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) – Open-Source AI CAD
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Adam（YC W25）——开源 AI CAD
items.summary_en: Adam is an open-source AI-powered CAD tool from YC's W25 batch. It aims to bring AI-assisted design into standard CAD workflows, with transparency and community governance through open source. This could accelerate feature development and lower the bar for researchers and hobbyists to experiment with AI in design.
items.summary_zh: Adam 是 YC W25 阵营推出的开源 AI CAD 工具，意在把 AI 辅助设计引入常用 CAD 工作流。开源带来的透明性与社区治理可能加速功能迭代，降低研究者和爱好者在设计中尝试 AI 的门槛。

items.title_en: When I reject AI code even if it works
items.title_zh: 即使 AI 代码能工作，我也拒绝使用
items.summary_en: The author argues for rejecting AI-generated code even when it appears to work, citing concerns about reliability, maintainability, and hidden biases. It challenges the tendency to overtrust automated code in production.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张即使 AI 生成的代码能工作，也应拒绝采用，原因包括可靠性、可维护性以及隐藏偏见。该观点挑战了在生产环境中过度信任自动化代码的倾向。

items.title_en: Amazon drops Sam Altman movie after announcing OpenAI partnership
items.title_zh: 亚马逊在宣布与 OpenAI 合作后撤下山姆·奥特曼传记片
