items.summary_en: Amazon reportedly scrapped a Sam Altman biopic after disclosing a partnership with OpenAI. The move underscores how corporate AI alliances can influence media projects and storytelling strategies in the AI era.
items.summary_zh: 据称，亚马逊在公布与 OpenAI 的合作后取消了山姆·奥特曼传记片，凸显 AI 行业联盟对媒体项目的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Qwen-Robot Suite: A Foundation Model Suite for Physical World Intelligence
items.title_zh: Qwen-Robot 套件：面向物理世界智能的基础模型集合
items.summary_en: Qwen releases a foundation-model suite tailored for embodied and physical-world tasks, covering perception, manipulation, and control components. The suite aims to accelerate robotics research with standardized models and benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: Qwen 推出面向具身机器人任务的基础模型套件，涵盖感知、操控与控制等组件。该套件为研究者提供标准化模型和基准，加速机器人领域的研究。

items.title_en: Running MicroVMs in Proxmox VE, the Easy Way
items.title_zh: 在 Proxmox VE 中用简单方法运行 MicroVMs
items.summary_en: Proxmox VE now offers a straightforward path to deploy lightweight microVMs, enabling fast startup and strong isolation for microservices and test workloads. The approach lowers the barrier to experimenting with microVMs in a familiar virtualization environment.
items.summary_zh: Proxmox VE 现在提供在同一环境中部署轻量级 MicroVM 的简易路径，带来快速启动和强隔离，适合微服务和测试负载。该方法降低了在熟悉的虚拟化环境中尝试 MicroVM 的门槛。

items.title_en: Swiss voters reject proposal to cap population at ten million
items.title_zh: 瑞士选民否决将人口上限设为一千万的提案
items.summary_en: Swiss voters rejected a proposal to cap the population at ten million, illustrating limits of regulation aimed at growth control. The decision affects long-term planning, immigration policy, and sustainability debates in a small, wealthy democracy.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士选民否决将人口上限设为一千万的提案，揭示了以增长控制为目标的法规的局限性。此举将影响这座小而富裕民主国家的长期规划、移民政策和可持续性辩论。

items.title_en: Ice water drowning survival of young patient (2025)
items.title_zh: 冰水溺水后年轻患者存活病例（2025）
items.summary_en: A case report documents a young patient who survived drowning after ice-water immersion with a favorable neurological outcome. It reinforces that cold exposure can extend the window for resuscitation and underscores the importance of rapid CPR and high-quality post-resuscitation care.
items.summary_zh: 本病例报道记录了一名年轻溺水者在冰水中生还并获得良好神经功能结果。研究强调寒冷水体的保护性影响可能延长复苏窗口，并凸显快速高质量 CPR 与事后护理的重要性。

items.title_en: Gribouille 0.3.0: A Grammar of Graphics for Typst
items.title_zh: Gribouille 0.3.0：Typst 的图形语法
items.summary_en: Gribouille 0.3.0 adds a grammar-of-graphics approach to Typst, enabling declarative plotting inside documents. This expands Typst’s data visualization capabilities and makes it easier to produce consistent charts alongside text.
items.summary_zh: Gribouille 0.3.0 为 Typst 引入图形语法，允许在文档中以声明式方式绘制图表。此举拓展了 Typst 的可视化能力，便于在文本中直接生成一致的图形。

items.title_en: Pre-2022 Books
items.title_zh: 2022 年之前的书籍
items.summary_en: A curated roundup of notable books published before 2022, with brief takes.
items.summary_zh: 精选汇集2022年之前的重要书籍，并附有简短评述。

items.title_en: Pac-Man, but you're the ghost
items.title_zh: 吃豆人：你来扮演鬼魂
items.summary_en: Reimagines Pac-Man by letting players control the pursuing ghost, flipping the usual chase dynamics. It highlights how changing the player's role can illuminate core tropes of classic arcade design.
items.summary_zh: 把吃豆人游戏反向设定成玩家扮演追逐者的幽灵，颠覆了传统的追逐规则。介绍了新的机制、关卡设计，以及这一改动对策略和跑分潜力的影响。通过改变玩家角色来揭示经典街机设计的核心要素。

items.title_en: Image Compression
items.title_zh: 图像压缩
items.summary_en: A discussion of image compression techniques from basics to modern perceptual coding, outlining tradeoffs between lossless and lossy approaches and how compression affects bandwidth, storage, and image quality.
items.summary_zh: 图像压缩概述了从基础方法到现代感知编码的技术，阐述了无损与有损之间的权衡，以及压缩对带宽、存储和图像质量的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: High-Res Neural Cellular Automata
items.title_zh: Show HN：高分辨率神经元胞自动机
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces a high-resolution neural cellular automata project that generates textures and images efficiently. The approach promises scalable, fast generative content suitable for graphics, simulations, and tooling. It signals a direction for fast, data-light content creation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个高分辨率的神经元胞自动机项目，能够高效生成纹理和图像。这种方法具备可扩展、低数据需求的产出能力，适用于图形、仿真和工具开发，指向快速生成内容的方向。

items.title_en: Caddy compatibility for zeroserve: 3x throughput and 70% lower latency
items.title_zh: Caddy 与 zeroserve 的兼容性提升：吞吐量提升三倍、延迟降低 70%
items.summary_en: Claims a compatibility setup where Caddy enables zeroserve to achieve roughly 3x throughput and 70% lower latency, with notes on how to configure and optimize.
items.summary_zh: 文中描述了 Caddy 与 zeroserve 搭配时带来的性能提升，吞吐量提升约 3 倍、延迟降低约 70%，并给出相关配置要点。

items.title_en: LLMs Are Complicated Now
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型现在更复杂了
items.summary_en: Large language models are no longer stand-alone engines; they sit inside broader toolchains with multiple models and plugins. This complexity raises new challenges in safety, evaluation, latency, and cost. Builders must rethink pipelines, guardrails, and monitoring to ship reliable AI products.
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型已不再是孤立的引擎，而是嵌入到包含多个模型和插件的更大工具链中。这种复杂性带来安全、评估、延迟和成本的新挑战。开发者需要重新设计流水线、风险防控和监控，才能发布可靠的 AI 产品。

items.title_en: Taxonomy of the Occlupanida (parasitoids on bread bag tags)
items.title_zh: Occlupanida 的分类学——面包袋标签上的寄生生物群
items.summary_en: Delves into the taxonomy of Occlupanida, a group associated with bread bag tags, highlighting how researchers classify obscure microfauna. The write-up shows how a rigorous taxonomy can reveal evolutionary relationships even for seemingly minor organisms.
items.summary_zh: 解析 Occlupanida 的分类学，这一与面包袋标签相关的微小生物群体被系统地归类。文章展示了，即便是微小生物也能通过严格的分类学揭示进化关系与生态地位。

items.title_en: Clojure Hosted on Go
items.title_zh: Go 上托管的 Clojure
items.summary_en: A project to host Clojure on the Go runtime demonstrates cross-language interoperability and potential performance trade-offs. It shows how language ecosystems can migrate or interoperate to leverage different runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 一个在 Go 运行时上托管 Clojure 的项目，展示跨语言互操作性和潜在的性能取舍，体现语言生态可以通过迁移或互操作来利用不同的运行时。

items.title_en: Did Anthropic ask for this?
items.title_zh: Anthropic 这事儿是谁主动提的？
items.summary_en: A provocative piece questions whether Anthropic's safety approach might invite unintended consequences or regulatory backlash.
items.summary_zh: 一篇挑衅性的文章质疑 Anthropic 的安全策略是否可能引发意外后果或监管风波。

items.title_en: Unauthorized alert sent to cell phones across Brazil
items.title_zh: 横跨巴西的未授权警报
items.summary_en: A security incident where an alert broadcast across Brazil was unauthorized, exposing weaknesses in national notification infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 巴西全国范围的未授权警报暴露了国家通知基础设施的薄弱环节。攻击者可能滥用警报通道，凸显对认证、速率限制和多渠道校验的需求，以及对相关系统的改进点。

items.title_en: Claude: Elevated errors across many models [resolved]
items.title_zh: Claude 多模型高错误率问题已解决
items.summary_en: A maintenance incident caused elevated errors across Claude models, briefly disrupting outputs. Engineers have deployed a fix and restored normal service. The episode demonstrates the fragility of AI infrastructure and the importance of robust monitoring and rollback plans.
items.summary_zh: 最近的故障事件导致多款 Claude 模型出现较高错误率，影响输出。相关团队已修复并恢复稳定服务。这一事件凸显了 AI 服务稳定性的重要性及对持续监控的需求。

items.title_en: Turns Out, There Is a Cabal of Elite Crazies Trying to Control the World
items.title_zh: 原来存在一群试图控制世界的精英疯子/势力
items.summary_en: Investigative reporting details a covert circle of tech elites, including Peter Thiel's Dialog Club, alleged to push policy and influence media behind the scenes. The report argues such informal networks can shape global affairs with limited transparency and oversight. For technologists, it underscores why governance and accountability in elite circles matter.
items.summary_zh: 调查报道揭露了一群包括彼得·蒂尔对话会在内的科技精英构成的隐秘圈子，据称通过私下运作影响政策与媒体。该机构化的影响网络缺乏透明度和外部监督，可能左右全球事务。对于技术从业者，这提醒我们必须关注精英圈层的治理与问责。

items.title_en: How Alberta Eradicated Rats
items.title_zh: 阿尔伯塔省如何根除老鼠
items.summary_en: Alberta's war on rats outlines a comprehensive program blending pest control, public health measures, and community engagement to reduce rodent populations. The piece offers lessons for urban wildlife management.
items.summary_zh: 阿尔伯塔省的清除老鼠行动整合了害虫控制、公共卫生与社区参与等措施，显著降低了鼠群规模，为城市野生动物管理提供了经验。

items.title_en: I've always wondered if anyone used sharing buttons on news sites and blogs
items.title_zh: 我一直在想，新闻站点和博客上的分享按钮到底有多少人会点击
items.summary_en: Sharing buttons on news sites attract little engagement and may be more noise than signal. The piece argues publishers should rethink or remove them to declutter UI and focus on meaningful engagement metrics. It invites a broader look at how social signals influence reader behavior.
items.summary_zh: 新闻网站和博客的分享按钮几乎没有人点击，属于低信号的界面元素。建议发布者重新思考是否保留或改造按钮，以提升用户体验并将关注点放在更具实效的互动上。

items.title_en: I hacked into the worst e-bike and fixed it [video]
items.title_zh: 我入侵了最糟糕的电动自行车并修好了它【视频】
items.summary_en: A video documents a hands-on hack of a notoriously unreliable e-bike, where the creator analyzes the firmware, identifies a flaw, and patches a fix to improve reliability and safety. The takeaway is how low-level tinkering and open hardware knowledge can turn an underperforming device into something usable, highlighting the value of firmware transparency and repair culture.
items.summary_zh: 一个视频展示对一辆最差的电动自行车进行返修：分析固件、定位缺陷并实施修补，使其变得更可靠和安全。此事强调了底层动手改装、开放硬件知识在提升设备可用性与修复文化方面的作用。

items.title_en: Teenagers Stayed Overnight at Their School and Found Hidden Ancient Roman Ruins
items.title_zh: 在学校过夜的青少年发现隐藏的古罗马遗址
items.summary_en: Overnighting at their Italian school, teenagers discover hidden ancient Roman ruins in a basement, a serendipitous archaeological find. The story highlights how curious students can uncover surprising history in everyday spaces.
items.summary_zh: 在意大利一所学校过夜时，青少年在地下室发现隐藏的古罗马遗址，成为一次意外的考古发现。报道强调好奇心驱使下，日常空间也可能揭示意想不到的历史。

items.title_en: The ability to regrow body parts is dormant in mammals, not lost
items.title_zh: 哺乳动物的再生能力其实是潜在的，并非已消失
items.summary_en: New findings show mammals possess latent regenerative potential across various tissues, not a complete loss of ability. By decoding the signals that awaken this dormant capacity, scientists hope to improve wound healing and regenerative medicine.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究表明哺乳动物在多种组织中仍然保留潜在的再生能力，并非完全失去。通过解码唤醒这一潜在能力的信号，科学家或将推动创伤修复和再生医学的发展。

items.title_en: Anthropic employees accuse Trump administration of targeting them
items.title_zh: Anthropic 员工指控特朗普政府针对他们
items.summary_en: Anthropic employees allege targeted government scrutiny under the Trump administration, potentially chilling AI safety research and raising concerns about political interference. The report underscores how regulatory pressure can interact with cutting-edge tech work.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 员工指控特朗普政府对公司研究人员进行针对性打压，可能影响 AI 安全研究的独立性并引发监管干预的担忧。报道凸显了监管压力对前沿科技工作的潜在影响。

items.title_en: How Japan's railways stayed one while splitting apart
items.title_zh: 日本铁路在分拆中如何保持统一
items.summary_en: An exploration of how Japan's railways preserved a unified national identity despite privatization into independent JR companies. The article delves into branding choices, logo consistency, and cross-network coordination that kept the system feeling cohesive.
items.summary_zh: 探讨日本铁路在分拆成多家独立公司后，如何保持统一的国家形象。文章聚焦品牌策略、标志的一致性，以及跨网络协作，维持系统的连贯感。

items.title_en: The only scalable delete in Postgres is DROP TABLE
items.title_zh: Postgres 中唯一可扩展的删除操作是 DROP TABLE
items.summary_en: Argues that deleting vast amounts of data in Postgres scales best with dropping tables rather than row-level DELETEs; discusses implications for archival strategies and schema design.
items.summary_zh: 指出在 Postgres 中，海量数据的删除最具可扩展性的做法是 DROP TABLE，而非逐行 DELETE；并探讨归档与模式设计的影响。

items.title_en: Satellite reveals immense scale of GPS signal tampering
items.title_zh: 卫星揭示 GPS 信号篡改的惊人规模
items.summary_en: A satellite-based analysis shows GPS signal tampering at a much larger scale than previously thought, raising concerns about navigation integrity for aviation, maritime, and mobile devices. The piece underscores the need for robust PNT (positioning, navigation, timing) and potential encrypted alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 卫星数据揭示 GPS 信号篡改的规模远超先前认知，威胁航空、海上导航与日常设备的定位准确性。强调需要更具鲁棒性的定位导航时钟系统，并探讨替代方案或加密信号的可行性。

items.title_en: The Manhoff Archives: Color photos of Stalin-era USSR taken by a US diplomat
items.title_zh: 曼霍夫档案：美国外交官拍摄的斯大林时期苏联彩色照片
items.summary_en: The Manhoff Archives release color photos from a US diplomat in Stalin-era USSR, offering rare visuals of daily life, infrastructure, and political atmosphere under total surveillance. The collection enriches historical perspective on Cold War-era diplomacy.
items.summary_zh: 曼霍夫档案公布了美国外交官在斯大林时期苏联拍摄的彩色照片，罕见地呈现日常生活、基础设施与高度监控下的政治氛围，为冷战时期的外交语境提供新维度。

items.title_en: Data Compression Explained (2012)
items.title_zh: 数据压缩解释（2012）
items.summary_en: This classic explainer distills core ideas in data compression: entropy, coding, and models, with approachable examples. It contrasts practical algorithms like LZ and arithmetic coding and discusses the trade-offs between compression ratio, speed, and memory usage. The piece helps readers appreciate why compression remains a balance between theory and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 这篇经典文章梳理了数据压缩的核心原理，包括熵、编码方案和统计模型，并通过直观示例帮助读者理解。它对比了常用算法如 LZ 与算术编码，并讨论了压缩比、速度与内存开销之间的权衡，揭示了压缩领域的挑战与魅力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Trace – Offline Mac meeting transcripts you can flag mid-call
items.title_zh: Trace – 离线 Mac 会议记录，可在通话中标记要点
items.summary_en: Trace is a Mac app that records and transcribes meetings offline, with an in-call flagging feature to mark important moments for later review. This offline-first approach reduces data exposure and enables fast, local search without cloud processing—useful for privacy-conscious teams.
items.summary_zh: Trace 是一款在 Mac 上离线记录并转写会议的应用，通话中就可标记关键时刻便于日后回顾。离线优先的设计降低数据暴露风险，并支持本地快速搜索，适合注重隐私的团队。

items.title_en: Big Banana Car
items.title_zh: 大香蕉车
items.summary_en: Showcases a whimsical 'Big Banana Car' project, merging art car culture with design experimentation. It demonstrates how playful builds can spark conversation about vehicle customization.
items.summary_zh: 展示了“Big Banana Car”的玩趣项目，将艺术车文化与设计实验相结合，展示了富有趣味的定制车如何激发关于车辆改造的讨论。

items.title_en: Wages in America Are Too Low for the 30% Rule to Work for Renters Anymore
items.title_zh: 美国工资太低，30% 租房规则再也无力实现
items.summary_en: Argues that current wages in America are insufficient for renters once the 30% housing-cost guideline is considered, given rising rents and slow wage growth.
items.summary_zh: 随着租金上涨和工资增速放缓，30% 的租房规则在美国已不再适用。文中讨论对家庭、政策及市场的影响。

items.title_en: 10Gb/s Ethernet: switching to a Broadcom SFP+ module
items.title_zh: 10 Gb/s 以太网：切换至 Broadcom SFP+ 模块
items.summary_en: Upgrading to a Broadcom SFP+ module enables 10Gbps Ethernet, with tradeoffs around compatibility, DAC/AOC cabling, and driver support. The note walks through practical considerations for scaling network throughput in labs or data centers.
items.summary_zh: 切换至 Broadcom SFP+ 模块即可实现 10Gbps 以太网，需权衡兼容性、DAC/AOC 线缆以及驱动支持等因素，文中给出在实验室或数据中心提升网络吞吐的实操要点。

items.title_en: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot has died in a plane crash
items.title_zh: 育碧联合创始人克洛德·吉耶莫在飞机失事中去世
items.summary_en: Claude Guillemot, a co-founder of Ubisoft, died in a plane crash, marking a significant loss for the studio and the broader European gaming community. His passing is a notable moment for the industry’s leadership and historical trajectory.
items.summary_zh: 育碧联合创始人克洛德·吉耶莫在飞机失事中去世。此事对公司及更广泛的欧洲游戏社区都是重大损失，也影响着行业的领袖地位与历史走向。

items.title_en: Building a robotics research setup that lives next to my desk
items.title_zh: 放在桌边的机器人研究系统
items.summary_en: A compact robotics research setup sits near the author’s desk, emphasizing modular hardware and accessible control software for rapid experimentation. The setup illustrates how small, affordable rigs can accelerate learning and prototype iteration in robotics research.
items.summary_zh: 桌边的小型机器人研究系统强调模块化硬件和易用的控制软件，便于快速进行实验与迭代。此类桌旁工作流展示了在机器人研究中，用低成本设备加速学习与原型开发的可行性。

items.title_en: Building reliable agentic AI systems
items.title_zh: 构建可靠的代理型 AI 系统
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler lays out architectural patterns for reliable agentic AI systems, stressing audits, containment, and composable components to keep AI behavior predictable. The piece argues for robust testing and governance to avert brittle systems as AI agents take more initiative.
items.summary_zh: Fowler 提出面向可控、可审计的代理型 AI 系统的架构模式，强调可 containment、可组合组件，以及对 AI 行为进行可预测性设计。文章主张通过严格测试与治理来在 AI 代理主动性提升时避免脆弱系统。

items.title_en: Getting Creative with Perlin Noise Fields
items.title_zh: 用 Perlin 噪声场实现创意效果
items.summary_en: Explores inventive uses of Perlin noise fields for procedural visuals and simulations. The piece dives into layering noise, vector fields, and dynamic mappings to generate organic textures and complex patterns that are cheap to compute.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍在 Perlin 噪声场上的创新用法，聚焦于在程序化视觉和模拟中的应用。通过叠加不同尺度的噪声、构造向量场以及动态映射，实现有机纹理和丰富的运动模式，提升视觉质感且计算成本低。

items.title_en: John Jumper to join Anthropic
items.title_zh: John Jumper 将加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: John Jumper joins Anthropic, signaling a boost in AI safety talent and expertise at the startup. The move could influence research directions and safety culture.
items.summary_zh: John Jumper 将加入 Anthropic，标志着该初创公司在 AI 安全领域的人才与专长的增强，可能影响研究方向与安全文化。

items.title_en: How TimescaleDB compresses time-series data
items.title_zh: TimescaleDB 如何压缩时序数据
items.summary_en: TimescaleDB compresses time-series data by applying columnar encoding, chunking, and selective compression policies to reduce storage without sacrificing query performance. The approach helps scale IoT and monitoring workloads, often dramatically lowering costs.
items.summary_zh: TimescaleDB 通过列式编码、分块和有选择的压缩策略来降低时序数据的存储需求，同时尽量保持查询性能。此做法有助于扩展物联网与监控场景的负载，通常显著降低成本。

items.title_en: Notes from tired Egyptian whose job is explaining that humans built the pyramids
items.title_zh: 疲惫的埃及人：解释人类建造金字塔的工作笔记
items.summary_en: A satirical MCSweeneys piece riffing on the job of explaining that humans built the pyramids, poking fun at experts who explain obvious things and the absurdity of bureaucratic yet earnest explanations.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 MCSweeneys 的讽刺短文以“有人需要解释人类确实建造了金字塔”为梗，讽刺那些解释显而易见事实的专家，以及官僚式又认真的解释风格。

items.title_en: I hate compilers
items.title_zh: 我讨厌编译器
items.summary_en: Explores why the author dislikes traditional compilers and the friction around vendoring WebAssembly binaries, highlighting pain points in building and distributing low-level software.
items.summary_zh: 讨论作者为何不喜欢编译器，以及在为 WebAssembly 二进制包进行 vendoring 时遇到的痛点，聚焦底层软件构建与分发的挑战。

items.title_en: Subterranean fungi networks more than 100 quadrillion km in length
items.title_zh: 地下真菌网络长度超过10^17公里
items.summary_en: A new study maps an immense subterranean fungal network that connects trees across ecosystems, enabling nutrient exchange and signaling beyond visible roots. The findings highlight fungi’s pivotal role in forest health, carbon cycling, and ecological resilience.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究绘制出巨量的地下真菌网络，连接不同生态系统中的树木，促进养分交换与信号传递，超越地上根系的影响。结果凸显真菌在森林健康、碳循环与生态韧性中的关键作用。

items.title_en: The 100k whys of AI
items.title_zh: AI 的十万个为什么
items.summary_en: The essay surveys big questions about AI, from capabilities and data use to alignment, safety, and societal impact. It blends practical warnings with curiosity-driven questions, urging readers to think critically about AI deployment and governance.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了关于 AI 的一系列核心问题，包括能力、数据使用、对齐、安全与社会影响。它在提供务实警示的同时提出大量探索性问题，鼓励读者对 AI 的落地应用与治理保持批判性思维。

items.title_en: Let's Encrypt had a higher error rate for 90 minutes today
items.title_zh: Let's Encrypt 今日出现约90分钟的高错误率
items.summary_en: Let's Encrypt logged a 90-minute window of elevated error rates, potentially affecting certificate issuance and renewals for many sites. The incident highlights the fragility of critical PKI services and the importance of robust failover and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: Let's Encrypt 出现约 90 分钟的错误高峰，可能影响网站的证书颁发与续期。事件揭示关键公钥基础设施的脆弱性以及对故障转移与监控的需求。

items.title_en: AMD will reinstate memory encryption on Ryzen 9000 CPUs via BIOS update in July
items.title_zh: AMD 将在7月通过 BIOS 更新重新在 Ryzen 9000 系列 CPU 上启用内存加密
items.summary_en: AMD will reintroduce memory encryption on Ryzen 9000 CPUs via a July BIOS update after community feedback. The move restores a security feature intended to protect sensitive data in memory, though it may demand a BIOS update and potential compatibility considerations.
items.summary_zh: AMD 将在7月通过 BIOS 更新重新在 Ryzen 9000 系列 CPU 上启用内存加密，并在社区反馈驱动下回归。此举提升内存数据的安全性，但可能需要用户更新 BIOS，并留意兼容性问题。

items.title_en: AI is code – and can't be prompted into being smarter
items.title_zh: AI 是代码，不能靠提示变得更聪明
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI systems are software, and prompting alone cannot create real intelligence gains; improvements require better models, data, and training. It warns against over-reliance on clever prompts and encourages a focus on architecture, safety, and compositional capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 是软件，单靠提示无法真正提升智能水平；改进需改进模型、数据和训练方式。警示不要过分依赖“聪明的提示”，应关注架构、安全性及系统性能力。

items.title_en: (How to Write a (Lisp) Interpreter (In Python)) (2010)
items.title_zh: 用 Python 编写 Lisp 解释器（如何实现）
items.summary_en: This classic tutorial shows how to build a Lisp interpreter in Python, from tokenization to evaluation. It reveals core concepts like environments, recursion, and evaluation in a compact, approachable example.
items.summary_zh: 这篇经典教程展示了如何用 Python 构建一个 Lisp 解释器，从词法分析到求值的完整实现。通过简洁的示例，揭示环境、递归与求值等解释器核心理念，便于入门学习。

items.title_en: How to feed a dictator
items.title_zh: 如何喂养独裁者（电影）
items.summary_en: The film examines the politics of aid and diplomacy under authoritarian regimes, revealing tactics and ethics of feeding dictatorial leaders. It analyzes how international aid, bargaining, and public perception shape power, offering warnings for policymakers and development practitioners.
items.summary_zh: 影片聚焦在专制政权下的援助与外交政治，揭示喂养独裁者背后的策略与伦理。通过分析国际援助、谈判与舆论对权力的影响，为决策者与发展工作者提供警示。

items.title_en: The Australian Government to Require SMS/MMS Sender ID Registraion
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚政府将要求短信/彩信发件人ID注册
items.summary_en: Australia plans to require registration of SMS/MMS sender IDs to curb spoofing and abuse, with implications for telcos and developers who rely on messaging. The move aims to improve trust and reduce scams across mobile messaging.
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚政府将要求短信/彩信发件人ID注册，以抑制伪装和滥用现象，对电信运营商和依赖短信服务的企业将产生影响，提升用户信任。

items.title_en: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn't stop anyone
items.title_zh: 从 PGP 到 Mythos：一部未能阻止任何人的出口管制简史
items.summary_en: Export controls on encryption and surveillance tech have repeatedly failed to stop adoption or misuse. The story traces how advances—from PGP to Mythos—outpaced policy, revealing enforcement gaps and unintended consequences. It suggests policy-makers still face difficult trade-offs between security, innovation, and freedom of expression.
items.summary_zh: 关于加密与间谍软件的出口管制历史屡次未能阻止相关技术的扩散与滥用；从 PGP 到 Mythos 的演变暴露了执法难点与政策的滞后。这篇报道强调，政策制定者在安全、创新与言论自由之间仍面临艰难的权衡。

items.title_en: The rich aren't your role models
items.title_zh: 富人不是你的榜样
items.summary_en: A critical essay argues that admiring wealthy elites as role models misleads, advocating for alternative metrics of virtue and success and calling for structural change.
items.summary_zh: 一篇批判性文章认为把富人当作榜样是误导，提倡以其他标准衡量美德与成功，并呼吁进行结构性变革。

items.title_en: Surprising economics of load-balanced systems
items.title_zh: 负载均衡系统的出人意料的经济学
items.summary_en: The article reveals counterintuitive cost dynamics in load-balanced systems, where scaling, replication, and idle capacity interact in surprising ways. It discusses how architectural choices impact total cost of ownership and performance for distributed services.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示负载均衡系统中的意外成本动态，扩展、复制与空闲容量之间的相互作用出人意料。讨论了架构选择如何影响分布式服务的总体拥有成本与性能。

items.title_en: Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
items.title_zh: 在GitHub AI容量吃紧时，微软转向AWS
items.summary_en: With GitHub's AI capacity strained, Microsoft is turning to AWS to provision extra compute and keep Copilot and other AI features humming. The cross-cloud approach reflects broader industry realities around capacity, redundancy, and developer productivity.
items.summary_zh: GitHub的AI容量吃紧，微软正转向AWS以获取额外算力，确保Copilot等AI功能持续运行。跨云策略反映出行业在容量、冗余和开发者生产力方面的现实需求。

items.title_en: If your product is Great, it doesn't need to be Good (2010)
items.title_zh: 如果你的产品很棒，它就不需要是“好”（2010）
items.summary_en: Paul Buchheit argues that truly great products can outshine ordinary polish and that teams should focus on delivering extraordinary value rather than chasing generic 'good' improvements. The note offers a counterpoint to feature creep and highlights the importance of a clear product thesis.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·布赫特认为真正出色的产品能超越普通的精修，团队应专注于提供非凡的价值，而非追逐泛泛的“好”的改进。这一观点对避免功能膨胀、坚持清晰的产品定位具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Humanity isn't ready for the coming intelligence explosion
items.title_zh: 人类尚未为来临的智能爆炸做好准备
items.summary_en: A provocative piece argues that society and institutions are unprepared for a rapid 'intelligence explosion' driven by AI, warning of governance, workforce, and ethical blind spots. It calls for proactive policy, risk management, and adaptable institutions to keep pace with accelerating AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 一篇有争议的文章警告，社会与机构尚未为快速的‘智能爆炸’做好准备，涉及治理、就业与伦理等盲点。文章倡导前瞻性政策和可适应的治理框架，以应对日益增强的人工智能能力。

items.title_en: Claude Corps
items.title_zh: Claude Corps（Claude 队）
items.summary_en: Anthropic announces Claude Corps, a scalable framework to manage multiple Claude agents with policy and governance controls for enterprises. The initiative aims to help teams coordinate AI copilots, enforce safety constraints, and scale AI-assisted workflows across organizations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Corps，为企业提供可扩展的多代理管理框架，具备策略与治理控制，便于协调 AI 助手并对安全约束进行执行。该方案旨在帮助企业在组织内扩展 AI 辅助工作流，同时保障合规性与安全性。

items.title_en: Datasette Apps: Host custom HTML applications inside Datasette
items.title_zh: Datasette Apps：在 Datasette 内托管自定义 HTML 应用
items.summary_en: Datasette Apps lets you embed custom HTML apps inside a Datasette instance, enabling richer data dashboards without leaving the data platform. This reflects a broader trend toward portable, in-platform tooling for data teams.
items.summary_zh: Datasette Apps 允许在 Datasette 实例中嵌入自定义 HTML 应用，提升数据仪表板的能力而无需离开数据平台。此举反映了以数据为中心的可移植网页工具的趋势。

items.title_en: Abandoned and Little-Known Airfields
items.title_zh: 被遗弃与鲜为人知的机场
items.summary_en: Abandoned and Little-Known Airfields catalogs obscure airfields. A resource for aviation historians and enthusiasts, highlighting preservation challenges and historical curiosity.
items.summary_zh: 被遗弃与鲜为人知的机场汇集了大量相关信息，吸引航空历史爱好者与研究者。该资源凸显了航空基础设施的退化及被人遗忘的角落。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Will programmers write more efficient code during the memory shortage?
items.title_zh: 内存短缺时，程序员会写出更高效的代码吗？
items.summary_en: The discussion surveys whether memory scarcity pushes developers toward more memory-efficient patterns, such as streaming data, in-place algorithms, and careful resource management. It weighs evidence from practice and experiments, noting that efficiency gains can trade readability or development speed for memory footprint.
items.summary_zh: 讨论探讨在内存紧张的情形下，开发者是否会倾向于更高效的内存使用策略，如流式处理、就地算法和更谨慎的资源管理。分析来自实践的证据，指出优化可能以降低可读性与执行速度换取更小的内存占用为代价。

items.title_en: Norway greenlights first full-scale ship tunnel
items.title_zh: 挪威批准全球首个全尺度船舶隧道
items.summary_en: Norway approves the first full-scale ship tunnel to help vessels avoid treacherous routes, potentially reducing weather risk and emissions. The project embodies a high-cost, high-impact infrastructure bet with climate and logistics implications.
items.summary_zh: 挪威批准全球首个全尺度的船舶隧道，帮助船只绕过恶劣海况，或降低运营风险与排放。此项目是高成本高回报的基础设施尝试，兼具气候与物流影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Garden of Flowers – an archive of pictorial typography before ASCII art
items.title_zh: Show HN：Garden of Flowers——ASCII艺术前的 pictorial typography 档案
items.summary_en: Show HN: Garden of Flowers preserves a historical archive of pictorial typography, capturing visual language that predates ASCII art. The archive serves as a resource for designers and researchers studying the evolution of text as imagery and the folk typography of early digital culture.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Garden of Flowers 收集整理了 ASCII 之前的图像排版的历史档案，记录了以文本为视觉元素的早期设计语言。对设计师和研究者而言，这是研究文字作为图像的演变与早期数字文化民间排版的重要资源。

items.title_en: The rise of South Korea’s weapons business
items.title_zh: 韩国武器产业的崛起
items.summary_en: South Korea’s weapons business is expanding, driven by defense exports and regional demand. The rise reshapes global arms markets and highlights Korea's tech prowess in advanced materials, avionics, and precision manufacturing.
items.summary_zh: 韩国的武器产业正在扩张，受到军事出口和区域需求推动。这一崛起重塑全球军火市场，凸显韩国在高端材料、航空电子和精密制造等领域的技术实力。

items.title_en: Kirkland Roundabouts
items.title_zh: 柯克兰的环岛设计
items.summary_en: Kirkland's roundabouts aim to improve traffic flow and reduce crashes, with discussion on the benefits and tradeoffs of this infrastructure approach in real city conditions.
items.summary_zh: 柯克兰的环岛设计旨在提升交通流畅度并降低事故风险，文章探讨了这种基础设施的利弊以及在城市中的实际效果。

items.title_en: Cell-based architecture for resilient payment systems
items.title_zh: 基于单元格的架构提升支付系统弹性
items.summary_en: Cell-based architecture is presented as a path to fault isolation and resilient payments. By partitioning state and operations into independent cells, outages in one cell won’t cascade, enabling faster recovery and safer experimentation. The approach aligns with fintech’s demand for 24/7 uptime and scalable, compliant architectures.
items.summary_zh: 将系统分割为独立的单元格以实现故障隔离和支付系统弹性。通过对状态和操作进行细粒度划分，单个单元的故障不会蔓延，从而更快恢复并便于安全试验。这一思路符合金融科技对全天候可用性、可扩展性和合规性的要求。

items.title_en: A 3D voxel game engine written in APL
items.title_zh: 用 APL 编写的三维体素游戏引擎
items.summary_en: An experimental 3D voxel engine implemented in the array-oriented language APL demonstrates how unconventional tools can model space succinctly. It's not a practical game engine, but it highlights creative language design and how data-parallel reasoning can apply to graphics workloads.
items.summary_zh: 一个用 APL 实现的三维体素引擎是对极端语言在图形任务中潜力的有趣演示。它并非实用的游戏引擎，但凸显了语言设计的创造性，以及数据并行思维在图形工作负载中的潜在应用。

items.title_en: French physicist and media star loses doctorate after plagiarism investigation
items.title_zh: 法国知名物理学家在抄袭调查后被撤销博士学位
items.summary_en: A French physicist and media figure loses their doctorate after a plagiarism investigation, highlighting ongoing concerns about integrity in science communication. The case underscores how public visibility can intersect with scholarly misconduct.
items.summary_zh: 一位法国知名物理学家在抄袭调查后被撤销博士学位，凸显科学传播领域的学术诚信问题及风险。

items.title_en: I used sound waves to make espresso. It could cut coffee‑brewing energy use by ¾
items.title_zh: 用声波冲煮浓缩咖啡，或能把冲煮能耗降低约75%
items.summary_en: A lab-scale demonstration uses acoustic waves to improve espresso extraction, potentially slashing brewing energy by up to 75%. The approach challenges conventional thermal methods and points to broader opportunities for energy-efficient food and beverage processing. Real-world practicality and consumer taste remain questions.
items.summary_zh: 一项实验性研究用声波辅助提取浓缩咖啡，理论上可将冲煮能耗降低多达75%。该方法挑战传统的热传导依赖，并提示在食品饮料加工领域的潜在节能机会。实际可用性与口味影响仍待验证。

items.title_en: Making glass-to-metal seals for home­made vacuum tubes
items.title_zh: 自制真空管的玻璃-金属密封制作
items.summary_en: A hands-on guide to fabricating glass-to-metal seals for home-made vacuum tubes, detailing material choices, sealing techniques, and the high-voltage rigors involved. It highlights the hobbyist challenges of building vacuum electronics and the precision required for reliable seals.
items.summary_zh: 详细介绍自制真空管的玻璃-金属密封工艺，涵盖材料选择、封装技巧以及高压操作要求，凸显爱好者在自制真空电子设备时对密封可靠性和工艺精度的挑战。

items.title_en: The Competitive Moat That AI Can't Replicate
items.title_zh: AI 无法复制的竞争护城河
items.summary_en: Argues that the true moat AI cannot replicate is human connection and trust, which underpin networks, communities, and consumer loyalty. The piece suggests social capital remains a defensible advantage even as AI advances.
items.summary_zh: 认为人工智能难以复制的真正护城河在于人际连接和信任，这些社交资本支撑着网络、社区和用户忠诚。即便 AI 继续发展，这些非技术要素仍具有不可替代性。

items.title_en: Migrating from GNU Stow to Chezmoi
items.title_zh: 从 GNU Stow 迁移到 Chezmoi
items.summary_en: A practical guide to moving from GNU Stow to Chezmoi for dotfile management, covering migration steps, secrets handling, and multi-device syncing. The change reflects a maturation of personal config workflows toward cross-machine portability.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供从 GNU Stow 迁移到 Chezmoi 的实用指南，涵盖迁移步骤、密钥管理与多设备同步等要点。反映了个人配置管理向跨设备可移植化的演进。

items.title_en: Alice is impatient
items.title_zh: 爱丽丝急不可耐
items.summary_en: 一篇关于不耐烦、等待结果如何影响产品工作与个人项目的个人随笔。
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于不耐烦、等待结果如何影响产品工作与个人项目的个人随笔。

items.title_en: Fossil Fuels Are 40% of Freight Shipping Tonnage, but Half Its Fuel Use
items.title_zh: 化石燃料占货运吨位的40%，却贡献一半燃料消耗
items.summary_en: A revealing look at freight shipping energy use shows fossil fuels account for a substantial share of both tonnage and fuel consumption, underscoring efficiency gaps and decarbonization opportunities such as alternative fuels and wind-assisted propulsion.
items.summary_zh: 对货运能源使用的揭示性分析显示，化石燃料在吨位和燃料消耗中占比相当大，揭示了效率差距和可通过替代燃料、风力辅助推进等方式实现的脱碳机会。

items.title_en: Why do commercial spaces sit vacant? (2025)
items.title_zh: 为什么商业空间在 2025 年空置率居高不下？
items.summary_en: Explores why commercial spaces remain vacant in 2025, weighing factors like changing work patterns, e-commerce pressure, rent levels, and subleasing. The piece suggests mixed macro trends and local nuances require nuanced strategies for landlords and tenants.
items.summary_zh: 分析 2025 年商业空间空置的原因：工作模式改变、电商冲击、租金水平与转租等因素叠加。指出这需要从宏观趋势和本地条件综合应对的策略。

items.title_en: I need your clothes, your boots, and your motorcycle
items.title_zh: 我需要你的衣服、靴子和摩托车
items.summary_en: A pop-culture line is used to frame a discussion on cybersecurity risk and social engineering, illustrating how attackers attempt to override defenses.
items.summary_zh: 用一段流行文化的名言来切入网络安全与社会工程学，揭示攻击者如何尝试绕过防线、提升入侵成功率。

items.title_en: So You Want to Define a Well-Known URI
items.title_zh: 你也想定义一个 Well-Known URI 吗？
items.summary_en: A guide to defining and using well-known URIs to advertise service metadata and endpoints, with attention to conventions, security, and interoperability. It helps developers design predictable, standard-compliant web services.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍如何定义和使用 well-known URI（如 /.well-known/）来公开服务元数据与认证端点等信息，强调命名规范、安全要点与互操作性。

items.title_en: Apple boss Tim Cook says prices to rise due to memory chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果将因内存芯片成本上涨而提价
items.summary_en: Tim Cook warns that memory-chip cost pressures will drive price increases for Apple's devices, reflecting how component economics ripple through consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 库克警告内存芯片成本上升将推高苹果产品价格，揭示组件经济如何将成本传导给消费者设备。

items.title_en: 21 years and counting of 'eight fallacies of distributed computing' (2025)
items.title_zh: 21 年仍在延续的分布式计算八大谬论（2025）
items.summary_en: Twenty-one years after the original eight fallacies were popularized, the article argues these myths persist in modern distributed systems, shaping how engineers reason about latency, partitions, and reliability. It offers updated examples and guidance for building resilient cloud-native architectures.
items.summary_zh: 距最初提出已有二十多年后，文章认为这八大谬论仍在现代分布式系统中占据影响力，影响工程师对延迟、分区和可靠性的判断。并给出更新的示例与应对思路，帮助构建更具弹性的云原生架构。

items.title_en: Akse3D – open-source 3D modelling anyone can master
items.title_zh: Akse3D：人人可掌握的开源 3D 建模工具
items.summary_en: Akse3D positions itself as an accessible, open-source 3D modeling tool designed for newcomers yet capable enough for everyday work. It emphasizes approachable UX, extensibility, and a community-driven roadmap for improving features.
items.summary_zh: Akse3D 致力于成为面向初学者的开源3D建模工具，同时具备日常工作所需的实用性。它强调友好的用户体验、可扩展性，以及以社区为驱动的功能路线图。

items.title_en: Telescope Ranchers
items.title_zh: 望远镜牧场主
items.summary_en: An evocative look at ranchers who embrace astronomy as a core part of life, showing how wide-open skies and remote environment foster unique stargazing practices. The piece contrasts traditional ranching with modern observational tech, shedding light on how rural communities contribute to science culture.
items.summary_zh: 这篇报道讲述把天文学融入牧场生活的牧场主们，辽阔夜空和偏远环境让观星成为独特的日常。文本对比了传统牧场与现代观测技术，揭示偏远社区如何为科学文化添入一抹独特风景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Metiq: a real time 3D globe for 100 public datasets
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集
items.summary_en: Metiq offers a real-time 3D globe visualization for a hundred public datasets, enabling fast, immersive exploration of geo-annotated data. Built for developers, it demonstrates how WebGL and streaming data can empower interactive data storytelling.
items.summary_zh: Metiq 提供一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集，便于对地理标注数据进行沉浸式探索。面向开发者的工具展示了 WebGL 与数据流在互动数据讲述中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Bun has an open PR adding shared-memory threads to JavaScriptCore
items.title_zh: Bun 在 JavaScriptCore 中为共享内存线程打开了 PR
items.summary_en: Bun, a web runtime, submitted an open PR to add shared-memory threading to JavaScriptCore. If merged, this could enable parallel execution across cores, potentially boosting performance for CPU-bound workloads and altering the WebKit/Bun ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Bun 这个网络运行时向 JavaScriptCore 提交了一个开放的 PR，旨在增加共享内存线程支持。若合并，可能实现跨核心的并行执行，提升 CPU 密集型工作负载的性能，并影响 WebKit 与 Bun 的生态。

items.title_en: GLM 5.2 Performance Benchmarks
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2 性能基准
items.summary_en: Benchmarks reveal where this model stands in terms of speed, memory footprint, and accuracy relative to competing options, helping researchers decide when to adopt it in production or experiments.
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2 的基准测试揭示了在速度、内存占用和精度等方面相对于竞品的定位，帮助研究者判断在生产环境或实验中何时采用该模型。

items.title_en: Show HN: Make PDFs look scanned (CLI or in the browser via WASM)
items.title_zh: Show HN：让 PDF 看起来像扫描件（CLI 或 WASM 浏览器实现）
items.summary_en: Introducing a tool that renders PDFs with a scanned appearance, usable from CLI or in-browser via WebAssembly. It can help with document privacy, archiving, or design experiments.
items.summary_zh: 推出一个能让 PDF 看起来像扫描件的工具，支持命令行使用或在浏览器中通过 WASM 运行，适用于隐私保护、归档或设计实验。

items.title_en: Emacs, how it all started for me
items.title_zh: Emacs：我的起点
items.summary_en: The author shares how Emacs shaped their programming mindset, from initial fascination to long‑term reliance on its extensibility. The piece reflects on openness, community, and the enduring appeal of a powerful editor.
items.summary_zh: 作者讲述自己如何被 Emacs 吸引并逐步建立起对编辑器及其可扩展性的依赖，反映了开源社区的影响力与强大工具在长期学习中的价值。

items.title_en: Update on Ocean Observatories Initiative
items.title_zh: 海洋观测倡议最新进展
items.summary_en: NSF's update on the Ocean Observatories Initiative outlines progress on coastal and deep-sea sensor networks, plus ongoing funding and maintenance challenges. The report reveals how such large, long-running science infrastructure is managed over time.
items.summary_zh: NSF 发布的海洋观测倡议更新概述了沿岸与深海传感网络的进展，以及资金与维护方面的持续挑战。报告揭示了长期基础设施科学计划在资金、数据获取和维护方面的管理要点。

items.title_en: How memory safety CVEs differ between Rust and C/C++
items.title_zh: Rust 与 C/C++ 的内存安全 CVE 差异
items.summary_en: Memory-safety CVEs reveal different risk profiles between Rust and C/C++. Rust's ownership and safer abstractions reduce many classes of vulnerabilities, while C/C++ remain susceptible to use-after-free and unsafe dereferences; the post highlights practical implications for choosing languages in security-sensitive projects.
items.summary_zh: 内存安全漏洞展示了 Rust 与 C/C++ 在风险类型上的差异。Rust 的所有权与更安全的抽象降低了大量漏洞风险，而 C/C++ 仍易出现如使用后释放等问题；这对在安全敏感项目中选用语言具有实际意义。

items.title_en: Show HN: I wrote a C++ ray tracer from scratch without AI
items.title_zh: Show HN: 我从零开始用 C++ 写了一个光线追踪器（没有 AI）
items.summary_en: A hands-on showcase of a pure C++ ray tracer built from zero, likely implementing basic path tracing or ray casting with BVH, demonstrating fundamentals of graphics render pipelines without ML crutches. It’s a reminder that high-performance, readable rendering code remains a valuable craft.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个用纯 C++ 从零开始编写光线追踪器的实战演示，可能实现了基本的路径追踪或光线投射和 BVH 等优化，展示无 ML 依赖的渲染管线基础。它提醒人们，高性能、可读的渲染代码依然是一门宝贵的技艺。

items.title_en: Show HN: Capacitor Alarm Clock
items.title_zh: Show HN：电容闹钟
items.summary_en: Show HN features a capacitor-powered alarm clock project, highlighting hands-on hardware hacking, energy storage design, and DIY electronics culture.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个用电容器供电的闹钟项目，聚焦于硬件改造、能量存储设计和 DIY 电子技术文化。

items.title_en: Google Flight Simulator
items.title_zh: Google Flight Simulator
items.summary_en: Google's Flight Simulator capability in Maps animates a virtual tour of the globe with realistic cockpit-like navigation. It demonstrates how mapping data can power immersive exploration experiences at scale.
items.summary_zh: Google 地图的航线模拟功能实现了全球虚拟游览，具备近真实的驾驶舱导航感。此特性展示了地图数据在大规模沉浸式探索体验中的潜力。

items.title_en: Who owns your ATProto identity?
items.title_zh: 你的 ATProto 身份归谁？线索：很可能不是你
items.summary_en: ATProto identity is not owned by the user; it's controlled by the homeserver and the identity provider, with data portability and trust considerations. The piece explains ownership implications, how portability across servers is limited, and why users should care about server trust and data access.
items.summary_zh: ATProto 身份并非由用户直接掌控，而是由宿主服务器及身份提供方控制，数据移植性与信任问题并存。文中分析了所有权的含义、跨服务器迁移的局限，以及用户为何需要关注服务器信任和数据访问权限。

items.title_en: Can Europe train a frontier AI model on the compute it owns?
items.title_zh: 欧洲能否用自有算力训练前沿 AI 模型？
items.summary_en: Europe explores training frontier AI models using compute it owns, touching on sovereignty, data governance, and talent investment. The effort signals strategic interest in reducing dependence on US-based hyperscalers for critical AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲探索用自己掌握的算力训练前沿 AI 模型，涉及主权、数据治理与人才投资等议题，显示在关键 AI 能力上降低对美资云厂商依赖的战略意图。

items.title_en: The Korean telecom giant at the center of Anthropic's Mythos controversy
items.title_zh: 引发 Anthropic Mythos 争议的韩国电信巨头
items.summary_en: SK Telecom is positioned at the center of a Mythos export‑controls controversy involving Anthropic, highlighting how regulatory rules and international partnerships influence AI access and deployment. The case exposes the leverage telecoms hold over AI supply chains and regulatory compliance.
items.summary_zh: 韩国电信巨头 SK Telecom 处于与 Anthropic 的 Mythos 争议核心，涉及出口管制与跨境合规等议题。此事凸显大型电信运营商在 AI 供应链和监管遵从中的影响力与潜在风险。

items.title_en: JSON-LD Explained for Personal Websites
items.title_zh: 个人网站的 JSON-LD 讲解
items.summary_en: Shows how to add JSON-LD structured data to personal sites to improve search visibility. The post walks through practical examples for common schemas like Person, Website, and Organization, with implementation tips.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何在个人网站中添加 JSON-LD 结构化数据以提升搜索可见性。文章通过 Person、Website、Organization 等常见模式给出实用示例和实现要点。

items.title_en: Windows UI evolution: Clicking an unassociated file
items.title_zh: Windows UI 演变：点击未关联文件的体验
items.summary_en: Recent Windows UI tweaks aim to make handling files without a default app less painful, offering clearer prompts and quicker options to pick an app. These changes reflect a broader focus on UX resiliency when dealing with file associations across OS versions.
items.summary_zh: Windows 的用户界面改进正在减轻在没有默认应用的情况下点击文件时的痛点，提供更清晰的提示和快速选择应用的选项。这些改动体现了操作系统在文件关联方面的用户体验韧性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: TesterArmy (YC P26) – Agents that test web and mobile apps
items.title_zh: Launch HN: TesterArmy（YC P26）— 测试网页和移动应用的代理
items.summary_en: TesterArmy provides autonomous agents that simulate real-user interactions to test web and mobile apps, enabling scalable, continuous QA. By combining AI with automation, it aims to catch flaky tests and regressions earlier in development.
items.summary_zh: TesterArmy 提供可自主运行的代理，模拟用户行为来测试网页和移动应用，支持持续规模化的质量保证。通过将 AI 与自动化结合，旨在更早发现不稳定测试与回归问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Discover Wikipedia articles popular on Hacker News
items.title_zh: Show HN：发现 Hacker News 上受欢迎的维基百科条目
items.summary_en: A project that surfaces Wikipedia articles that tend to perform well on Hacker News, enabling quick exploration of topics that resonate with tech-focused readers. It provides data-driven insight into what topics drive engagement in developer communities.
items.summary_zh: 一个发现 Hacker News 上受欢迎的维基百科条目的项目，方便快速查看与科技读者群体共鸣的话题。它通过数据洞察何种主题在开发者社群中更易获得关注。

items.title_en: Perlisisms (1982)
items.title_zh: Perlisms（1982）
items.summary_en: A collection of Alan Perlis's witty epigrams on programming and software engineering, offering timeless reminders about learning, style, and the craft. The quotes are compact and often paradoxical, useful for thinking differently about code.
items.summary_zh: 收集了 Alan Perlis 的机智格言，聚焦编程与软件工程的学习、风格与工艺。这些短句简洁常带悖论色彩，值得用来重新审视代码的本质。

items.title_en: The AI Hate Progression
items.title_zh: AI 的仇恨进展
items.summary_en: A provocative piece arguing that AI-driven hate content can escalate if misaligned with safety goals and incentives, urging designers to address bias, moderation, and governance. It emphasizes that progress must be tempered by robust safety controls.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章质疑 AI 生成的仇恨内容在安全目标与激励机制不健全时如何扩散，强调需要在设计、偏见治理和治理机制上做出改进。

items.title_en: Zigzag Decoding with AVX-512
items.title_zh: 使用 AVX-512 的 Zigzag 解码
items.summary_en: A vectorized zigzag decoding routine built with AVX-512 delivers meaningful speedups over scalar code, demonstrating how wide SIMD can accelerate data-reordering steps in codecs. The post emphasizes careful data layout and alignment to squeeze throughput.
items.summary_zh: 基于 AVX-512 的 Zigzag 解码实现对标量版本实现了显著加速，展示了宽 SIMD 如何提升编解码中数据重排步骤的吞吐量。文中强调通过对齐和数据布局来最大化向量化性能。

items.title_en: SubQ 1.1 Small
items.title_zh: SubQ 1.1 Small（小型）技术报告
items.summary_en: SubQ 1.1 Small presents a compact language model with measured performance, memory characteristics, and suitability for on-device inference. The report discusses architecture choices and practical use cases for smaller models.
items.summary_zh: SubQ 1.1 Small 提供了一个紧凑型语言模型，给出性能、内存特征及本地推理的适用性等数据。报告探讨了架构选择及小型模型的实际应用场景。

items.title_en: Iran requires insurance on ships using Strait of Hormuz, fees likely to follow
items.title_zh: 伊朗要求经霍尔木兹海峡航行的船舶投保，未来可能征收费用
items.summary_en: Iran now requires mandatory insurance for ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, which could raise shipping costs and reshape insurance markets. The policy signals tighter controls and potential ripple effects across global trade and vessel routing.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗如今要求经霍尔木兹海峡航行的船舶投保，可能提高运费并影响保险市场。该政策体现对航运活动更严格的监管以及全球贸易的潜在连锁反应。

items.title_en: Migrate from OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 从 OpenClaw 迁移到 Chezmoi
items.summary_en: A guide to migrating dotfiles management from OpenClaw to Chezmoi, covering tooling changes, data handling, and cross-device synchronization. It helps practitioners modernize and unify their config workflows.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供从 OpenClaw 迁移到 Chezmoi 的指南，涵盖工具变更、数据处理与跨设备同步等要点，帮助开发者统一并现代化配置管理工作流。

items.title_en: NLnet announces funding for 67 more open-source projects
items.title_zh: NLnet 为67个开源项目提供资金
items.summary_en: NLnet announces funding for 67 additional open-source projects, supporting areas like security, privacy, accessibility, and open standards. The grant program underlines ongoing investment in community-driven software.
items.summary_zh: NLnet 宣布为另外67个开源项目提供资助，覆盖安全、隐私、无障碍与开放标准等领域，体现对社区驱动软件的持续投入。

items.title_en: FarOutCompany
items.title_zh: FarOutCompany
items.summary_en: A concise look at FarOutCompany and its latest activities.
items.summary_zh: 对 FarOutCompany 的简要介绍及其近期动态。

items.title_en: The Token Compression Illusion: Why I'm Skeptical of RTK
items.title_zh: 令牌压缩错觉：为何我对 RTK 持怀疑态度
items.summary_en: A skeptical take on token compression and RTK, arguing they don’t address core efficiency or capability gaps in AI models and may introduce overhead or information loss. The piece advocates for deeper architectural improvements instead of compression tricks.
items.summary_zh: 对令牌压缩与 RTK 的质疑观点，认为此类技术未解决 AI 模型的核心效率与能力问题，可能带来额外开销与信息损失。作者主张寻求更深入的架构改进。

items.title_en: Bootimus – A Self-Contained PXE and HTTP Boot Server
items.title_zh: Bootimus：一款自包含的 PXE 与 HTTP 引导服务器
items.summary_en: Bootimus provides a compact, self-contained PXE/HTTP boot server ideal for network booting without external services. It's handy for bare-metal provisioning, offline labs, and reproducible deployments.
items.summary_zh: Bootimus 提供一个紧凑、独立的 PXE/HTTP 引导服务器，适合在无需外部服务的情况下进行网络引导。它在裸机部署、离线实验室和可复现的测试环境中很有用，体现了便携工具的趋势。

items.title_en: Map Clustering Is Not My Favorite
items.title_zh: 地图聚类不是我的最爱
items.summary_en: The author critiques map clustering techniques, arguing that common approaches can misrepresent geographic patterns and lead to brittle visualizations. The post offers alternative perspectives or methods for more robust spatial clustering.
items.summary_zh: 作者批评了地图聚类技术，指出常用方法可能歪曲地理模式，导致可视化结果不稳健。文章提出更稳妥的空间聚类思路与替代方法。

items.title_en: AURpocalypse now: a look at the recent AUR attacks
items.title_zh: AURpocalypse：近期的 AUR 攻击回顾
items.summary_en: AURpocalypse examines recent attacks on the Arch User Repository ecosystem, highlighting supply-chain risk and the importance of package verification, trust, and community vigilance.
items.summary_zh: AURpocalypse 回顾了最近对 Arch 用户仓库生态的攻击，强调供应链风险以及包签名与社区监督的重要性。

items.title_en: Boot Naked Linux
items.title_zh: 裸机启动 Linux
items.summary_en: A minimalist approach to booting Linux, stripping away optional initramfs or init-time dependencies to showcase a lean, fast startup path. The project emphasizes educational value and potential security benefits of a naked-boot approach.
items.summary_zh: 以极简方式启动 Linux，去除可选的 initramfs 与初始化依赖，展示一种更精简、启动更快的路径。该项目强调此类裸机启动在教育与潜在安全方面的价值。

items.title_en: An interview with an Apple emoji designer
items.title_zh: 一次对苹果表情符号设计师的访谈
items.summary_en: Ollie Wagner discusses the constraints and philosophy behind Apple emoji design, revealing how designers balance consistency, expressiveness, and cross-platform compatibility. The interview sheds light on a tiny but influential design language.
items.summary_zh: Ollie Wagner 讨论苹果表情符号设计背后的约束与理念，揭示设计师如何在保持一致性、表达力与跨平台兼容性之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: Burnout is real for open source maintainers
items.title_zh: 开源维护者的倦怠问题
items.summary_en: Explores burnout among open-source maintainers driven by sustained workload, volunteer governance, and funding gaps. The piece advocates sustainable funding models, better recognition, and governance practices to keep OSS healthy.
items.summary_zh: 探讨开源维护者因长期工作量、志愿治理与资金短缺引发的倦怠。呼吁建立可持续的资助模式、改进对维护者的认可，以及更稳健的治理做法以维持 OSS 健康。

items.title_en: Amazon Announces Multibillion-Dollar Data Center in Missouri
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将在密苏里州建立数十亿美元数据中心
items.summary_en: A multi-billion-dollar Amazon data center project in Missouri signals ongoing cloud and compute expansion, with implications for regional energy infrastructure, jobs, and connectivity. The investment points to continued demand for hyperscale capacity as developers migrate workloads to the cloud and as edge-like regions seek closer proximity to users.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊在密苏里州宣布建设数十亿美元级别的数据中心，显示云计算与大规模计算基础设施的持续扩张。此举将影响当地能源、就业和网络连通性，并反映出对雾计算式近端服务需求的增长。

items.title_en: The case against geometric algebra (2024)
items.title_zh: 反对几何代数的论证（2024）
items.summary_en: A critical take on geometric algebra argues it offers limited practical advantages over conventional vector calculus and can complicate understanding. The piece weighs its claimed unifying power against real-world adoption in physics and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对几何代数的质疑指出，它在实际应用中相较传统向量微积分并无明显优势，反而可能增加理解难度。文章权衡其所宣称的统一性与在物理和工程领域的实际应用证据。

items.title_en: A Perceptron in Age of Empires II
items.title_zh: 在《帝国时代 II》中实现感知机
items.summary_en: The post shows how a simple perceptron can be mapped into the game’s logic circuits, effectively simulating a tiny neural net inside AoE2 setups. It discusses wiring, training, and limitations, illustrating how classic ML concepts can be demonstrated in a game environment.
items.summary_zh: 文章演示如何将一个简单的感知机映射到游戏的电路逻辑中，在《帝国时代 II》的设定里模拟一个小型神经网络。内容涵盖连线、训练与局限性，展示了经典机器学习概念如何在游戏环境中得到直观体现。

items.title_en: Making ast.walk 220x Faster
items.title_zh: 将 ast.walk 提速 220 倍
items.summary_en: A performance-focused post shows replacing costly AST walks with a faster approach, achieving up to a 220x speedup. It illustrates how targeted tooling and optimized traversal strategies can dramatically accelerate static analysis workflows.
items.summary_zh: 通过改用更高效的 AST 遍历方法，实现高达 220 倍的速度提升。该文展示了为特定任务设计的遍历工具如何显著加速静态分析工作流程。

items.title_en: Understanding the rationale behind a rule when trying to circumvent it
items.title_zh: 尝试绕过规则时理解背后原因
items.summary_en: Explains why people try to circumvent rules and what that reveals about usability and policy design. It argues that robust systems anticipate common workarounds and provide safer, clearer alternatives rather than simply blocking actions.
items.summary_zh: 本文解析人们为何试图绕过规则，以及这对可用性和政策设计的启示。作者主张，健全的系统应预见常见的变通方式，提供更安全、清晰的替代路径，而非单纯封锁行为。

items.title_en: The discovery that changed how scientists think about memory
items.title_zh: 改变科学家记忆观的发现（IBM）
items.summary_en: The Kavli Prize-recognized finding reshapes how scientists view memory, suggesting memory relies on distributed networks rather than isolated storage.
items.summary_zh: 这项获得 Kavli 奖的发现改变了科学家对记忆的理解，提示记忆可能分散在大脑网络中而非单一存储单元。它对神经科学、衰老研究和受 AI 启发的记忆模型具有深远影响，推动对记忆障碍的新策略。

items.title_en: PostgresBench: A Reproducible Benchmark for Postgres Services
items.title_zh: PostgresBench：可复现的 Postgres 服务基准测试
items.summary_en: Public benchmark suite PostgresBench offers a reproducible framework to compare Postgres deployments across services and environments. It standardizes workloads and metrics, making it easier to isolate performance differences and optimize configurations.
items.summary_zh: PostgresBench 提供一个可复现的基准框架，用于在不同服务和环境中对 Postgres 部署进行对比。它标准化工作负载和指标，便于定位性能差异并优化配置。

items.title_en: Lithuanian startup launches open-source network to detect Shahed-type drones
items.title_zh: 立陶宛初创公司推出开源网络以检测 Shahed 型无人机
items.summary_en: A Lithuanian startup launches an open-source network to detect Shahed-type drones, inviting researchers and communities to contribute sensors and detections. It exemplifies crowdsourced defense tech and open standards in unmanned systems.
items.summary_zh: 立陶宛一家初创企业推出开源网络，用于检测 Shahed 型无人机，鼓励社区共享传感器和检测数据。这体现了以开源和众包方式提升无人机监测能力的趋势。

items.title_en: A brief tour of the PDP-11, the most influential minicomputer of all time (2022)
items.title_zh: 对 PDP-11 的简要走访：有史以来最具影响力的微型计算机
items.summary_en: PDP-11 is highlighted as one of the most influential minicomputers, shaping Unix, operating systems design, and computer culture of its era. The tour covers its architecture, era, and enduring retrocomputing appeal.
items.summary_zh: PDP-11 被视为最具影响力的微型计算机之一，深刻影响了 Unix、操作系统设计与当时的计算机文化。文章回顾了其架构、时代背景及至今的复古计算魅力。

items.title_en: Egyptian Fractions (2006)
items.title_zh: 埃及分数：将分数表示为单位分数的历史与方法
items.summary_en: A mathematical look at Egyptian fractions, expressing rationals as sums of distinct unit fractions. The piece traces historical context, simple algorithms, and how these representations relate to number theory.
items.summary_zh: 对埃及分数进行数学探讨，将有理数表示为互不相同的单位分数之和，追溯历史背景、简单算法及与数论的关系。

items.title_en: Formal Methods and the Future of Programming
items.title_zh: 形式化方法与编程的未来
items.summary_en: Jane Street explains how formal methods can increase software reliability and safety, sharing practical experiences with verification, tooling, and education. The piece argues for integrating formal reasoning into mainstream programming practice.
items.summary_zh: Jane Street 讨论形式化方法如何提升软件可靠性与安全性，结合验证、工具和教育的实际经验。强调将形式化推理融入主流编程实践的重要性。

items.title_en: Whole cross-sectional human ultrasound tomography
items.title_zh: 全横截面人体超声层析成像
items.summary_en: A breakthrough in ultrasound imaging enabling whole cross-sectional tomography of the human body, offering non-invasive, high-resolution views that could aid in diagnostics.
items.summary_zh: 在超声成像方面取得突破，能够对人体整幅横截面进行层析成像，提供非侵入性且高分辨率的影像，有助于诊断。

items.title_en: Unicorn – The Ultimate CPU Emulator
items.title_zh: Unicorn：终极 CPU 模拟器
items.summary_en: Unicorn Engine remains a versatile CPU emulator used for reverse engineering and dynamic analysis, supporting multiple architectures through a common API. The post notes new features, performance tweaks, or ecosystem updates.
items.summary_zh: Unicorn Engine 仍是多架构支持的通用 CPU 模拟器，便于反向工程与动态分析。文章提及近期的新特性、性能改进与生态更新。

items.title_en: Cohere's First Model for Developers
items.title_zh: Cohere 为开发者推出首个模型
items.summary_en: Cohere launches its first developer-friendly model, designed to simplify access to powerful NLP capabilities via straightforward APIs and pricing. The move signals a shift toward more accessible, hosted LLM solutions for builders who want to integrate language capabilities without managing large models themselves.
items.summary_zh: Cohere 推出面向开发者的首个模型，提供易用的 API 与定价，降低接入强大自然语言处理能力的门槛。这一举措反映了更广泛的趋势：让开发者在不自建大模型的情况下即可嵌入语言能力。

items.title_en: We built a persistent agent memory layer on Elasticsearch with 0.89 recall
items.title_zh: Elastic 在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化的代理记忆层，召回率 0.89
items.summary_en: Elastic builds a persistent agent memory layer atop Elasticsearch to improve long-term context retention and recall in AI agents. The approach demonstrates practical memory-augmented search and automation.
items.summary_zh: Elastic 在 Elasticsearch 上构建了一个持久化的代理记忆层，提升 AI 代理的长期上下文保留与召回能力，展示了记忆增强的搜索与自动化的实际应用。

items.title_en: Zenzizenzizenzic
items.title_zh: Zenzizenzizenzic：八次方的古名与趣味
items.summary_en: Explains the quirky historical term zenzizenzizenzic for the eighth power, tracing its origin and how such playful nomenclature fits into the history of mathematics. A charming math curiosity.
items.summary_zh: 解释八次方的古老术语 zenzizenzizenzic，追溯其起源并展示这类趣味命名在数学史中的地位。

items.title_en: What every coder should know about gamma (2016)
items.title_zh: 每个程序员都应该知道的伽玛校正
items.summary_en: Gamma correction is essential for accurate color rendering in images and displays, yet it's often misunderstood in software. Understanding these concepts prevents subtle visual bugs in apps.
items.summary_zh: 伽玛校正是图像和显示器色彩正确呈现的关键，但在工程实践中常被误解。文章讲解伽玛曲线、sRGB 等色彩空间的直觉，以及感知线性的重要性，帮助开发者避免界面和图形管线中的颜色失真。理解要点有助于避免应用中的细微视觉错误。

items.title_en: Ported my C game to WASM, here's every bug that I hit
items.title_zh: 把我的 C 游戏移植到 WASM：遇到的所有问题
items.summary_en: A practical tour of porting a C game to WebAssembly, cataloging design gotchas and debugging woes—from memory layout and linking to browser I/O and performance traps. The post offers concrete tips for developers considering WASM for existing C projects and highlights gaps between native and web runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 这是一段将 C 游戏移植到 WebAssembly 的实用笔记，记录从内存布局、链接、浏览器 IO 到性能陷阱等一系列要点和调试难题。为考虑将现有 C 项目转到 WASM 的开发者提供了具体建议，并指出了原生与网页环境之间的差距。

items.title_en: Companies rein in AI usage as costs strain budgets
items.title_zh: 成本压力下，企业收紧AI的使用
items.summary_en: As budgets tighten, companies are dialing back AI investments, favoring cheaper, more focused deployments and closer vendor scrutiny. The trend may slow innovation and broaden reliance on existing tools.
items.summary_zh: 在预算紧缩之际，企业收紧AI投入，偏向成本更低、聚焦的部署，并加强对供应商的审查。这一趋势可能放缓创新并加深对现有工具的依赖。

items.title_en: Show HN: Fata – Spaced repetition to fight skill rot from AI coding
items.title_zh: Show HN: Fata — 用间隔重复对抗 AI 编码带来的技能退化
items.summary_en: Fata applies spaced repetition to counteract skill rot from heavy reliance on AI coding assistants. The project suggests a productivity approach that blends AI-assisted coding with deliberate practice to retain real proficiency.
items.summary_zh: Fata 将间隔重复应用于对抗因大量依赖 AI 编码助手带来的技能退化，主张在 AI 辅助编码的同时融入刻意练习以保持真正的熟练度。

items.title_en: The minimum viable unit of saleable software
items.title_zh: 可销售软件的最小单元
items.summary_en: Reframes product scope toward selling the smallest units of software rather than chasing a traditional MVP. This helps with pricing, packaging, and avoiding feature creep, guiding teams to ship tangible value sooner.
items.summary_zh: 把产品范围聚焦在可销售的最小单位，而不是追求传统 MVP。这样有助于定价、包装、避免功能堆叠，并促使团队尽快交付可验证的价值。

items.title_en: ChatGPT's image generator can be manipulated to produce violent, sexual content
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 图像生成器可能被操纵生成暴力/性内容
items.summary_en: Security research shows prompts or prompts-based workflows can coerce image generators to produce disallowed content, highlighting risks and the need for robust content moderation in multimodal AI tools.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现 ChatGPT 的图像生成器可通过特定提示生成暴力或性内容，暴露多模态 AI 内容过滤的风险，强调加强安全措施的必要性。

items.title_en: TerraPower in deal with Meta for eight Natrium 345 MW nuclear plants
items.title_zh: TerraPower 与 Meta 就建设八座 Natrium 345 MW 的先进核电厂达成协议
items.summary_en: TerraPower and Meta strike a deal to deploy eight Natrium 345 MW advanced nuclear plants, signaling renewed interest in compact, safe nuclear power for data centers and large-scale computing. The collaboration hints at how tech ecosystems may accelerate clean baseload capacity.
items.summary_zh: TerraPower 与 Meta 就部署八座 Natrium 345 MW 的先进核电厂达成协议，表明对紧凑且安全的核电在数据中心与大规模计算中的兴趣回升。此举揭示科技生态系统可能推动清洁基础电力的扩展。

items.title_en: Around 200 Stanford students walk out as Google CEO takes stage
items.title_zh: 斯坦福学生在谷歌CEO登台时约200人退场抗议
items.summary_en: Around 200 Stanford students staged a walkout as Google's CEO took the stage at a campus event, signaling student concerns over the company's AI ethics, data practices, or labor issues. The moment underscores growing student activism at top universities around tech giants and the broader debate over responsible AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: 在谷歌 CEO 登台的斯坦福毕业典礼现场，约有200名学生退场示威，表达对公司在 AI 伦理、劳动与数据等议题的关注。这一事件凸显科技巨头在高校中的学生行动力，以及关于负责任的 AI 部署的广泛辩论。

items.title_en: Excessive nil pointer checks in Go
items.title_zh: Go 语言中过度 nil 指针检查
items.summary_en: The post argues that overusing nil-pointer checks in Go can bloat code and obscure logic, recommending a balance between defensive checks and relying on proper nil-safe patterns or error handling. Practical tips include leveraging early returns and natural zero values to reduce noise.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为在 Go 语言中过度使用 nil 指针检查会让代码臃肿、降低可读性，建议在防御性检查和使用正确的 nil 安全模式或错误处理之间取得平衡。实用建议包括提前返回、利用零值自然避免冗余检查等。

items.title_en: Trinket.io shutting down, so we saved it and hosted it a trinket.strivemath.org
items.title_zh: Trinket.io 将停运，项目被保存并托管在 trinket.strivemath.org
items.summary_en: When Trinket.io announced shutdown, the community saved and relocated projects to a dedicated domain. The move preserves educational sketches and interactive tutorials for learners and signals the importance of community-led preservation of learning tools.
items.summary_zh: Trinket.io 将停运，社区将部分项目保存并迁移至新域名以继续使用。此举保留了大量教育性代码示例和交互式教程，凸显社区在学习工具保护方面的作用。

items.title_en: There Is(Ǝ) – Such That (∋)
items.title_zh: There Is(Ǝ) – Such That (∋)
items.summary_en: Explores how existential quantification and such-that notation appear in logic, offering intuition for how constraints shape reasoning in algorithms and proofs.
items.summary_zh: 探讨存在量词（There exists）与“使得”符号在逻辑中的互动，结合例子直观展示约束如何影响算法与证明中的推理。

items.title_en: The Commodore Callback 8020 smart flip phone
items.title_zh: Commodore 的 Callback 8020 智能翻盖手机
items.summary_en: Spotlights Commodore's retro-styled 'Callback 8020' flip phone pitched as a digital detox device with modern capabilities. It exemplifies nostalgia-driven hardware that emphasizes simplicity over feature bloat.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Commodore 推出的复古风格翻盖手机 Callback 8020，定位为数字戒断设备并具备现代功能。体现了以简化为卖点的怀旧硬件趋势及其市场动机。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ember, a native iOS Hacker News reader I built around accessibility
items.title_zh: Ember：我为无障碍设计打造的原生 iOS Hacker News 阅读器
items.summary_en: Ember is a native iOS Hacker News reader focused on accessibility. It prioritizes VoiceOver compatibility, large tap targets, and clean reading modes, showing how accessible-first design can broaden who can consume tech news on mobile.
items.summary_zh: Ember 是一款原生 iOS 的 Hacker News 阅读器，聚焦无障碍体验。它优先考虑屏幕阅读器兼容性、易点击区域和简洁的阅读模式，展示了以无障碍为先的设计如何让更多人访问科技新闻。

items.title_en: Why does paper fold so well?
items.title_zh: 纸为何能折叠得这么好？
items.summary_en: An explainer delves into the physics of paper folding, showing how thickness, crease propagation, and layering govern how reliably a crease holds and how many folds you can make. The takeaway for makers is that geometry and material properties, not just technique, determine how a sheet behaves when folded.
items.summary_zh: 一则科普解说纸张折叠的物理原理，揭示厚度、皱褶传播与层叠等因素如何影响折痕的稳定性与可折叠次数。对创作者而言，关键在于几何结构与材料特性共同决定折叠时的表现。

items.title_en: Factoring "short-sleeve" RSA keys with polynomials
items.title_zh: 用多项式分解短小 RSA 密钥
items.summary_en: A recent post demonstrates factoring RSA keys with polynomial techniques, highlighting vulnerabilities when keys are insufficiently sized or poorly generated. The result underscores the importance of appropriate key sizes and safe parameter choices to prevent practical attacks. It serves as a reminder that cryptography remains highly dependent on careful implementation.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究演示了利用多项式方法分解 RSA 密钥，暴露在密钥尺寸不足或参数生成不当时的脆弱性。此结果强调了选取合适密钥长度与安全参数的重要性，以及对现代密码学安全实践的持续警示。提醒开发者在实现中保持谨慎。

items.title_en: Chaosnet (1981)
items.title_zh: Chaosnet（1981年）
items.summary_en: Chaosnet was an early campus network and a before-TCP/IP experiment in network design. This 1981 lookback highlights its protocol choices, goals, and why such projects shaped how researchers thought about interoperability and distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: Chaosnet 是早期校园网络的一次 TCP/IP 之前的实验。本文回顾 1981 年的设计要点、目标及其如何影响研究者对互联互通与分布式系统的思考。

items.title_en: How did Atari apply side art to Arcade Cabinets?
items.title_zh: Atari 如何在街机柜上应用侧面艺术
items.summary_en: Explains the design and production choices for applying side art on classic arcade cabinets, shedding light on how aesthetics shaped arcade culture.
items.summary_zh: 揭示了经典街机柜上侧面艺术的设计与制作选择，阐明美学如何塑造街机文化。

items.title_en: Making espresso with ultrasound
items.title_zh: 用超声波制作意式浓缩咖啡
items.summary_en: A novel approach uses ultrasound to assist espresso extraction or improve crema, exploring physics-driven techniques for flavor extraction. The piece connects engineering creativity with everyday coffee brewing.
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法利用超声波辅助提取浓缩咖啡或改善卡布奇诺的起泡，探讨以物理原理提升风味提取的可行性。

items.title_en: Apertus – Open Foundation Model for Sovereign AI
items.title_zh: Apertus：面向主权 AI 的开放基础模型
items.summary_en: Apertus unveils an open foundation model designed for sovereign AI deployment with data sovereignty baked in. It supports open weights and configurable safety controls to reduce dependence on centralized providers, enabling in-country hosting and governance. This matters for governments and organizations seeking transparency and autonomy in AI.
items.summary_zh: Apertus 发布一个开放的基础模型，支持主权 AI 的部署与数据自主管控。提供开源权重和可配置的安全策略，旨在降低对大型厂商的依赖，使其能在本地或受监管环境中运行。此举对政府与重视数据主权与透明度的机构尤为重要。

items.title_en: The early hiring funnel is now breaking on both ends
items.title_zh: 早期招聘渠道在两端都崩溃
items.summary_en: AI-driven changes are disrupting the early hiring funnel, creating bottlenecks on both applicant and assessment sides. The article proposes remedies like structured screening, improved candidate experience, and closer human–machine collaboration to restore flow.
items.summary_zh: AI 驱动的变革正在扰乱早期招聘漏斗，造成申请端与评估端的瓶颈。文章建议通过结构化筛选、提升候选人体验，以及加强人机协作等方式来恢复招聘流程的畅通。

items.title_en: Show HN: Talos – Open-source WASM interpreter for Lean
items.title_zh: Show HN：Talos——基于 Lean 的开源 WASM 解释器
items.summary_en: Talos is an open-source WASM interpreter implemented in Lean, emphasizing safety and potential formal verification benefits. It demonstrates a WASM runtime in a functional language and may influence future tooling for verification-focused ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Talos 是用 Lean 编写的开源 WASM 解释器，强调安全性与潜在的形式化验证优势，展示了在函数式语言中实现 WASM 运行时的可能性。

items.title_en: Show HN: machine0 – Persistent NixOS VMs You Control from the CLI
items.title_zh: Show HN: machine0 – 你可通过命令行控制的持久化 NixOS 虚拟机
items.summary_en: machine0 provides persistent NixOS VMs controllable entirely from the CLI, emphasizing reproducibility and developer ergonomics. The project aims to simplify ephemeral dev environments while keeping stable configurations under versioned control.
items.summary_zh: machine0 提供可从命令行完全控制的持久化 NixOS 虚拟机，强调可重复性与开发者友好性。该项目旨在简化一次性开发环境，同时让配置保持在版本控制中以实现稳定性。

items.title_en: Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) controllers
items.title_zh: 比例-积分-微分（PID）控制器
items.summary_en: Provides an overview of PID controllers, showing how proportional, integral, and derivative terms work together to regulate systems. Includes common tuning methods and examples across robotics and process control.
items.summary_zh: 概述 PID 控制器，解释比例、积分、微分三项如何协同作用以稳定系统，并介绍常见的调参方法及在机器人和过程控制中的应用示例。

items.title_en: Show HN: cuTile Rust: Safe, data-race-free GPU kernels in Rust
items.title_zh: cuTile Rust：在 Rust 中实现的安全、无数据竞争的 GPU 内核
items.summary_en: Show HN highlights cuTile Rust, a project that provides safe, data-race-free GPU kernels in Rust. The effort could lower the barrier to writing correct GPU code and improve reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 cuTile Rust，这一项目在 Rust 中实现了安全、无数据竞争的 GPU 内核。此举可能降低编写正确 GPU 代码的门槛并提升可重复性。

items.title_en: Zork name origin got an update on Wikipedia
items.title_zh: Zork 名称起源在维基百科获得更新
items.summary_en: New details have emerged about the origin of the name Zork, with editors adding context and anecdotes. The update sheds light on Infocom’s naming choices and early software culture that helped the game become a retro-technology icon.
items.summary_zh: 关于经典文本冒险游戏 Zork 的名称起源出现新信息，条目中增添了背景与趣闻。此次更新帮助人们了解 Infocom 早期的命名选择及游戏文化，如何让这款作品成为复古科技的标志。

items.title_en: Two Qwen3 models on one DGX Spark: the residency math
items.title_zh: 在同一 DGX Spark 上部署两个 Qwen3 模型：驻留成本研究
items.summary_en: Two Qwen3 models on a single DGX Spark explores memory sharing between models, including latency, throughput, and batch size tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: 在同一台 DGX Spark 上运行两个 Qwen3 模型，探讨模型间的显存共享、以及延迟、吞吐与批量大小等权衡。文章聚焦单一加速器上部署多模型的实际限制。

items.title_en: Inference cost at scale with napkin math
items.title_zh: 用随手算方法估算大规模推理成本
items.summary_en: A quick back-of-the-envelope method to estimate the cost of large-scale model inference, factoring in model size, throughput, hardware, and cloud pricing. The post shows how napkin math can guide budgeting and optimization decisions.
items.summary_zh: 给出一个用随手算方法估算大规模模型推理成本的简易框架，考虑模型大小、吞吐量、硬件与云价格等因素，帮助预算规划与优化决策。

items.title_en: After AI Takes Everything
items.title_zh: 在 AI 接管一切之后
items.summary_en: A provocative meditation on a world where AI handles a large share of work, prompting questions about labor, meaning, and human agency. The piece argues for rethinking education, policy, and governance to adapt to pervasive automation.
items.summary_zh: 对 AI 接管大部分工作后的世界进行前瞻性的反思，提出关于劳动、意义与人类自主性的问题。文章主张从教育、政策和治理层面重新定位，以适应普遍的自动化。

items.title_en: Show HN: We post-trained a model that pen tests instead of refusing
items.title_zh: Show HN：后训练的模型倾向于进行渗透测试而非拒绝
items.summary_en: It raises dual-use concerns and questions how such tools should be governed, but also hints at potential automation of security testing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该帖子介绍了一种对模型进行后续训练后，倾向于执行渗透测试而非因安全原因拒绝的做法。这引发双重用途的担忧，并提出对这类工具治理的讨论，同时也暗示了安全测试流程自动化的潜在可能。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built 184 free browser tools – PDF, image, dev, AI tasks, no upload
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了184个免费浏览器工具——无需上传的 PDF、图片、开发与 AI 任务
items.summary_en: Show HN: I built 184 free browser tools – PDF, image, dev, AI tasks, no upload. These browser-based tools run entirely in the client, emphasizing privacy-preserving capabilities and accessibility for quick tasks.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我构建了184个免费浏览器工具——PDF、图片、开发与 AI 任务，全部在本地执行且不上传数据。此类工具强调隐私保护与快速完成常见任务的可用性。

items.title_en: NetNewsWire Status
items.title_zh: NetNewsWire 状态更新
items.summary_en: An update on NetNewsWire’s development status, including recent fixes and potential roadmap changes. It signals ongoing maintenance and interest in open-source feed-reading tooling.
items.summary_zh: NetNewsWire 的开发进展更新，包含最近的修复与潜在的路线图变更，显示该开源新闻提要工具仍在维护与发展。

items.title_en: The hacker sent by Anthropic to calm the government's nerves about AI safety
items.title_zh: Anthropic 派出黑客安抚政府对 AI 安全的担忧
items.summary_en: Anthropic tapped a security researcher to address government concerns about AI safety, aiming to demonstrate robust safeguards and timelines.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 派出一名安全研究员向政府演示 AI 安全措施，意在缓解监管者的担忧并争取信任。文章梳理了展示测试与演示的做法，并探讨这对行业与政府沟通的意义。

items.title_en: Seven Perfect Shuffles Randomize a Deck of Cards. But How Many Sloppy Ones?
items.title_zh: 七次完整洗牌就能实现充分乱序？但还要多少次粗糙的洗牌才够？
items.summary_en: Seven perfect shuffles suffice to randomize a deck; the article questions how many sloppy, imperfect shuffles are needed to achieve true randomness, using entropy and probability.
items.summary_zh: 七次完整洗牌就能实现充分乱序？文章用熵与概率探讨需要多少次‘不完美’洗牌才能达到真正的随机性。

items.title_en: The Harajuku Moment (2024)
items.title_zh: 原宿时刻
items.summary_en: The Harajuku Moment discusses how subcultures and niche aesthetics can drive mainstream innovation, as communities experiment and share ideas quickly. It's a lens on rapid cultural shifts fueling tech and creative cycles.
items.summary_zh: 《原宿时刻》探讨了子文化与小众美学如何推动主流创新，社群快速试验并分享创意。它揭示了加速的文化转变如何促发科技与创意的循环。

items.title_en: Segmented type appreciation corner (2018)
items.title_zh: 分段字体欣赏角落（2018）
items.summary_en: A 2018 feature celebrating segmented typography, exploring its history, aesthetics, and practical use in branding and UI. The piece delves into how segmented type creates distinctive legibility and personality, and offers tips for designers.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇 2018 年的分段字体欣赏文章，探讨其历史、美学与在品牌和界面设计中的实用性。文章分析分段字体如何塑造辨识度与个性，并给设计师提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Ask for no, don't ask for yes (2022)
items.title_zh: 先问不要，再问要不要（2022）
items.summary_en: Introduces a negotiation tactic: asking for a 'no' can reduce anxiety and yield clearer commitments. The piece offers practical tips for framing requests and handling responses in professional settings.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种谈判技巧：先让对方说“不”可以降低心理防备并促成更清晰的承诺。文中给出在专业情境中提出请求、处理回应的实用建议。

items.title_en: A 1969 camera operators' strike created Upstairs Downstairs multiverse
items.title_zh: 1969 年摄影机操作员罢工催生的 Upstairs Downstairs 平行宇宙
items.summary_en: During a 1969 strike by camera operators, TV production color handling diverged, effectively creating multiple visual variants of Upstairs, Downstairs. The piece uses this historical quirk to illustrate how production constraints can shape archival color and viewer perception, producing a kind of 'color multiverse' in classic television.
items.summary_zh: 1969 年摄影机操作员罢工影响了电视制作，导致 Upstairs, Downstairs 出现了不同版本的色彩处理，形成视觉上的‘平行宇宙’。文章借此历史趣事揭示制作约束如何影响档案色彩与观众感知，以及色彩在电视史中的作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: We built an 8-bit CPU as 2nd year EE students
items.title_zh: Show HN：二年级电子工程学生打造的8位 CPU
items.summary_en: A student project delivering a functioning 8-bit CPU design, likely implemented in HDL or a hardware description language. The write-up showcases pedagogy and how hands-on hardware projects teach fundamentals of architecture.
items.summary_zh: 二年级电子工程学生完成的8位 CPU 实践展示，体现了在硬件原型设计与计算机体系结构教育中的动手能力。该项目让人直观理解指令解码与微架构等基本概念。

items.title_en: Vinyl Cache and Varnish Cache
items.title_zh: Vinyl Cache 与 Varnish Cache
items.summary_en: Vinyl Cache and Varnish Cache compare caching strategies and performance considerations, illustrating how different caching layers influence throughput and latency.
items.summary_zh: Vinyl Cache 与 Varnish Cache 对比了缓存策略与性能要点，说明不同缓存层对吞吐量与延迟的影响。

items.title_en: 'Wow, it really worked ': 70s TV show causing worldwide panic today
items.title_zh: “哇，真的管用吗？”：70年代电视剧引发全球恐慌
items.summary_en: The 1977 mockumentary Alternative 3 is trending again, with people misinterpreting it as real and panic spreading worldwide decades after its release. The piece explains how media hoaxes can resurface and influence public perception.
items.summary_zh: 70 年代伪纪录片《Alternative 3》再次走热，因部分人误以为其为真实事件而在全球引发恐慌。文章解析媒体骗局如何反复出现、影响公众认知。

items.title_en: Abu Fanous
items.title_zh: Abu Fanous（阿布·范努斯）
items.summary_en: Biographical overview of Abu Fanous, a key figure in traditional and modern Arabic calligraphy who codified canonical scripts and influenced typography and education.
items.summary_zh: 简要介绍阿布·范努斯，一位在传统与现代阿拉伯书法领域具有重要影响的人物，奠定了规范化字体书写风格并影响了排版与教育。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is anyone using the A2A protocol?
items.title_zh: 询问 HN：有人在使用 A2A 协议吗？
items.summary_en: A Hacker News post asks whether developers are adopting the A2A protocol, and what benefits or challenges they’ve seen. Responses illuminate practical integration considerations, tooling, and interoperability questions for agent-to-agent communication.
items.summary_zh: HN 上有帖问及开发者是否在使用 A2A 协议，以及遇到的优点和挑战。讨论聚焦于代理间通信的实际集成、工具链和互操作性等问题。

items.title_en: Semiconductor Lifeline Keeps Fighter Jets in the Air
items.title_zh: 半导体遗产芯片让战机继续飞行
items.summary_en: A look at how legacy semiconductors keep fighter jets operational, highlighting the fragility of modern supply chains and the importance of long-lived components in aerospace.
items.summary_zh: 文章阐述遗留半导体如何维持战机运行，凸显现代供应链的脆弱性以及航空航天对长期可靠组件的重要性。

items.title_en: Sogen – High-performance Windows and Linux userspace emulator
items.title_zh: Sogen —— 高性能的 Windows 与 Linux 用户态模拟器
items.summary_en: Sogen offers a high-performance userspace emulator that runs on Windows and Linux, enabling cross-OS testing without full virtualization. It emphasizes speed and low overhead, making it easier to test software across architectures.
items.summary_zh: Sogen 提供一款在 Windows 与 Linux 上运行的高性能用户态模拟器，便于在不进行完整虚拟化的情况下进行跨操作系统的测试。该项目强调速度和低开销，便于在不同架构上测试软件。

items.title_en: DOJ claims xAI's gas turbines are a matter of 'national and energy security'
items.title_zh: 司法部称 xAI 的燃气涡轮机事关国家与能源安全
items.summary_en: The DOJ positions xAI's gas turbines as critical to national and energy security, signaling potential regulatory and export-control actions around high-end AI infrastructure. This framing suggests hardware used to power large AI models could become a focal point for policy enforcement and compliance requirements.
items.summary_zh: 司法部将 xAI 的燃气涡轮机定位为关乎国家与能源安全的关键资产，预示可能加强对高端 AI 基础设施的出口管制与监管行动。这一表态凸显用于支撑大规模 AI 模型的硬件正成为政策执行的重点对象，企业需关注合规与风险。

items.title_en: Exploring building a tiny FUSE filesystem
items.title_zh: 探索构建一个小型的 FUSE 文件系统
items.summary_en: A concise journey building a tiny FUSE filesystem, outlining the core interfaces and minimal kernel-user space interactions, plus practical gotchas for performance and reliability. It’s a pragmatic dive into user-space filesystem development for hobbyists and learners.
items.summary_zh: 简要记录搭建一个极小的 FUSE 文件系统的过程，梳理核心接口以及最小化的内核–用户空间交互，并给出性能与可靠性方面的实用注意点。适合爱好者与初学者的实用开发指南。

items.title_en: The UK's new under-16 social media ban will cause more harm than it prevents
items.title_zh: 英国未满16岁社媒禁令将弊大于利
items.summary_en: Britain plans to block or restrict social media access for under-16s, with platforms bearing penalties for non-compliance. Critics warn the policy may push teens toward unregulated spaces, undermining safety benefits and raising privacy concerns.
items.summary_zh: 英国拟对未满16岁的用户实施社交媒体访问限制，违规平台将面临处罚。批评者认为此举可能促使青少年转向未监管的区域，削弱安全效益并引发隐私问题。

items.title_en: Agentic Resource Discovery Specification
items.title_zh: 代理式资源发现规范
items.summary_en: A new specification for agentic resource discovery outlines how autonomous agents should locate and reference resources safely and efficiently. It aims to standardize interactions, improving interoperability and reducing risk in multi-agent systems.
items.summary_zh: 一份代理式资源发现的新规范提出了自治代理如何安全、高效地定位和引用资源的标准做法，旨在提升跨系统的互操作性并降低多代理环境的风险。

items.title_en: Project Fetch: Phase Two
items.title_zh: Fetch 项目：第二阶段
items.summary_en: Project Fetch Phase Two expands research into alignment and capability safety, detailing new experiments, evaluation methods, and how to make AI systems more robust and controllable.
items.summary_zh: Fetch 项目第二阶段扩展了对对齐与能力安全的研究，介绍了新的实验、评估方法，以及如何让 AI 系统更稳健、可控。

items.title_en: Show HN: Microcrad – Micrograd Reimplemented in C
