items.title_zh: Show HN：Microcrad——用 C 语言重新实现的 Micrograd
items.summary_en: Microcrad is a C reimplementation of Micrograd, a tiny autograd library. The project demonstrates portability and performance benefits of a low-level autodiff toolkit and invites comparisons with Python-based originals.
items.summary_zh: Microcrad 是对 Micrograd 的 C 语言重新实现，展示了低级自动微分工具的可移植性与性能潜力，并与原有的 Python 实现进行对比。

items.title_en: Made a free macOS menu bar app that fixes typing in the wrong keyboard layout
items.title_zh: 一个免费的 macOS 菜单栏应用，修正错误的键盘布局输入
items.summary_en: A free macOS menu-bar utility helps correct typing when the active keyboard layout mismatches the expected layout, reducing ergonomic friction for multilingual users. It’s lightweight, easy to install, and saves time on workflow interruptions.
items.summary_zh: 一个免费的 macOS 菜单栏小工具，能在键盘布局错配时自动纠正输入，减少多语言用户的工作中断和切换成本。体积小、易安装，提升工作流流畅度。

items.title_en: From Chesterton's fence to Chesterton's gap
items.title_zh: 从 Chesterton 的栅栏到 Chesterton 的缝隙
items.summary_en: The essay reframes Chesterton’s Fence as Chesterton’s Gap, urging readers to question whether a precautionary rule should block progress or enable deliberate experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 文章把 Chesterton 的 Fence 重塑为 Gap，主张在保守规则与创新之间做出有意的试验，不应让恐惧阻止前进。

items.title_en: Vacation With An Artist – Mini-Apprenticeships with Artists in Their Studios
items.title_zh: Vacation With An Artist：在艺术家工作室的迷你学徒制
items.summary_en: Vacation With An Artist offers mini-apprenticeships where visitors learn directly in artists’ studios. The model blends travel with hands-on creative mentorship, supporting artists while giving patrons deeper immersion in the creative process.
items.summary_zh: Vacation With An Artist 提供在艺术家工作室进行的短期学徒制，游客可以亲身学习并获得导师指导。这种模式把旅行与创意实践结合起来，既支持艺术家，也让参与者深入体验创作过程。

items.title_en: The 2-Year Apartment Rule
items.title_zh: 两年公寓规则
items.summary_en: Explores a rule advocating two years in an apartment and discusses the financial and lifestyle trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在公寓居住两年的规则及其在财务与生活方式上的权衡。

items.title_en: Reviews have become expensive, rewrites have become cheap
items.title_zh: 评论变得昂贵，改写变得便宜
items.summary_en: A concise typology of how modern editing workflows shift heavy burden from reviewers to rewrite steps, noting that while human reviews are expensive, content rewrites—often aided by AI—are becoming cheap and fast.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出编辑与审核的成本正在向前移：人工评审成本高，而在 AI 辅助下的改写却越来越便宜、迅速。它探讨了对出版、软件开发与质量控制的影响，并呼吁在人工智能时代重新设计评审流程。

items.title_en: Ponytail – make your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room
items.title_zh: Ponytail：让 AI 助手像最懒的资深开发者一样思考
items.summary_en: Ponytail is a tool to steer AI agents toward the pragmatic, low-effort reasoning style of a senior developer, emphasizing efficient prompts and sensible defaults. It aims to improve reliability and speed of AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: Ponytail 是一个工具，帮助 AI 代理模仿资深开发者的务实、低成本思维方式，强调高效提示与合理默认。目标是提升 AI 辅助编码的可靠性与速度。

items.title_en: "No Feigning Surprise"
items.title_zh: "No Feigning Surprise" 漫画
items.summary_en: An ultra-short comic capturing a crisp, honest reaction to an unexpected moment. The minimalist storytelling leans into humor and skepticism, offering a quick reflection on how we respond to surprises.
items.summary_zh: 这部极短的漫画以简洁笔触呈现对突发情景的真诚反应，带有幽默感与克制。通过极简的叙事，探讨我们在面对意外时的情绪与判断力。

items.title_en: Agentic coding deserves more than a chat box bolted onto VS Code
items.title_zh: 代理式编码不应只是挂在 VS Code 上的一个聊天框
items.summary_en: Agentic coding argues for more than a chatbot embedded in VS Code. It advocates building autonomous AI agents that actively assist coding tasks, with better UX, reliability, and governance to avoid brittle, chat-only interfaces. The idea pushes for a richer integration of agency in development tools.
items.summary_zh: 代理式编码的主张不仅限于在 VS Code 中嵌入一个聊天机器人，而是让 AI 代理真实参与编码工作，并提升用户体验、可靠性与治理，避免只靠聊天界面的脆弱性。这一思路推动开发工具更充分地集成“代理能力”。

items.title_en: Show HN: Veterinarian turned founder, AI lawn diagnosis
items.title_zh: 兽医出身的创始人：AI 草坪诊断
items.summary_en: A veterinarian-turned-founder launches an AI-powered lawn diagnosis product, illustrating how domain expertise can spawn niche ML startups. The story covers the pivot, product development, and early lessons in customer validation.
items.summary_zh: 一位从兽医转行的创始人推出了基于 AI 的草坪诊断服务，通过照片识别草坪问题。文章讲述其从临床转向创业的经历以及早期的产品验证教训。

items.title_en: Semiclassical Gravity Efficiently Solves NP-Complete Problems
items.title_zh: 半经典引力高效解决 NP-完全问题
items.summary_en: A theoretical paper claims a semiclassical gravity framework can efficiently solve NP-complete problems, challenging conventional views on computational hardness. The claim invites scrutiny and replication in the physics and CS communities.
items.summary_zh: 一篇理论论文声称半经典引力框架能高效解决 NP-完全问题，这一主张挑战了传统的计算难度观。该结论需要在物理学与计算机科学界进一步评估和复现。

items.title_en: HPV jabs cut risk of dying from cervical cancer before 30 to almost zero
items.title_zh: HPV 疫苗显著降低30岁前宫颈癌死亡风险
items.summary_en: New study shows HPV vaccination before age 30 dramatically lowers risk of death from cervical cancer, approaching near-zero. The result reinforces the public health value of early vaccination and supports policies to boost coverage.
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示30岁前接种 HPV 疫苗能显著降低因宫颈癌死亡的风险，风险接近零。这一结果进一步强调早期疫苗接种的公共卫生价值，并支持提升覆盖率的政策。

items.title_en: Pentagon boasts of using AI to write reports mandated by Congress (1.5mil users)
items.title_zh: 五角大楼称使用 AI 为国会要求的报告撰写提供支持（约 150 万用户）
items.summary_en: The Pentagon touts AI-assisted drafting of Congress-mandated reports used by about 1.5 million users. The claim raises questions about oversight, transparency, and the reliability of AI-generated government documents.
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼称使用 AI 来起草国会要求的报告，影响约 150 万用户。这一说法引发对监管、透明度以及 AI 生成的政府文档可靠性的讨论。

items.title_en: Foreign business owners are scrambling to raise capital to stay in Japan
items.title_zh: 外国企业主正在拼命筹资以留在日本
items.summary_en: Foreign business owners in Japan are scrambling to raise capital to stay in the country, signaling tightening funding conditions and regulatory or visa pressures for non-Japanese operators.
items.summary_zh: 日本的外国企业主正在拼命筹集资金以留在日本，这反映出融资环境收紧以及对非日籍经营者的签证与监管压力。该文章凸显了外国资本企业的困境及其对日本创业生态的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: My Windows XP portfolio with working Game Boy and iPod
items.title_zh: 我的 Windows XP 作品集，包含可运行的 Game Boy 与 iPod
items.summary_en: A Windows XP-era portfolio showcases a working Game Boy and iPod experience, blending retro hardware with modern presentation. It’s a nostalgic demonstration of emulation, hardware hacking, and the enduring appeal of vintage computing.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Windows XP 风格的作品集，展示可运行的 Game Boy 与 iPod，融合了复古硬件与现代展示，体现对仿真、硬件改造与怀旧技术的热爱。

items.title_en: US Scientist John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
items.title_zh: 美国科学家 John Jumper 将离开 Google DeepMind 加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: John Jumper, a leading AI researcher, is leaving DeepMind to join Anthropic, signaling a high-profile shift in AI safety leadership.
items.summary_zh: AI 领域知名研究者 John Jumper 将离开 Google DeepMind 转投 Anthropic，标志着 AI 安全研究领域的高层人事变动。

items.title_en: The hallucinogenic mushroom that contains no known psychedelic
items.title_zh: 不含已知致幻成分却能致幻的蘑菇
items.summary_en: A report highlights a mushroom genus linked to feeling high without containing known psychedelic compounds, prompting questions about misidentification, toxins, or novel chemistry.
items.summary_zh: 报道聚焦一种蘑菇属在不含已知致幻成分的情况下仍让人产生幻觉，引发对误认、毒性或新型化学成分的讨论。文章探讨这对公众对致幻剂理解的影响，以及未来研究的可能方向。

items.title_en: Show HN: 3D print Z reinforcement via injected loops
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过注入环实现的 Z 轴加固的 3D 打印方法
items.summary_en: Show HN: a low-cost technique to reinforce the Z-axis in 3D prints by injecting loops into the print path. The approach reduces wobble and improves rigidity, and is accessible to hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：通过在打印中注入环来强化 Z 轴，成本低且易于实施，能减少晃动、提高刚性，适合爱好者尝试。

items.title_en: Everything Is Logarithms
items.title_zh: 一切都是对数
items.summary_en: Many real-world relationships reveal linear structure when plotted on a log scale, making comparisons across orders of magnitude practical. The piece connects this idea to data visualization, ML, and decision-making, arguing that the right scale reveals hidden patterns. Embracing logarithmic thinking can sharpen models and dashboards.
items.summary_zh: 许多现实世界的关系在对数坐标下呈现线性，使跨数量级的比较更加实用。本文将这一观念与数据可视化、机器学习和决策制定联系起来，强调选择合适的尺度能揭示隐藏的模式。掌握对数思维有助于提升建模与仪表盘的清晰度。

items.title_en: Millimeter wave technology drills 100 meters into granite
items.title_zh: 毫米波技术将钻探深度推至花岗岩100米
items.summary_en: Millimeter-wave drilling pushes to 100 meters into granite, showcasing ultra-high-frequency drilling methods with potential implications for subsurface resource exploration and geothermal applications.
items.summary_zh: 毫米波钻探将钻深推至花岗岩 100 米，展示超高频钻探方法，对地下资源勘探和地热应用具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Asciline – real-time ASCII video rendering engine
items.title_zh: Asciline：实时 ASCII 视频渲染引擎
items.summary_en: Asciline is a real-time ASCII video renderer that converts video frames into ASCII art on the fly, enabling lightweight, terminal-friendly previews or retro aesthetics. The project demonstrates efficient streaming and clever text-based rendering techniques that can run with minimal dependencies.
items.summary_zh: Asciline 是一个实时的 ASCII 视频渲染引擎，能够在传输过程中将视频帧转换成 ASCII 艺术，适合轻量级终端预览和复古风格。该项目展示了高效流式处理和文本渲染技术，依赖极少。

items.title_en: A tale of two path separators
items.title_zh: 两个路径分隔符的故事
items.summary_en: The piece contrasts Windows-style backslashes with POSIX forward slashes, highlighting pitfalls in cross‑platform path handling and the importance of using standard library path utilities to normalize paths. It also touches on historical and design reasons behind the divergence.
items.summary_zh: 文章对 Windows 的反斜杠和 POSIX 的正斜杠进行了对照，指出跨平台路径处理中的坑点以及使用标准库路径工具进行归一化的重要性，并简要解释分歧背后的历史与设计原因。

items.title_en: Frood, an Alpine Initramfs NAS (2024)
items.title_zh: Frood：一个基于 Alpine 的 Initramfs NAS
items.summary_en: Frood is a compact NAS built as an Alpine-based initramfs image, aiming for quick boot and a tiny footprint. It showcases how initramfs can underpin lightweight, portable NAS deployments.
items.summary_zh: Frood 是一个基于 Alpine 的 Initramfs NAS，以极小镜像实现快速启动和轻量运行，便于便携部署。它展示了用 initramfs 构建轻量级网络存储的可行性。

items.title_en: Guide to the TD4 4-bit DIY CPU
items.title_zh: TD4 四位 DIY CPU 指南
items.summary_en: The TD4 4-bit CPU guide walks through a tiny processor design, including instruction set basics and construction hints for hobbyists. It serves as a hands-on primer on how simple CPUs operate and why architectural decisions matter even at small scales.
items.summary_zh: TD4 是一个4位处理器：本指南介绍基础指令集、架构要点与爱好者搭建的实用建议。通过动手实践，帮助读者理解简单 CPU 的工作原理，以及为何小型规模的架构决策也很关键。

items.title_en: Did my old job only exist because of fraud?
items.title_zh: 我的旧工作是不是只是因为欺诈而存在？
items.summary_en: Questioning whether some roles exist due to misaligned incentives or fraud, the piece explores the fragility of certain job markets and the potential for automation. It advocates for transparency, better verification, and data-driven evaluation of roles rather than anecdotal narratives.
items.summary_zh: 质疑某些岗位是否因激励错位或欺诈而存在，探讨了部分职业市场的脆弱性与自动化的潜在影响。倡导提高透明度、强化核验，并以数据驱动来评估岗位，而非仅凭主观叙述。

items.title_en: Commodore Releases Flip Phone
items.title_zh: Commodore 推出翻盖手机
items.summary_en: Commodore launches a flip phone, reviving the classic form factor with modern internals. The device targets nostalgia-driven buyers and hobbyists, signaling renewed interest in branded hardware.
items.summary_zh: Commodore 推出翻盖手机，将复古外形与现代硬件结合，面向爱好者与收藏者。该机型借助怀旧品牌，试图在现今市场复兴对该类硬件的兴趣。

items.title_en: OpenAI Losses Increased Nearly 8X in 2025, with Spending Hitting $34B
items.title_zh: OpenAI 损失在 2025 年近增八倍，支出达 340 亿美元
items.summary_en: OpenAI's financials indicate losses surged nearly eightfold in 2025, with expenditure around $34 billion as the company scales compute, talent, and R&D. The numbers underscore the high cost of building leading AI systems and the ongoing pressure to monetize via products, partnerships, or enterprise offerings.
items.summary_zh: 公开财报显示，OpenAI 2025 年亏损近八倍，支出约 340 亿美元，反映出在计算资源、人才与研发上的巨额投入。数字凸显打造前沿 AI 系统的高成本，以及通过产品化、伙伴关系等方式实现盈利的挑战。

items.title_en: The Cold War's Accidental Whale Observatory
items.title_zh: 冷战时期的意外鲸鱼观测站
items.summary_en: Long-baseline acoustic arrays built to track Soviet submarines accidentally yielded whale data, enabling scientists to study migrations and acoustics. This shows how military infrastructure can spur unexpected scientific insights.
items.summary_zh: 冷战时期用于追踪苏联潜艇的声学阵列意外为鲸类研究提供了数据，推动了对鲸群迁徙和声学行为的理解。这展示了军事基础设施在科学研究中的意外价值。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Drafted (YC P26) – Models for residential architecture
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Drafted（YC 第26期）— 为住宅建筑设计的模型
items.summary_en: Drafted from YC's batch 26 presents models geared toward residential architecture, enabling AI-assisted design workflows. The project signals growing interest in applying AI to housing design and planning.
items.summary_zh: Drafted 提供面向住宅建筑的模型，帮助建立 AI 辅助的设计工作流程。这体现了将 AI 应用于住宅设计与规划的日益增长的兴趣和潜力。

items.title_en: Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz, accusing Israel, US of violating truce
items.title_zh: 伊朗宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡，指控以色列与美国违反停火
items.summary_en: Iran claims to close the Strait of Hormuz and accuses Israel and the US of violating a truce. The move risks disrupting global oil shipments and heightens regional tensions.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡，指控以色列与美国违反停火。此举将增加全球原油运输中断的风险，并加剧区域紧张局势。

items.title_en: Why has the pointe shoe been so resistant to change?
items.title_zh: 为何 pointe 鞋在变革上如此迟缓？
items.summary_en: This piece explains why pointe shoes have resisted modernisation, highlighting safety concerns, tradition, and manufacturing constraints that slow adoption of new designs.
items.summary_zh: 本文解释了 pointe 鞋为何难以实现现代化，强调安全性、传统观念和制造工艺的限制导致新设计的采用进展缓慢。

items.title_en: TREX: An AI code reviewer that runs your code
items.title_zh: TREX：一个能实际运行代码的 AI 代码评审工具
items.summary_en: TREX is an AI code reviewer that actually runs your code in a sandbox to validate behavior, not just static analysis. This dynamic approach helps catch runtime bugs and security issues that static reviews can miss, though it introduces execution-safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: TREX 是一个能实际运行代码来进行审查的 AI 代码评审工具，通过在沙箱中执行代码来发现运行时问题与安全隐患，超越了静态分析的范围。

items.title_en: Digital Printing of Arabic: explaining the problem
items.title_zh: 阿拉伯文印刷的难题：问题解析
items.summary_en: The article outlines the core challenges of rendering Arabic text in digital printing, including contextual shaping, ligatures, bidirectional layout, and diacritics. It explains why Arabic typesetting requires sophisticated shaping engines to preserve correct forms.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了在数字印刷中呈现阿拉伯文时的独特挑战，包括字形的上下文变化、连字、双向排版、元音标记以及字体排版引擎的工作原理。还讨论了排版系统需要如何处理上下文与书法规范以呈现正确的字形。

items.title_en: A 1976 university experiment spun up the U.S. wind industry
items.title_zh: 1976 年的一项大学研究推动了美国现代风能产业
items.summary_en: A 1976 university study catalyzed the modern U.S. wind industry by highlighting feasibility and policy momentum at the time. It helped attract investment and policy attention during the energy crisis era. The piece underscores how academic work can spark a national-scale clean energy sector.
items.summary_zh: 1976 年的一项大学研究推动了美国现代风能产业的发展，凸显了风电的可行性并推动当时的政策与投资热潮。在能源危机背景下，这项工作被视为点燃国家级清洁能源产业的重要催化剂。

items.title_en: The 90-year-old idea behind JEPA models: Canonical Correlation Analysis
items.title_zh: JEPA 模型背后的 90 年前思想：Canonical Correlation Analysis
items.summary_en: A retrospective explains that the core idea driving JEPA-style models—finding correlated representations across modalities—dates back to Canonical Correlation Analysis, a 90-year-old statistical method. The post shows how simple, elegant linear alignment ideas still underpin some modern embeddings, with implications for multimodal AI and interpretability.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾指出推动 JEPA 模型的核心思路——跨模态相关表示对齐，最早可追溯到 90 年前的 canonical correlation analysis（CCA）。文章展示了简单而优雅的线性对齐思想如何仍然支撑着现代多模态嵌入，并对多模态 AI 的可解释性提出启示。

items.title_en: Prove you're human by winning a claw machine
items.title_zh: 通过抓娃娃机证明你是人类
items.summary_en: A playful CAPTCHA concept replaces traditional challenges with a claw-machine game, letting humans prove themselves by winning a prize. The idea foregrounds gamified verification but raises questions about accessibility and practicality at scale.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的验证码设想用抓娃娃机游戏取代传统测试，让人类通过赢得奖品来证明身份。该思路强调了游戏化验证的趣味性，同时也提出了无障碍性与规模化应用的现实问题。

items.title_en: USB Power Delivery: Plugging into the Benefits
items.title_zh: USB Power Delivery：深入挖掘其优势
items.summary_en: USB Power Delivery enables higher wattage and smarter power negotiation across devices, enabling faster charging and thinner devices. It also supports universal cables and better battery management.
items.summary_zh: USB Power Delivery 通过更高的供电能力和更智能的协商实现更快充电和更薄的设备设计。它推动通用数据线和更高效的电池管理。

items.title_en: Fable Converted Pylint to Rust
items.title_zh: Fable 将 Pylint 转换为 Rust
items.summary_en: A Rust rewrite of Pylint by Fable promises dramatically faster Python linting and lower CPU usage on large repos. The project demonstrates how rewriting a core tooling component in Rust can yield significant performance gains while staying compatible with Python tooling.
items.summary_zh: Fable 将 Pylint 重写为 Rust，承诺在大型代码库上实现显著更快的 Python 代码静态分析并降低 CPU 占用。该项目展示了将核心工具组件用 Rust 重实现如何带来可观的性能提升，同时保持与 Python 工具链的兼容性。

items.title_en: An O(x)Caml book that runs
items.title_zh: An O(x)Caml 书籍能跑起来
items.summary_en: An experimental OCaml book that runs, enabling readers to execute code examples in place. The project demonstrates how executable textbooks can improve learning and reduce friction for readers exploring functional programming.
items.summary_zh: 一个能够运行的 OCaml 书籍项目，读者可直接在书中执行代码示例。此举展示了可运行教科书在提升学习体验、降低门槛方面的潜力，特别是在函数式编程学习中。

items.title_en: Using AI to improve a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.title_zh: 用 AI 改善药物化学中的一项复杂反应
items.summary_en: AI is used to optimize a difficult medicinal-chemistry reaction, predicting conditions, yields, and possible catalysts to accelerate lab work. The approach demonstrates how AI can shorten discovery timelines and reduce costly trial-and-error experiments in drug development.
items.summary_zh: 通过 AI 来优化药物化学中的一项复杂反应，预测条件、产率和潜在催化剂，加速实验室工作流程。这一做法展示了 AI 如何缩短药物发现周期，降低昂贵的试错成本。

items.title_en: KDE Plasma 6.7 Released
items.title_zh: KDE Plasma 6.7 已发布
items.summary_en: Plasma 6.7 ships with usability refinements, performance improvements, and stability fixes across Wayland and X11. It sports UI tweaks and ongoing modernization of KDE’s desktop experience, with better multi-monitor support and smoother animations. The update continues KDE's cadence of regular, incremental improvements.
items.summary_zh: Plasma 6.7 对 KDE 桌面进行了可用性细化、性能改进和稳定性修复，涵盖 Wayland 与 X11 的表现。新版本在用户界面和桌面体验上继续推陈出新，提升多显示器支持和动画流畅度，体现 KDE 桌面生态的持续更新节奏。

items.title_en: A Nipkow Disk Mechanical TV Simulator
items.title_zh: 尼普科盘机械电视模拟器
items.summary_en: A project simulates early mechanical television using a Nipkow disk, illustrating how a rotating disk scanned images line by line. It’s a practical demonstration of historical tech and a gateway for hands-on learning.
items.summary_zh: 该项目通过尼普科盘模拟早期机械电视，展示了如何用旋转盘逐行扫描图像。这是对历史技术的实际演示，也是动手学习的入门。

items.title_en: A short history of Cerro Torre, the most controversial mountain (2012)
items.title_zh: Cerro Torre 的简史：最具争议的山峰（2012）
items.summary_en: A concise history of Cerro Torre, the Patagonian peak famed for its dramatic climbs and controversial ascent disputed by climbers and guidebooks, tracing expeditions, contested routes, and the ethics of style in extreme mountaineering.
items.summary_zh: 简要回顾巴塔哥尼亚 Cerro Torre 的历史——因极端攀登、被质疑的攀登记录以及对“风格与伦理”的持续辩论而著称。文章梳理了多次探险、被争议的路线，以及极限攀登中的风格问题。

items.title_en: TorchCodec 0.14: HDR Video Decoding for CPU and CUDA, and Fast Wav Decoder
items.title_zh: TorchCodec 0.14：CPU 与 CUDA 的 HDR 视频解码，以及快速 WAV 解码器
items.summary_en: TorchCodec 0.14 adds HDR video decoding support on CPU and CUDA, expanding hardware-accelerated media processing for PyTorch workflows, plus a fast WAV decoder to speed audio paths. The update targets ML and media apps needing efficient, high-quality video and audio handling.
items.summary_zh: TorchCodec 0.14 增加了对 CPU 与 CUDA 的 HDR 视频解码支持，提升 PyTorch 工作流中的多媒体处理能力，并提供一个快速 WAV 解码器以加速音频路径。此次更新面向需要高效、质量并重的视频与音频处理的机器学习与多媒体应用。

items.title_en: Horizons JPL Solar System Data Demo and NASA DSN Updates: Datastar, Common Lisp
items.title_zh: Horizons JPL 太阳系数据演示及 NASA DSN 更新：Datastar 与 Common Lisp
items.summary_en: The Horizons data demo showcases solar-system ephemerides and NASA DSN status, with updates to Datastar. It also notes the use of Common Lisp in workflows, illustrating the tooling ecosystem behind space missions.
items.summary_zh: Horizons 数据演示展示太阳系历书数据和 NASA 深空网络状态，提及 Datastar 的更新，以及在工作流中使用 Common Lisp，体现太空任务背后的工具生态。

items.title_en: An Embedded Linux on a Single Floppy
items.title_zh: 单一软盘上的嵌入式 Linux
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a tiny embedded Linux that can run from a single floppy disk, illustrating constraints-driven design and the feasibility of ultra-small systems. A useful reference for retro computing and constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: 展示可从单张软盘启动的极小型嵌入式 Linux，体现了在资源受限环境下的设计可行性。对复古计算和约束驱动的嵌入式项目具有参考意义。

items.title_en: Quivers: A year of linear algebra by drawing arrows
items.title_zh: Quivers：用画箭头来学习线性代数的一年
items.summary_en: Quivers uses arrows and directed graphs to visualize linear algebra concepts over a year-long exploration. The approach aims to build intuition for vector spaces, linear maps, and transformations.
items.summary_zh: 通过用箭头和有向图来直观呈现线性代数概念，这是一年中的学习尝试。该方法帮助理解向量空间、线性映射与变换。

items.title_en: Russell Vought is going to destroy American Science
items.title_zh: Russell Vought 将毁掉美国科学
items.summary_en: This provocative piece argues that the proposed reforms to federal science policy under the Office of Management and Budget will undermine scientific independence, funding, and accountability. It highlights potential policy shifts affecting research funding, grant processes, and regulatory oversight, with implications for researchers and tech startups.
items.summary_zh: 这篇有争议的文章认为，预算办公室拟议的联邦科学政策改革将削弱科学独立性、资助和问责制，带来潜在负面影响。文章讨论了对研究经费、资助流程及监管的可能变动，以及对科研人员和科技创业公司的影响。

items.title_en: Everything Is BOM: Bill of Materials Encyclopedia
items.title_zh: 一切都是 BOM：物料清单百科全书
items.summary_en: Everything Is BOM argues that software and hardware products rely on a comprehensive bill of materials, mapping components, licenses, and provenance. Visible BOMs improve software supply chain security, license compliance, and risk management in modern tech stacks.
items.summary_zh: Everything Is BOM 指出软件和硬件产品背后都依赖完整的物料清单，涵盖组件、许可和溯源信息。对 BOM 的可视化提升了软件供应链安全、许可合规性与风险管理，是现代技术栈的重要组成部分。

items.title_en: Nim Conf 2026 (Online, Sat June 20)
items.title_zh: Nim Conf 2026（线上，6月20日周六）
items.summary_en: Online Nim Conf 2026 gathers language enthusiasts for talks on language features, tooling, and ecosystem progress. Expect updates on performance, compile-time improvements, and cross-platform support. The event is a good barometer for where Nim is headed next.
items.summary_zh: 线上 Nim Conf 2026 汇聚语言爱好者，讨论语言特性、工具链与生态进展。预计涵盖性能、编译时间改进和跨平台支持等内容，是了解 Nim 未来走向的风向标。

items.title_en: Biological evolution and information acquisition
items.title_zh: 生物进化与信息获取
items.summary_en: Argues that biological evolution can be understood through information acquisition, linking natural selection to data processing and measurement. The piece uses physics-inspired framing to explain how organisms encode, transmit, and optimize information for survival.
items.summary_zh: 论证生物进化可以通过信息获取来理解，将自然选择与数据处理和测量联系起来。文章采用物理学启发的框架，解释生物如何编码、传递并优化信息以实现生存。

items.title_en: Health insurance claim denial rates range from 13% to 35% by insurer
items.title_zh: 不同保险公司健康保险理赔拒付率差异显著
items.summary_en: A look at insurer-by-insurer denial rates reveals wide variation in how often claims are rejected, underscoring administrative complexity in US healthcare. The data invites discussion on transparency, policy reform, and patient impact.
items.summary_zh: 对各保险公司拒付率的差异进行观察，发现存在显著变异，这反映出美国医疗账单处理的复杂性。数据引发对透明度、政策改革和患者影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Don’t use AI to write things that you present as your own work
items.title_zh: 别把 AI 写作当作自己的作品来展示
items.summary_en: Argues against presenting AI-generated text as one’s own work, outlining ethical guidelines and potential plagiarism risks. Encourages attribution and transparency when using AI for writing tasks.
items.summary_zh: 反对将 AI 生成的文本当作自己的作品来展示，提出使用 AI 写作时的伦理准则与潜在的抄袭风险，鼓励在写作任务中保持署名与透明。

items.title_en: The Productivity J-Curve [pdf] (2018)
items.title_zh: 生产力 J 曲线 [pdf]（2018）
items.summary_en: The J-curve describes a temporary dip in productivity during the initial adoption of a new tool or process, followed by long-term gains as learning and optimization occur. It offers actionable guidance for managers on timing, experimentation, and metrics to distinguish short-term dips from long-run gains.
items.summary_zh: J 曲线揭示在采用新工具或流程初期生产力常常短暂下降，随后随着学习和优化而提升。本文为管理者提供可执行的建议，帮助把握时机、设计试验并用正确的指标区分短期低谷与长期收益。

items.title_en: FDA advisors unanimously vote to approve Moderna's mRNA after agency drama
items.title_zh: FDA 顾问因此一致通过 Moderna 的 mRNA 疫苗，经历机构风波
items.summary_en: FDA advisory panel unanimously approved Moderna's mRNA vaccine after a period of regulatory drama, signaling progress for the company's mRNA portfolio. The outcome illustrates the tension between science advisory processes and agency decisions, with implications for rollout timelines.
items.summary_zh: FDA 专家组在经历监管风波后的一致意见通过了 Moderna 的 mRNA 疫苗审批，标志着其 mRNA 组合的进展。此结果反映了科学顾问过程与监管决策之间的博弈，对后续推广时间表具有影响。

items.title_en: Vance: Iran can have access to $300B reconstruction fund
items.title_zh: Vance：伊朗可以获得 3,000 亿美元的重建基金
items.summary_en: Senator Vance floated the idea that Iran could access a $300 billion reconstruction fund, highlighting political debate over sanctions relief and the terms under which Iran could fund its own rebuild. The discussion underscores how large-scale sanctions policy intersects with economic incentives and regional security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 参议员 Vance 提出让伊朗获得 3000 亿美元重建基金的设想，凸显在制裁豁免与推动伊朗重建之间的政治博弈，以及经济激励与区域安全之间的微妙关系。

items.title_en: Human Judgment as a Specification
items.title_zh: 将人类判断作为规范
items.summary_en: The piece argues that human judgments can serve as a specification for AI behavior, enabling scalable alignment by turning preferences into concrete constraints. It discusses practical implications for human-in-the-loop AI design.
items.summary_zh: 人类判断可以被用作 AI 行为的规范，将偏好转化为具体约束，从而实现可扩展的对齐。这一思路对人机协作型 AI 设计有重要启示。

items.title_en: Specs Augmented Reality Glasses
items.title_zh: Specs 增强现实眼镜
items.summary_en: Snap unveils Specs AR glasses, detailing field-of-view, optics, and integration with the company's augmented-reality platform. The piece touches on privacy, battery life, and consumer uptake.
items.summary_zh: Snap 公布 Specs 增强现实眼镜，介绍视场、光学与与公司 AR 生态的集成。文章还讨论隐私、续航和消费者接受度等要点。

items.title_en: Supermarket giant Tesco sues VMware for breach of contract
items.title_zh: 特易购对 VMware 违反合同提起诉讼
items.summary_en: Tesco files a breach-of-contract suit against VMware, signaling tensions around licensing, interoperability, or service obligations in enterprise software. The case could influence procurement strategies.
items.summary_zh: 特易购对 VMware 提起违约诉讼，焦点在企业虚拟化软件的合同义务，可能影响采购策略与厂商关系。

items.title_en: NOLA 'Nacular: One man's crusade to preserve New Orleans's vernacular signage
items.title_zh: NOLA Nacular：一人守护新奥尔良方言招牌的事业
items.summary_en: NOLA Nacular chronicles one man’s effort to preserve New Orleans' vernacular signage, showing how typography, language, and local history intersect with urban design.
items.summary_zh: NOLA Nacular 记录了一个人保护新奥尔良本地招牌的努力，展示字体、语言与城市历史如何交织在城市设计中。

items.title_en: Global density and biomass of arbuscular mycorrhizal fungal networks
items.title_zh: 全球丛枝菌根真菌网络的密度与生物量
items.summary_en: A global synthesis quantifies the density and biomass of arbuscular mycorrhizal fungal networks, with implications for plant nutrition, soil health, and ecosystem resilience.
items.summary_zh: 全球范围内的丛枝菌根真菌网络密度与生物量被量化，为植物养分获取、土壤健康和生态系统韧性提供新见解。

items.title_en: Unity vs. Floating Point
items.title_zh: Unity 与浮点数
items.summary_en: Unity's floating-point math brings precision and determinism challenges in simulations; the piece analyzes how to manage rounding errors and ensure stable physics across platforms.
items.summary_zh: Unity 的浮点运算在仿真中带来精度与确定性挑战，文章分析了如何控制舍入误差、在不同平台上保持稳定的物理表现。

items.title_en: Web Browsers on PDAS
items.title_zh: 在 PDA 上的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: A look back at experiments to run web browsers on PDAs reveals the severe constraints of early mobile devices. The discussion highlights how memory, CPU, and storage limits shaped the first mobile web and set the stage for today’s browsers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在 PDA 上运行网页浏览器的尝试，揭示早期移动设备的资源限制——内存、CPU、存储的约束如何塑造了最初的移动网页体验，并奠定今日浏览器的演进。

items.title_en: 2026-06-16 Robinhood Layoff Translation
items.title_zh: Robinhood 裁员翻译
items.summary_en: A layoff translation roundup for Robinhood, summarizing the changes in plain language. It illustrates how fintech startups are adjusting staffing in a shifting market landscape.
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 的裁员翻译汇总，以简明语言概述变动，反映在市场环境变化中金融科技初创企业对人力的调整。

items.title_en: The Return of Rigorous Full-System Timing Simulation
items.title_zh: 重新兴起的严格全系统时序仿真
items.summary_en: Full-system timing simulation is making a rigorous comeback, enabling precise evaluation of hardware-software interactions across CPUs, memory, and interconnects. New methodologies and tooling are reviving this niche, helping architects predict performance and verify designs earlier in the cycle. It’s about realism over coarse estimates.
items.summary_zh: 全系统时序仿真正重新崛起，使得对处理器、内存与互连之间的硬件–软件交互进行更精确的性能评估成为可能。通过新的方法和工具，架构师能够在设计早期就预测性能、验证实现，提升真实感与可靠性。

items.title_en: Making 'food out of thin air' (2024)
items.title_zh: 在 2024 年实现‘空气中制造食物’
items.summary_en: Noema piece discusses breakthroughs enabling 'food from thin air' in 2024, likely covering novel synthesis methods, biotechnologies, or atmospheric carbon use in food production. The trend could reshape agriculture, food security, and sustainability narratives.
items.summary_zh: Noema 的文章讨论了在 2024 年实现‘空气中制造食物’的突破，可能涉及新型合成技术、生物工艺或大气碳利用在食品生产中的应用。此趋势可能改变农业、粮食安全与可持续性议题。

items.title_en: The Last Surviving Japanese Porsche 912 Police Car
items.title_zh: 日本警用保时捷912 现存的最后一辆
items.summary_en: A compact history of the Porsche 912 used by Japanese police, tracing its provenance, preservation, and place in automotive lore as a rare, culturally significant vehicle.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章纪念日本警用保时捷912的最后一辆现存之车，追溯其来历、保存过程以及在汽车史中的地位。内容揭示一辆稀有车辆如何折射出警务与汽车文化的交汇。

items.title_en: Smashed Toilet Phone Web Server
items.title_zh: Smashed Toilet Phone Web 服务器
items.summary_en: A quirky hardware-software project that pairs a toilet-themed device with a web server, showcasing playful embedded systems experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 一个古怪的硬件/软件项目，结合“破碎厕所”主题设备与网络服务器，展示对嵌入式系统的趣味性实验。

items.title_en: Occupancy Math on the AMD MI355X: A From-First-Principles Guide
items.title_zh: 基于第一性原理的 AMD MI355X 占用率计算指南
items.summary_en: Defines occupancy as a core metric for kernel performance on the AMD MI355X and walks through a first-principles approach to computing it. The piece shows how occupancy informs kernel design and tuning decisions.
items.summary_zh: 将占用率定义为 AMD MI355X 核心性能的关键指标，并以第一性原理的方法讲解如何计算。内容展示占用率如何影响核函数设计与调优决策。

items.title_en: Show HN: Modeloop – From visual algorithms to microcontroller C code
items.title_zh: Show HN：Modeloop——从可视化算法到微控制器 C 代码
items.summary_en: Modeloop translates visual, block-based algorithms into microcontroller C code, bridging the gap between design and embedded deployment. It enables rapid prototyping for hardware projects where performance and resource constraints matter. This approach foreshadows a low-code pathway for hardware-software co-design.
items.summary_zh: Modeloop 将可视化的块状算法转换为微控制器的 C 代码，缩短设计到嵌入式实现的距离。它让在资源受限的硬件上进行快速原型开发成为现实，提升性能与效率的权衡。此类低代码路径将推动软硬件协同设计的创新。

items.title_en: Show HN: VoiceDraw – Talk system design out loud, the diagrams draw themselves
items.title_zh: Show HN: VoiceDraw – 说出系统设计，图自动绘制
items.summary_en: VoiceDraw converts spoken system design ideas into live diagrams, letting teams visualize architecture as they talk. It reduces friction in early design reviews and captures ideas before they fade. The approach demonstrates how talk-to-diagram tools can accelerate design workflows.
items.summary_zh: VoiceDraw 将口头的系统设计思路实时转化为图表，帮助团队在讨论时就可直观看到架构。它降低了早期设计评审的摩擦，便于捕捉易逝的想法。该工具展示了将口述转化为图形的设计协作方式如何加速工作流程。

items.title_en: Why stdx is not on crates.io
items.title_zh: 为什么 stdx 没有在 crates.io 上
items.summary_en: An analysis of why the stdx crate isn't on crates.io. It raises questions about crate governance, licensing, and ecosystem considerations.
items.summary_zh: 为何 stdx 未在 crates.io 上发布。文章探讨了治理、许可以及生态系统层面的考量，及其对 Rust 生态的潜在影响。

items.title_en: System call instrumentation on Linux/x86‑64 using memory‑indirect calls, part I
items.title_zh: 在 Linux/x86-64 上使用内存间接调用进行系统调用插桩（第一部分）
items.summary_en: Reports on an attempt to instrument Linux system calls using memory-indirect calls, including what worked and what didn’t. Highlights the practical challenges of low-level instrumentation and the lessons learned for researchers.
items.summary_zh: 记录了尝试在 Linux/x86-64 上使用内存间接调用对系统调用进行插桩的过程，包括成功与失败之处。强调低级插桩的实际挑战，以及研究者应从中吸取的经验教训。

items.title_en: Rare medieval bookmark exceeds expectations at auction
items.title_zh: 罕见中世纪书签在拍卖中出乎意料
items.summary_en: A rare medieval bookmark fetches unexpectedly high at auction, underscoring growing interest in marginalia and manuscript culture. The find illuminates medieval reading practices and the value collectors place on such artifacts.
items.summary_zh: 一枚罕见的中世纪书签在拍卖中出人意料地走高，凸显边注与手稿文化在收藏界的日益关注。该物件有助于了解中世纪的阅读习惯与文献流传的历史脉络。

items.title_en: EU to soon classify AWS and Azure as gatekeepers under DSA
items.title_zh: 欧盟将很快把 AWS 与 Azure 列为 DSA 下的守门人
items.summary_en: EU regulators are set to classify AWS and Azure as gatekeepers under the DSA, signaling that dominant cloud platforms will face stricter obligations around data access, interoperability, and anti-competitive practices. The move could reshape cloud competition and push major providers toward more open ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟监管机构拟将 AWS 与 Azure列为 DSA 下的守门人，要求在数据访问、互操作性和反竞争方面承担更严格的义务。此举或将改变云服务市场的竞争格局，推动建立更开放的生态系统。

items.title_en: Snap Smart Glasses
items.title_zh: Snap 智能眼镜评测
items.summary_en: A review of Snap's latest smart glasses highlights design, wearability, and AR capabilities, including camera quality and privacy trade-offs. The piece places Snap's glasses within the broader consumer AR trend, noting how lighter hardware and pass-through mixed reality differentiate them from heavier headsets.
items.summary_zh: 对 Snap 最新一代智能眼镜的评测聚焦外观、佩戴舒适度和增强现实能力，并评估相机性能与隐私取舍。文章将此类设备置于消费级 AR 的潮流中，强调轻量化硬件与现场透过式混合现实的差异化定位。

items.title_en: Soccer Arcade Games Through the Years
items.title_zh: 足球街机游戏的历史演变
items.summary_en: Soccer arcade games have evolved from mechanical, coin-op machines to modern digital titles with licensed teams and physics-based gameplay. The piece traces the arc of arcade design across decades, highlighting how gameplay, accessibility, and nostalgia intersect with football culture as the sport grows globally.
items.summary_zh: 足球街机游戏经历了从机械装置到现代数字游戏的演变，涉及许可、玩法与物理仿真等方面的进步。文章追溯数十年的发展，强调游戏设计、易用性与怀旧情感如何与足球文化交织。它展示了街机在不同时代的硬件演进和玩家体验的变化。

items.title_en: Language Courses in the Public Domain
items.title_zh: 公有领域语言课程
items.summary_en: Public-domain language courses provide free, redistributable materials that lower barriers for language learning, teaching, and research, enabling broad access to structured curricula.
items.summary_zh: 公有领域的语言课程为学习者提供免费、可再分发的学习材料，降低了语言学习的成本与门槛，适合个人、教师和机构使用。

items.title_en: Techno-libertarians are flocking to the Caribbean
items.title_zh: 科技自由主义者蜂拥加勒比
items.summary_en: Techno-libertarians are migrating to Caribbean jurisdictions offering crypto-friendly, low-regulation environments, seeking freedom from perceived surveillance and heavy taxation.
items.summary_zh: 科技自由主义者正涌向加勒比地区的数字友好、低监管环境，寻求摆脱监控与高税负。文章探讨此趋势对当地经济、治理及科技创业生态的影响。

items.title_en: Armstrong Effect
items.title_zh: 阿姆斯特朗效应
items.summary_en: In electronics and radio history, the Armstrong effect refers to positive feedback in regenerative circuits that enables oscillation, a foundational concept behind early radios. The note highlights how such effects shaped design choices in RF amplifiers and receivers.
items.summary_zh: 在电子学和无线电史上，阿姆斯特朗效应指的是再生电路中的正反馈，使振荡成为可能，是早期无线电的基础概念之一。该文点出这一效应如何影响射频放大器与接收机的设计。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiny – An interpeted dynamic langauge with inline Go native functions
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tiny——一种带有内联 Go 原生函数的解释型动态语言
items.summary_en: Introducing Tiny, a dynamically typed interpreted language with inline Go native function calls, offering a compact, embeddable scripting option for Go projects. It demonstrates how language design can unlock fast, scriptable extensions.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Tiny 提供一种带有内联 Go 原生函数的解释型动态语言，便于在 Go 项目中嵌入脚本扩展，展示了更紧凑的语言设计与互操作性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sabela – A Reactive Notebook for Haskell
items.title_zh: Show HN: Sabela — 为 Haskell 设计的反应式笔记本
items.summary_en: Sabela provides a reactive notebook tailored for Haskell, enabling live feedback and reactivity when code or data changes. It demonstrates how language-native notebooks can improve experimentation and teaching for functional programming.
items.summary_zh: Sabela 为 Haskell 提供了一个反应式笔记本，代码与数据变更时可获得即时反馈。它展示了将笔记本式工作流与函数式编程结合的可行性，适合教学与探索性编程。

items.title_en: Computed goto for efficient dispatch tables (2012)
items.title_zh: 用于高效派发表的计算 goto（2012）
items.summary_en: The post explains how computed goto can speed up dispatch tables in interpreters by reducing branches and improving cache locality. It’s a practical trick for building high-performance language runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解了计算 goto 如何通过减少分支预测失败并提升缓存局部性来加速解释器的派发表，是构建高性能语言运行时的实用技巧。

items.title_en: Being an old school web-based sports sim dev in the era of vibe coded games
items.title_zh: 在 vibe 编码游戏盛行的时代，做老派网页体育模拟开发
items.summary_en: The post reflects on building web-based sports simulations in an era driven by vibe-coded games, emphasizing data-driven simulations, deterministic results, and maintainable code over flashy effects. It offers lessons for long‑lived game logic, scaling, and tooling in a browser-first ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 该文回顾在 vibe 编码游戏盛行的时代，如何开发基于网页的体育模拟，强调数据驱动的仿真、确定性结果和可维护的代码，而非炫酷特效。为在浏览器优先的生态中构建长期可扩展的游戏逻辑、工具链提供了经验教训。

items.title_en: Chopped, Stored, Secured – The Story of the Hash Function
items.title_zh: 哈希函数的故事：切碎、存储、安全
items.summary_en: Charts the history of hash functions from early constructions to modern cryptographic primitives, explaining how they enable data integrity checks, quick lookups, and secure authentication. The piece traces the lifecycle from input processing to storage and comparison, highlighting security pitfalls and best practices.
items.summary_zh: 梳理哈希函数的历史，从早期构造到现代密码学原语，解释哈希在数据完整性、快速查找与身份认证中的作用。文章回顾从输入处理、存储到比对的全过程，强调安全要点与最佳实践。

items.title_en: AI Compute Extensions (ACE) Specification
items.title_zh: AI 计算扩展（ACE）规范
items.summary_en: ACE defines standardized interfaces for AI compute resources, enabling better interoperability between CPUs, accelerators, and runtimes. The spec aims to streamline AI offload, memory coherence, and driver integration, reducing vendor lock-in. Adoption could accelerate AI workloads across platforms.
items.summary_zh: ACE 定义了 AI 计算资源的标准化接口，提升与 CPU、加速器及运行时之间的互操作性。该规范旨在简化 AI 加载、内存一致性和驱动集成，降低厂商锁定。普及可能加速各平台的 AI 工作负载。

items.title_en: Stop wasting tokens and re explaining your project between sessions
items.title_zh: 停止浪费令牌，在会话之间避免重复解释你的项目
items.summary_en: Recall-enabled tooling highlights how persisting context across sessions can cut token waste and avoid reintroducing project details. It helps developers and chatbots keep conversations coherent, reducing redundant prompts and friction.
items.summary_zh: 可记忆上下文的工具展示了跨会话保存上下文以减少令牌消耗、避免重复介绍项目信息的方式。对开发者和聊天机器人有利，有助维持对话连贯性，降低重复提问与摩擦。

items.title_en: SMTP Relay with Web Dashboard
items.title_zh: 带 Web 仪表板的 SMTP 中继
items.summary_en: This project provides a self-hosted SMTP relay with a web dashboard for monitoring and management. It appeals to small teams needing simple, observable mail routing, while covering security basics like TLS, authentication, and anti-spam controls.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供一个带 Web 仪表板的自托管 SMTP 中继，便于监控和管理邮箱路由。适合小型团队使用，强调 TLS、认证与反垃圾等安全要点。

items.title_en: All about the IBM 1130 Computing System
items.title_zh: IBM 1130 计算系统全解
items.summary_en: This deep dive covers the IBM 1130’s 16-bit architecture, peripherals, and programming environment, shedding light on its role as an affordable minicomputer that broadened access to computing. Its ecosystem helped shape education and early software development in the 1960s.
items.summary_zh: 这篇深入介绍 IBM 1130 的 16 位架构、外设与编程环境，揭示其作为经济型微型计算机如何让更多人接触到计算。其生态系统在 1960 年代推动了教育与早期软件开发的发展。

items.title_en: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes after takeoff, Edwards Air Force Base says
items.title_zh: 美空军B-52轰炸机起飞后坠毁，爱德华空军基地称
items.summary_en: A US Air Force B-52 bomber crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base, with preliminary details pending investigation. The incident prompts safety reviews and could affect training and operations at the base, as investigators inspect airframe, systems, and weather factors. It also highlights ongoing concerns about aging strategic aircraft reliability.
items.summary_zh: 美空军一架B-52轰炸机在爱德华空军基地起飞后不久坠毁，尚在调查中。事件将促使基地进行安全评估，影响相关训练与任务，并由调查人员检查机体与系统以及气象因素。也反映出对老旧战略机型可靠性的持续关注。

items.title_en: Dwarf Fortress in the Browser
items.title_zh: 浏览器中的 Dwarf Fortress
items.summary_en: A browser-based port of Dwarf Fortress demonstrates running the game in the browser, with discussions of performance, portability, and user experience compared to the desktop version.
items.summary_zh: 浏览器端的《地下城堡》移植演示了在浏览器中运行该游戏，讨论了性能、可移植性与相较于桌面版本的用户体验差异。

items.title_en: NSA director: 'Mythos "broke into almost all of our classified systems in hours"
items.title_zh: NSA 局长：Mythos 在数小时内就闯入了几乎所有机密系统
items.summary_en: NSA leadership warns that AI-enabled tools like Mythos could infiltrate classified networks within hours, underscoring the need for stronger security, auditing, and policy responses.
items.summary_zh: NSA 领导层警告称，像 Mythos 这样的 AI 工具可能在数小时内侵入机密网络，强调需要强化安全、审计与相关政策应对，对国家安全和防御研究影响深远。

items.title_en: Reinventing the Renaissance
items.title_zh: 重新诠释文艺复兴
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the idea of a modern Renaissance is being reimagined through cross-disciplinary innovation, digital culture, and new forms of knowledge exchange.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为，现代文艺复兴的概念正在通过跨学科创新、数字文化以及新的知识交流形式被重新构想。

items.title_en: The Web We Know Is Going to Disappear
items.title_zh: 我们熟知的网络将消失
items.summary_en: The Web We Know Is Going to Disappear
items.summary_zh: 文章预测在隐私保护、去 Cookies 的追踪及去中心化趋势推动下，现有网络基础设施将发生根本性变化，用户体验可能趋于碎片化。

items.title_en: Show HN: Spin Lab
items.title_zh: Show HN：Spin Lab
items.summary_en: Show HN: Spin Lab presents a new project that aims to simplify experiments with spin-based computing or data processing, offering a hands-on tool for researchers and developers.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Spin Lab 展示一个新项目，旨在简化自旋计算或数据处理的实验，提供给研究人员和开发者一个可操作的工具。

items.title_en: The UK's Teen Social Media Ban Is Political Theater, Not Child Safety Policy
items.title_zh: 英国青少年社交媒体禁令是政治表演，并非儿童安全政策
items.summary_en: Critics argue the UK teen social media ban is more about signaling political aims than delivering real safety benefits. The policy risks pushing teens toward less regulated spaces and ignores underlying fixes like digital literacy, parental controls, and mental health support. It shows how policy by spectacle can undermine data-driven safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 批评者认为英国对青少年的社交媒体禁令更多是传达政治信号，而非真正提高儿童安全的有效措施。该政策可能让青少年转向监管较少的平台，忽视数字素养、家长监管以及心理健康等根本性解决方案，反映出以作秀取代数据驱动治理的风险。

items.title_en: David Ahl's Basic Computer Games Ported to C
items.title_zh: David Ahl 的《Basic Computer Games》移植到 C
items.summary_en: David Ahl's classic 'Basic Computer Games' has been ported to C, preserving the charm of early text-based titles while adapting them to modern tooling. The project showcases retro programming pedagogy and how BASIC semantics translate into C constructs.
items.summary_zh: David Ahl 的《Basic Computer Games》被移植到 C 语言，保留了早期文字版游戏的魅力，并适配现代工具链。该项目体现了复古编程教育的价值，以及如何将 BASIC 的语义转换为 C 的实现。

items.title_en: The Raku Foundation is born
items.title_zh: Raku 基金会成立
items.summary_en: The Raku language gains a formal home with a new foundation tasked with governance, funding, and ecosystem development. The move aims to coordinate community efforts, standardize tooling, and steward the language's future.
items.summary_zh: Raku 语言迎来正式的治理机构——基金会，负责治理、资金与生态建设。此举旨在协调社区工作、标准化工具链，并共同托举语言的未来。

items.title_en: ASM Shader Toy
items.title_zh: ASM SHADER TOY — 其实是用汇编编码着色器
items.summary_en: A browser-based shader toy that lets you author pixel shaders in x86-64 assembly. It highlights the potential of low-level GPU programming and the expressiveness of assembly in shader contexts.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个浏览器中的着色器玩具，允许用 x86-64 汇编语言来编写像素着色器。它展示了低级 GPU 编程的潜力以及汇编在着色器领域的表达力。

items.title_en: Aikido Code Audit
items.title_zh: Aikido 代码审计：在代码库中发现隐藏的复杂漏洞
items.summary_en: The post introduces Aikido's approach to code auditing to uncover complex vulnerabilities that slip through standard reviews. It covers techniques like data-flow analysis and supply-chain risk, explaining how deeper audits reduce risk in large codebases.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍 Aikido 的代码审计方法，专门发现常规审查容易漏掉的复杂漏洞。讨论数据流分析、跨站脚本、供应链等技术，并解释为何在大型代码库中进行深入审计能降低风险。

items.title_en: MiniMax M3 vs. GLM 5.2: Codegen comparison across autonomous coding tasks
items.title_zh: MiniMax M3 与 GLM 5.2：自治编码任务的代码生成对比
items.summary_en: A benchmark comparing two AI code-generation models on autonomous coding tasks, highlighting where each model excels and providing guidance on deployment decisions.
items.summary_zh: 对 MiniMax M3 与 GLM 5.2 在自治编码任务上的代码生成能力进行对比，揭示各自的优势并为部署决策提供指引。

items.title_en: Leak Exposes Members of Peter Thiel's Secretive 'Dialog' Society
items.title_zh: 泄露揭露彼得·蒂尔秘密社团 Dialog 的成员
items.summary_en: A leak reveals members of Peter Thiel's secretive Dialog society, a private circle tied to influence over geopolitical and technology policy. The disclosure raises questions about billionaire influence in policy networks and the ethics of private patronage. It underscores the tension between secrecy and accountability in elite tech circles.
items.summary_zh: 一次泄露揭露了彼得·蒂尔秘密社团 Dialog 的成员，这个私密圈子与地缘政治和科技政策的影响力相关。此举引发对科技大亨在政策网络中的影响力及私下资助伦理的质问，凸显精英科技圈中的保密性与问责之间的张力。

items.title_en: Seeing the world in radio waves with the QuadRF
items.title_zh: 用 QuadRF 看世界：通过射频信号看见
items.summary_en: QuadRF enables seeing the world through radio-frequency signals, converting RF into interpretable visuals. The project illustrates practical RF sensing and potential hobbyist or research applications.
items.summary_zh: QuadRF 将射频信号转化为直观可视的影像，帮助以无线电波“看见”世界，展示了实用的射频传感和潜在的爱好者/研究用途。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pulse – Dashboard for Claude Code, approve tool calls from your phone
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pulse—— Claude Code 的仪表板，手机即可批准工具调用
items.summary_en: Presents Pulse, a mobile dashboard for Claude Code that lets you approve tool calls from your phone, streamlining AI-assisted coding workflows. A practical productivity boost for developers integrating Claude Code into their workflow.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Pulse，这是一个用于 Claude Code 的手机仪表板，允许从手机批准工具调用，简化 AI 辅助编码的工作流。为将 Claude Code 集成到工作流中的开发者带来实用的生产力提升。

items.title_en: Gamers beware: malicious wallpapers on Steam found stealing accounts
items.title_zh: 玩家请警惕：Steam 上发现窃取账户的恶意壁纸
items.summary_en: Researchers found dozens of malicious wallpapers in Steam Workshop that exfiltrate credentials or token data when viewed or installed. The incident highlights threats hidden in user-generated content and the need for better moderation and user vigilance.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在 Steam Workshop 发现多枚窃取凭据的恶意壁纸，安装或查看时可能窃取账户凭据或令牌。此事凸显用户生成内容中潜在的威胁，以及需要加强审核与用户警惕。

items.title_en: US Government Reportedly Allowing Federal Data Center Rules to Expire
items.title_zh: 据报道，美国政府允许联邦数据中心规则到期
items.summary_en: A government report suggests federal data-center rules are being allowed to expire, potentially before replacements or updates are in place. The move could affect energy efficiency, security standards, and cloud migration plans across agencies. Critics warn about loss of modernization momentum and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，美国政府允许联邦数据中心相关规则到期，可能在未有替代或更新时出现空缺。此举可能影响各机构的能效、安全标准与云迁移计划。批评者担忧将减缓现代化与韧性提升的步伐。

items.title_en: Image Toolbox (T8RIN)
items.title_zh: Image Toolbox（T8RIN）
items.summary_en: Image Toolbox by T8RIN provides open-source utilities for image processing and experimentation, integrating into ML and CV workflows.
items.summary_zh: T8RIN 的 Image Toolbox 提供开源的图像处理与实验工具，便于在机器学习与计算机视觉工作流中使用。

items.title_en: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs
items.title_zh: AMD 移除消费级 CPU 的内存加密功能，用户不满
items.summary_en: AMD has stripped memory encryption features from its consumer CPUs, triggering user backlash over reduced hardware security options. The move affects security-conscious workloads and consumer trust, potentially pushing users toward enterprise SKUs or competing products.
items.summary_zh: AMD 将消费级 CPU 的内存加密相关功能移除，引发用户对硬件安全性的忧虑与强烈不满。这一举措可能影响对安全敏感工作负载的用户体验，甚至让部分用户转向企业级或竞争产品。

items.title_en: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
items.title_zh: 亚马逊正在调查批评 AI 数据中心扩张的工程师
items.summary_en: Amazon is investigating engineers who publicly criticized its AI data-center expansion, highlighting tensions around internal dissent and enforcement of communications policies. The case may signal a chilling effect on open critique and could influence retention and AI strategy decisions.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊正在调查公开批评其 AI 数据中心扩张的工程师，凸显企业内部异议与内部沟通政策执行之间的紧张关系。这起事件可能对公开批评产生震慑效应，并影响团队留任和 AI 战略决策。

items.title_en: Show HN: Teach your kids perfect pitch
items.title_zh: Show HN：教你的孩子培养完美音准
items.summary_en: Show HN presents bsharp, a method to teach kids perfect pitch. The project includes exercises and progress tracking targeted at young musicians.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍的 bsharp 项目提供一套教孩子训练绝对音感的方法，包含练习与进度跟踪，面向青少年音乐学习者。

items.title_en: GateGPT: 56k tokens per second Transformer (KV cache) on FPGA at 80 MHz
items.title_zh: GateGPT：在 80 MHz 的 FPGA 上实现 56k token/s 的 Transformer（KV 缓存）
items.summary_en: A hardware-focused post demonstrates a Transformer KV-cache design on FPGA capable of 56k tokens per second at 80 MHz, illustrating how architectural choices and memory bandwidth enable high-throughput inference.
items.summary_zh: 该文章展示在 80 MHz 的 FPGA 上实现的 Transformer KV-cache，吞吐达每秒 56k token，凸显架构优化与内存带宽对推理吞吐的推动作用。

items.title_en: Fable 5 pushed Gemma 4 to 255 tok/s on WebGPU
items.title_zh: Fable 5 在 WebGPU 上将 Gemma 4 的吞吐提升至 255 tok/s
items.summary_en: Fable 5 achieves 255 tokens per second on WebGPU for Gemma 4, a notable speedup that showcases the potential of browser-based AI inference.
items.summary_zh: Fable 5 在 WebGPU 上将 Gemma 4 的推理速度提升至 255 tok/s，显示浏览器端 AI 推理的潜力。

items.title_en: PowerFox Browser
items.title_zh: PowerFox 浏览器
items.summary_en: PowerFox is a privacy-first browser aiming for speed and control, with configurable protections and performance optimizations. It targets power users who want tighter performance and customization without sacrificing privacy.
items.summary_zh: PowerFox 浏览器定位为隐私优先、追求高效与可控性，内置可配置的保护机制和性能优化，面向希望在不牺牲隐私的前提下获得更高性能的高级用户。

items.title_en: The Lost Story of Alan Turing's "Delilah" Project (2025)
items.title_zh: 阿兰·图灵的“Delilah”计划的失落故事
items.summary_en: The piece uncovers a forgotten wartime project code-named Delilah, shedding light on Turing-era attempts at cryptanalytic or computational work amid WWII. It situates the project within Turing's broader legacy and early computing history, offering a nuanced glimpse into speculative wartime research.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示了一个被遗忘的二战项目，代号 Delilah，揭示图灵时代在密码分析或计算研究方面的尝试。它将该项目置于图灵总体遗产与早期计算史的语境中，提供对战时研究的细致观察。

items.title_en: San Francisco Weighs PG&E Takeover Amid Soaring Utility Costs
items.title_zh: 因公用事业成本飙升，旧金山考虑接管 PG&E
items.summary_en: San Francisco weighs municipal ownership of PG&E as utility bills rise and reliability concerns mount. The debate centers on tradeoffs between local control, funding, and upgrading critical infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山在公用事业成本高涨、可靠性担忧加剧之际，权衡是否接管 PG&E 以提升治理与投资能力。讨论焦点在地方控制、资金与基础设施升级之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: CleverCrow: give tokens to your favorite projects
items.title_zh: CleverCrow：把代币发给你最喜欢的项目
items.summary_en: CleverCrow is a platform enabling token-based voting or funding toward favorite projects, enabling community-driven support for open-source or creators. It could incentivize contributions or feedback, turning interest into tangible backing.
items.summary_zh: CleverCrow 提供一个按代币投票或资助你最喜爱项目的平台，推动社区对开源或创作者的支持。它可能激励贡献与反馈，将热情转化为实际资助。

items.title_en: The history of butterfly swimming
items.title_zh: 蝶泳的历史
items.summary_en: A brief history of butterfly stroke, tracing its technical evolution, training practices, and notable pioneers, showing how biomechanics and coaching shaped this signature stroke.
items.summary_zh: 蝶泳在技术演变、训练方法与先驱人物方面的简史，展示了生物力学与教练训练如何共同塑造这一标志性泳姿。

items.title_en: B-52 bomber crashes shortly after takeoff at California's Edwards Air Force Base
items.title_zh: 美军B-52轰炸机起飞后不久在 Edwards 空军基地坠毁
items.summary_en: A US Air Force B-52 bomber crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base, with officials confirming the incident and investigations underway. The crash raises questions about airframe reliability and maintenance on aging strategic aircraft, and may disrupt training schedules.
items.summary_zh: 美空军一架 B-52 轰炸机在爱德华空军基地起飞后不久坠毁，官方确认事件正在调查。此次事故引发对老化战略机型的维修与可靠性的关注，可能影响基地的训练计划。

items.title_en: Show HN: Exploiting Slack's video embeds to achieve E2EE communication
items.title_zh: Show HN：利用 Slack 的视频嵌入实现端到端加密通讯
items.summary_en: A Show HN explores whether Slack video embeds can enable end-to-end encrypted communication, illustrating how embedding channels intersect with secure messaging notions. The work sparks discussion about feasibility and the design space for private collaboration tools.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Show HN 探讨通过 Slack 视频嵌入是否能够实现端到端加密通讯，揭示嵌入通道与安全消息概念的交集。此话题引发对私密协作工具可行性及设计空间的讨论。

items.title_en: Inverse Rubric Optimization: A testbed for agent science
items.title_zh: 逆向评量标准优化：代理科学的测试床
items.summary_en: Inverse Rubric Optimization presents a framework to frame agent behavior in terms of evaluative rubrics that can be inverted to study alignment, incentive design, and evaluation dynamics. It offers a testbed for experimenting with how goals translate into observable actions.
items.summary_zh: 逆向评量标准优化提供了一种将代理行为以评估性准则来框定的框架，并可对准则进行反演研究对齐、激励设计和评估动力学。它为研究目标如何转化为可观察行动提供了测试床。

items.title_en: Micro Radar: a tiny open-source flight radar for your desk
items.title_zh: 微型雷达：桌面上的极小开源飞行雷达
items.summary_en: A compact, open-source flight radar you can run on a desk, letting hobbyists and researchers visualize nearby air traffic from your home. The project combines affordable sensors, open firmware, and approachable hardware to democratize access to radar-based sensing and data exploration.
items.summary_zh: 一个小型开源飞行雷达，放在桌面即可观测周围的航空流量。该项目结合了廉价传感器、开源固件和易于获取的硬件，降低了雷达探测的门槛，便于爱好者与研究者进行数据探索。

items.title_en: Chili peppers of the world: cultivars, species, and heat
items.title_zh: 世界辣椒：品种、物种与辣度
items.summary_en: A survey of chili peppers around the world, mapping cultivars and species to heat levels and flavor profiles. It helps readers understand pepper diversity, cultivation considerations, and how heat translates into cuisine across regions.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于全球辣椒的综述，梳理了不同品种与科属、辣度等级及风味差异。帮助读者理解辣椒的多样性、栽培要点，以及各地域料理中辣味的差异。

items.title_en: The Alaska Server
items.title_zh: 阿拉斯加服务器
items.summary_en: The Alaska Server describes a rugged edge/server deployment in Alaska, highlighting considerations for remote connectivity, power supply, and maintenance. The piece sheds light on how extreme environments shape hardware choices and operational strategies for distributed computing.
items.summary_zh: 《阿拉斯加服务器》介绍了在极端偏远环境中的边缘服务器部署，强调远程连通性、供电与维护的挑战。文中讨论了极端环境如何影响硬件选型和分布式计算的运维策略。

items.title_en: Cocktail Optimization, an Integer Programming Problem
items.title_zh: 鸡尾酒优化：一个整数规划问题
items.summary_en: A MILP formulation for cocktail optimization under taste, color, and cost constraints. Demonstrates how integer programming can model combinatorial recipe optimization and even inform bar menus.
items.summary_zh: 给出在口味、颜色与成本约束下的鸡尾酒配方优化的整数规划建模，展示了 MILP 如何将组合配方设计转化为可求解的问题，并为酒吧菜单提供决策支持。

items.title_en: Databricks Launches LTAP: A Unified OLAP/OLTP Data Architecture
items.title_zh: Databricks 推出 LTAP：统一的 OLAP/OLTP 数据架构
items.summary_en: Databricks unveils LTAP, a first unified OLAP/OLTP data architecture that blends transactional and analytical workloads on a data lakehouse. It signals a shift toward real-time analytics on lakehouses, with questions about performance, consistency, and cost.
items.summary_zh: Databricks 发布 LTAP，首次将 OLAP 与 OLTP 统一在同一数据架构中，借助数据湖实现事务性和分析性工作负载的并存。这表明在湖仓一体化上迈向实时分析，但也带来性能、一致性与成本的新挑战。

items.title_en: DARPA Heavy Life Challenge
items.title_zh: DARPA 重生命挑战计划
items.summary_en: DARPA's Heavy Life Challenge (LIFT) seeks to push AI and robotics research toward robust, long-horizon learning in dynamic, real-world settings. The program outlines challenges and milestones to accelerate reliable, adaptable systems for critical tasks.
items.summary_zh: DARPA 的重生命挑战计划（LIFT）推动 AI 与机器人研究在动态真实环境中实现长期、稳健的学习与适应能力。该计划设定挑战和里程碑，旨在加速构建可靠、可迁移的关键任务智能系统。

items.title_en: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将用 600 亿美元股票收购 Cursor，紧随其 IPO
items.summary_en: SpaceX plans to acquire Cursor in a $60B stock deal days after Cursor's blockbuster IPO, signaling consolidation in space and AI ecosystems and raising questions about valuation and integration risk.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 将以 600 亿美元的股票对 Cursor 进行收购，紧接 Cursor 的 IPO，体现出太空与 AI 生态系统的整合趋势，同时也引发对估值和整合风险的讨论。

items.title_en: Firefox 152 Now Available with JPEG-XL Support
items.title_zh: Firefox 152 现已支持 JPEG-XL
items.summary_en: Firefox 152 ships with JPEG-XL support, enabling superior image compression and quality compared to older formats while preserving lossless capabilities. The move is part of a broader push to modernize web media, reduce bandwidth, and improve user-perceived performance.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 152 引入 JPEG- XL 支持，提供比传统图像格式更高效的压缩与画质，同时支持无损特性。此举是推动网页多媒体现代化、降低带宽消耗、提升用户体验的一环。

items.title_en: PRC-linked spies hid inside medical and military networks for more than a year
items.title_zh: PRC-linked spies hid inside medical and military networks for more than a year
items.summary_en: A security report reveals that China-linked spies remained embedded in medical and military networks for over a year, highlighting enduring threats to R&D infrastructure and the need for stronger segmentation and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 安全报告披露与中国相关的间谍在医疗与军事网络中潜伏超过一年，凸显对研发基础设施的持续威胁以及加强网络分段与监控的必要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pagecast – Publish Markdown/HTML Reports to Cloudflare Pages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pagecast——将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages
items.summary_en: Pagecast provides a simple workflow to publish Markdown/HTML reports to Cloudflare Pages, enabling quick sharing of docs and dashboards with minimal setup. It emphasizes lightweight, reproducible publishing for small teams or personal projects.
items.summary_zh: Pagecast 提供将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages 的简易工作流，便于快速分享文档与仪表板，且设置简单、可重复性强。适合小团队或个人项目。

items.title_en: US court rules Ohio can restrict children's use of social media
items.title_zh: 美国法院裁定俄亥俄州可限制儿童使用社交媒体
items.summary_en: An Ohio policy limiting children's access to social media was upheld by a US court, marking a notable endorsement of state-level controls for minors online. The ruling highlights ongoing debates over digital safety, parental authority, and platform responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定俄亥俄州可以限制未成年人使用社交媒体，显示出州层面对青少年网络安全的潜在新方向。这一裁决凸显了数字安全、家长监管与平台在年龄限制方面的责任之间的持续辩论。

items.title_en: Cooling at the Speed of Light
items.title_zh: 光速降温
items.summary_en: The article surveys advances in photonic cooling and optical methods for rapid thermal management in microelectronics and quantum devices, potentially solving traditional cooling bottlenecks.
items.summary_zh: 文章综述了光学冷却等光子技术在微电子和量子设备中的快速热管理进展，或有望突破传统的散热瓶颈。

items.title_en: Djevops: Self-Host Django Easily
items.title_zh: Djevops：轻松自托管 Django
items.summary_en: A tool that helps you self-host Django projects more easily, likely via Docker or automation scripts, streamlining deployment on personal servers or private clouds. Expect built-in scaffolding and simple maintenance.
items.summary_zh: Djevops 让 Django 的自托管变得更简单，可能通过 Docker 或自动化脚本实现，使个人服务器或私有云上的部署更高效、维护更便捷。

items.title_en: Minecraft: Java Edition 26.2, the first version with Vulkan 1.2
items.title_zh: Minecraft Java 版26.2：首个支持 Vulkan 1.2 的版本
items.summary_en: Java Edition 26.2 adds Vulkan 1.2 support, enabling better GPU acceleration, reduced CPU bottlenecks, and improved cross-platform performance. The change signals continued graphics updates and performance improvements in a long-running title.
items.summary_zh: Java 版 26.2 首次加入 Vulkan 1.2 支持，提升 GPU 加速、减轻 CPU 瓶颈并改善跨平台性能。这一更新表明这款长期运行的游戏仍在持续推进图形与性能优化。

items.title_en: Meet Nikolai Evreinov, the 19th century Nathan Fielder
items.title_zh: 遇见尼古拉·埃夫列诺夫：19世纪的 Nathan Fielder
items.summary_en: The piece profiles Nikolai Evreinov, a 19th-century theater innovator whose prankster, meta-theatrical stunts prefigure contemporary performance art and prank-based media. It draws parallels to a modern Nathan Fielder, showing how theatrical deception can critique society and reshape audience engagement.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍尼古拉·埃夫列诺夫，这位19世纪的戏剧革新者以其伪装与元剧场式的行为艺术先驱着称，与当代喜剧人 Nathan Fielder 风格相映成趣。通过对比，揭示戏剧欺骗如何对社会进行评论，并挑战观众的预期。

items.title_en: AI is potentially a Dunning-Kruger effect amplifier
items.title_zh: AI 可能是 Dunning-Kruger 效应的放大器
items.summary_en: A contention that AI can amplify the Dunning-Kruger effect, making less skilled users appear more confident due to plausible outputs. This has implications for UX, trust, and safety, warranting stronger guardrails and transparency.
items.summary_zh: AI 可能放大低技能者的自信偏误，因为其输出常显得可信，从而掩盖真实能力。对用户体验、信任和安全提出挑战，需要更强的引导、透明度和防护措施。

items.title_en: LLMs Will Replace 8-Track Duplication Engineers
items.title_zh: LLMs 将取代 8 轨道拷贝工程师
items.summary_en: A provocative forecast that large language models will automate repetitive duplication tasks, reminiscent of 8-track era workflows, highlighting how AI shifts production paradigms. It reframes routine duplication work as ripe for automation and process improvement.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章预言大型语言模型将自动化重复性拷贝工作，类似于 8 轨道时代的工作流程，凸显 AI 将改变生产范式。它把常规的拷贝工作重新定位为自动化与流程改进的对象。

items.title_en: Rent collections are down in New York – and no one's sure why
items.title_zh: 纽约租金收取率下降，原因尚不明
items.summary_en: Rent collections in New York are down, with economists and landlords searching for explanations amid data gaps and shifting rental markets. The drop could signal broader macro trends or local policy or economic shifts affecting cash flow for landlords and tenants.
items.summary_zh: 纽约的租金收取率下降，数据不清与市场变化使经济学家和房东寻找原因。下滑可能反映宏观趋势、地方政策或经济因素对房东与租客现金流的影响。

items.title_en: AI Under Trump's Control: Can France Still Avoid Digital Dependence?
items.title_zh: 在特朗普掌控下的 AI：法国还能避免数字依赖吗？
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes AI policy under a Trump-influenced framework and asks whether France can still achieve digital sovereignty, discussing strategies like diversifying suppliers, data localization, and Europe-wide AI initiatives.
items.summary_zh: 文章在特朗普影响下的 AI 政策框架下探讨法国能否实现数字自主，提出通过多元化供应、数据本地化和欧洲级 AI 战略等途径来提高自主性。

items.title_en: 100 Greatest Bird Names of All Time
items.title_zh: 有史以来最伟大的100个鸟名
items.summary_en: A whimsical list compiling the 100 greatest bird names, exploring etymology and cultural quirks behind avian monikers. It blends humor with linguistics, making it a delightful read for word nerds and bird enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 一份关于100个最棒鸟名的趣味清单，探索鸟名背后的词源与文化趣味。兼具幽默与语言学趣味，适合语言爱好者和鸟类爱好者阅读。

items.title_en: Commander Keen Games (free book)
items.title_zh: Commander Keen 游戏（免费书籍）
items.summary_en: A free book exploring Commander Keen, its design, and its legacy in early PC platformers, offering historical and technical insights. It serves as a case study in preservation and the enduring relevance of retro game design.
items.summary_zh: 一本免费书籍深入解读 Commander Keen 的设计与历史，涵盖早期 PC 平台游戏的技术约束与关卡创作。它为复古游戏、保留与教学提供有价值的案例。

items.title_en: Hide Secrets from AI Agents and NPM install using Airgap
items.title_zh: 使用 Airgap 在 AI 代理与 NPM 安装中隐藏秘密
items.summary_en: Proposes airgapped workflows to hide secrets during AI agent interactions and npm installs, reducing the risk of leakage. Practical guidance for developers handling sensitive credentials in AI-enabled environments.
items.summary_zh: 提出通过隔离工作流（Airgap）在 AI 代理交互与 NPM 安装中隐藏机密，降低数据泄露风险。为在AI驱动环境中处理敏感凭据的开发者提供实用建议。

items.title_en: How to lose a war in three easy steps
items.title_zh: 三步就能输掉一场战争
items.summary_en: The FT opinion piece distills three easy steps that can lead to military defeat, focusing on strategy, governance, and information management. It ties these ideas to modern tech-enabled warfare and geopolitics, underscoring how planning flaws can be fatal.
items.summary_zh: FT 的专栏梳理了导致战争失败的三大易犯错误，聚焦战略、治理和信息管理。结合当代科技与地缘政治，指出规划失误、后勤不足或错误的信息战等因素如何致使作战能力快速下降。

items.title_en: Cirrus: ATProto Personal Data Server That Runs on Cloudflare Workers
items.title_zh: Cirrus：在 Cloudflare Workers 上运行的 ATProto 个人数据服务器
items.summary_en: Cirrus is a personal data server for AT Protocol that runs on Cloudflare Workers, enabling users to host their own data with decentralized protocol support. It demonstrates feasibility and limits of edge runtimes for personal data sovereignty, including storage and privacy tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: Cirrus 是一个在 Cloudflare Workers 上运行的 AT Protocol 个人数据服务器，允许用户在边缘计算环境中托管自己的数据，并支持去中心化协议。它展示了边缘运行时在个人数据主权方面的可行性与局限性，以及存储和隐私权衡。

items.title_en: Renting vs. Buying – A case study for Bangalore
items.title_zh: 班加罗尔租房 vs 买房：案例研究
items.summary_en: This Bangalore case study weighs renting versus buying for tech workers, factoring in price-to-rent ratios, cap rates, and total cost of ownership. It highlights how local market conditions, mobility, and career plans shape housing decisions in a fast-growing tech hub.
items.summary_zh: 本案例研究比较了班加罗尔科技工作者的租房与买房成本，考虑价格与租金比、投资回报率以及总拥有成本。研究指出本地市场、流动性需求和职业规划如何影响这一全球增长的科技中心的住房决策。

items.title_en: Ocient Database Sandbox
items.title_zh: Ocient 数据库沙箱
items.summary_en: Ocient's Database Sandbox provides a safe, configurable environment to explore hyperscale database features without risking production data. Useful for developers testing workloads and DB admins evaluating new capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Ocient 的数据库沙箱提供一个安全、可配置的环境，帮助开发者在不影响生产数据的前提下试验海量数据库特性与工作负载。

items.title_en: The notebooks Marie Curie filled with her research are still dangerous to touch
items.title_zh: 居里夫人研究笔记至今仍具放射性污染风险
items.summary_en: Marie Curie’s notebooks remain dangerously contaminated with radium-226 even after a century, forcing strict handling restrictions. The enduring hazard underscores challenges of preserving scientific history while ensuring safety.
items.summary_zh: 居里夫人的笔记在一百多年后仍含有放射性镭-226，需严格的处理与保存规定。这一长期风险凸显在保护科学史与保障安全之间需要权衡与长期投入。

items.title_en: Graphene experts are trying to close reproducibility gap in 2D materials
items.title_zh: 石墨烯领域专家努力缩小二维材料的可重复性差距
items.summary_en: Graphene researchers are working to close reproducibility gaps in 2D materials by standardizing synthesis and measurement methods. Progress could accelerate industrial adoption and ensure consistent material quality across labs.
items.summary_zh: 石墨烯及其他二维材料的可重复性差距正在通过标准化合成与测量方法来缩小。进展可能加速产业化并提升跨实验室的一致性质量。

items.title_en: Safe SIMD in Rust, Even on the Inside – By Sergey "Shnatsel" Davidoff
items.title_zh: Rust 的安全 SIMD：内部实现也能保持内存安全
items.summary_en: A deep dive into safe SIMD usage in Rust by Sergey Davidoff explains how to use SIMD without compromising safety, including architectural caveats and compiler-friendly patterns. It shows practical ways to keep performance gains while preserving correctness.
items.summary_zh: Shnatsel（Sergey Davidoff）深入讲解在 Rust 中如何安全使用 SIMD，包括架构注意事项与对编译器友好的实现模式。提供保持高性能同时确保正确性的实用做法。

items.title_en: Carlo Ginzburg, Who Told the History of the Obscure, Dies at 87
items.title_zh: 卡洛·金茨堡：讲述隐秘历史的学者去世，享年87岁
items.summary_en: Carlo Ginzburg, a pivotal historian known for microhistory and the study of obscure pasts, has died at 87. His work illuminated marginalized perspectives and showed how small, detailed investigations can reshape our understanding of medieval and early modern life.
items.summary_zh: 卡洛·金茨堡是以微观史学著称的历史学家，专注研究被忽视的历史细节。去世时享年87岁，他的研究展示了如何通过细微的史料重新塑造对中世纪和早期现代生活的理解。

items.title_en: Show HN: DebugBrief – turn debugging sessions into reports, no AI
items.title_zh: DebugBrief：将调试会话转化为报告，无需 AI
items.summary_en: DebugBrief turns debugging sessions into readable reports without relying on AI, helping engineers document issues, steps, and fixes efficiently. It streamlines post-mortems and onboarding for new maintainers.
items.summary_zh: DebugBrief 将调试会话整理成可读报告，无需依赖 AI，帮助工程师高效记录问题、步骤与修复。提升事后总结和新维护者的上手效率。

items.title_en: Nothing's co-founder says CMF can't build a phone 'at a price that makes sense'
items.title_zh: Nothing 联合创始人称 CMF 无法在可承受的价格打造手机
items.summary_en: Nothing's co-founder argues that CMF-focused design can't deliver a phone at a price that makes sense given current supply chains and material costs. The piece hints at the ongoing design-versus-cost tension hardware startups face, and what it means for future affordable devices.
items.summary_zh: Nothing 的联合创始人表示，在当前供应链和材料成本压力下，CMF 为主的设计难以以合理价格打造手机。此言揭示了硬件创业在设计与成本之间的持续博弈，以及对未来更实惠设备的影响。
